reviews.text:
He talks like he knows it all, reminds me of Rush L.  Offers to give you a big hot fudge sunday, but when he delivers there is no cherry on top, in fact, the ice cream is really shaving cream.

Flake

If I could give it a zero I would. I hired this firm to do bankruptcy. They never communicate no matter how many emails I send them about the same issue. On the day of my bankruptcy court Juana called me 20 minutes before to let me know that we have court. Granted, it’s my fault that I didn’t fully read my letters, but still my attorney should be on my side and communicate things with me, especially when I ask them when is the court. During the court, we found out that they did not upload my Social Security or my ID so they had to wait for that. Also, my attorney was nowhere to be found, but rather I had another attorney from their office. After the bankruptcy, nobody’s communicating with me, even though I have questions. At this point, I should be getting my money back as their service was nonexistent.
I recommend her to all Hispanic people. She's a good bankruptcy lawyer and offers many other services. Consultations are free.
The service is good. Martha is very helpful to people, and Juana is very kind. I highly recommend the office. Especially since Vanessa speaks Spanish.

Unprofessional!! The lawyer is never available, always out of the country… Martha, the secretary, is good at taking payments but terrible at handling paperwork… I don't recommend them at all; they never show up for appointments and send you lawyers you don't even know. Look for someone better. Just because they speak Spanish, you trust them, but the truth is they abuse the trust of their clients.

The lawyer is very kind, but the women who help her, one named Marta and the other I think named Juana, are very rude to people and fill out the paperwork poorly. I'm a citizen, but I saw how my wife was treated, and they should be kinder to people because they depend on them for their livelihood and shouldn't treat them like they're worthless. I have a bad recommendation for the staff who help her.
Great lawyers at work highly recommend!
Great

Vanessa  was very empathetic and truly seemed to care she gave me grate advice. Unfortunately wasn't able to help me out with my case but recommend someone who could. Otherwise I would have hired her grate people working here at Pancic Law ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
His Assumption to Hispanics is to make fun of us David Sauno Munoz

I have not been pleased as much as I have with this wonderful attorney that helped me with my case! We had a hearing today and everything went very smoothly. They never answer the phone! And went they do they are so rude. I was expecting more!
Excellent

I got the impression if It your case is not high dollar it’s not  Worth their time. I did not fill heard or respected as a potential client. Dealing with a workers injury Restrictions and benefits being cut off, you would expect at least a careful look at the situation.
Thank you,
Kim Craig
reviews.ownerResponse: We are sorry that we did not have the time to meet with you about your claim. As anyone with a claim knows, there are no big money workers compensation claims. We do our best to meet with potential clients, but our first obligation is to our existing clients.

reviews.text:
Frances and her firm were an absolute lifesaver for me. The entire Labor And Industry process had left me so despondent that I had literally given up hope. My workplace injury and subsequent surgeries left me crippled with a condition that multiple medical doctors had a little to no knowledge of. Frances, however, knew immediately what my exact diagnosis was and for the first time in years I felt as if I had a sword and shield against the monstrous uncaring bureaucracy of the state.

Frances fought for me for months, communicated clearly, and NEVER made me feel like another number or was just going through the motions. Nowadays, it is nearly impossible to interact with society without attorneys. That is, I have dealt with nearly every type of attorney imaginable throughout a long complicated lifetime. Frances was the first and only attorney that I have ever met NOT chasing fees.

In a world of instant everything it is easy to overlook an obvious but important point. The
reason why there are so few attorneys who are willing to fight against Labor And Industry is because one will never get rich by doing so. Finding an attorney whom functions on ideals such as Frances is an incredibly rare treasure and anyone she represents is extremely lucky.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words! It was our pleasure to help you.

reviews.text: This is another example of Frances staff making inappropriate comments about her accountant mistakes. After various emails and phone calls I have made to clear the situation out, there was no accountability by Frances herself on behalf of her own staff. I am baffled by such response. This is a business that is supposed to assist in the vulnerability of individuals already going through a horrible experience. Once again, I would not recommend.
reviews.ownerResponse: We apologize that we did not meet your expectations. We take every case seriously and work for the best possible outcome. Our office should have been better in responding to your concerns. Your comments will help us improve.  Thank you.

reviews.text: My experience with Frances and her team has been the absolute worst. There is no clear communication with the staff and no proper direction regarding my case. My phone calls and various emails have been dismissed by Frances herself. I would not recommend.
reviews.ownerResponse: We apologize that we did not meet your expectations. We take every case seriously and work for the best possible outcome. Our office should have been better in responding to your concerns. Your comments will help us improve.  Thank you.

reviews.text:
There are times in life when circumstances require obtaining the help of an expert. And such was the case when OTJ injuries resulted in my son being permanently totally disabled, but the time loss benefits were stopped.

Fortunately we were referred to Mr. Doug Palmer, who successfully navigated this case to a just conclusion (a life time pension). Which would not have been achieved without his expertise.

Doug was recommended as the best in his field and this is exactly what we experienced. He truly cares about his clients and worked diligently to obtain the result that this case warranted.

Along with Doug's effective counsel, he and his legal assistant kept us well informed and were always available to answer questions or discuss concerns. They were kind and patient and we are grateful that this case was in such good hands.

Without reservation we highly recommend Mr. Doug Palmer and his equally excellent legal team.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you. It has been our honor to represent you and your family through these tough times.

reviews.text: Great very nice people, it was very nice working with them!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, we very much enjoyed representing you!

reviews.text: Best lawyer and will go the extra mile to help her client
reviews.ownerResponse: We appreciate your kind words.
Thank you!

reviews.text: Doug is one of the best human beings I've ever encountered. I've worked with him and his staff for years, and I've been treated with respect and honestly like a family member. Everyone here is just so kind, willing to help, and answers questions. Doug has helped me and bent over backward through all aspects of the process that I've had to go through. I owe him everything. Not your typical lawyer and genuinely just wants to help   " the little guy" in this world and make sure you get what it is that is needed and overall just owed to you in your unique circumstance. I literally couldn't do any of what I went through without him and his team.
reviews.ownerResponse: We do this for workers like you that had a sudden, life-changing injury through no fault of your own. This is a difficult system to navigate when you're well, let alone when injured.

reviews.text: Very thankful for all they have done for me,,

reviews.text:
TO ENSURE YOU ARE TREATED FAIRLY AND YOU RECEIVE WHAT YOU ARE ENTITLED TO, RETAIN THIS FIRM. THEY REALIZE WITH WHAT YOU ARE GOING THROUGH MONEY IS TIGHT SO THEY OFFER TO NOT TAKE ANY PAYMENTS OF ANY KIND FROM YOU... INSTEAD THEY TAKE 15% FROM EACH DISABILITY CHECK FROM PAYMENTS MADE TO YOU DUE TO THEIR REPRESENTATION UNTIL A SET AMOUNT (BASED ON CLAIM VALUE) IS MET...SO YOU WILL NOT HAVE A LIFELONG DEBT TO PAY THEM. (I was placed on a disability pension for life! The attorney fees will fully be paid 7 years from start to finish) TO ATTAIN ANYONE ELSE TO REPRESENT YOU WOULD BE A GRAVE MISTAKE!!

Mr. Palmer is who represented me. He and all of his support staff are the best to be found. They are extremely talented, their knowledge and expertise is unsurpassed by no other. They are extremely knowledgeable, supportive, attentive, they apply immediate attention to ensure the fastest results for their clients are obtained. On top of all of that they really CARE about their clients. They go out of their way to fully explain everything step by step to you so you are always aware of what is going on with the case. Being injured and having to file for disability from a on the job injury a strain on finances. Due to previous illegalities perpetrated by my previous employer I rightfully had a fear my previous employer would rail road me and screw me out of what I was rightfully entitled to. Mr Palmer picked up on this and went out of his way to have me come in for a consult. The reason for this extra meeting was he said he noticed I have a lot of anxiety. He sat with me for an hour basically ensuring that I have nothing to worry about. That really set my mind at ease and I left that meeting happy, content ,full of renewed faith  and very optimistic about my future. I cannot say enough good about Mr Palmer and his staff!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words.  It was our pleasure representing you.

reviews.text: The level of care and attention to detail Mr. Gregg and his team offer is unmatched. They led the process and kept me well-informed during my personal injury claim. So grateful to have had the chance to work with them.

Mr. Gregg and staff were great to work with while handling my mother's probate matters. The process was explained and any questions I had were promptly answered by either Mr. Gregg himself or one of his knowledgeable staff members. With his many years of experience, I felt confident in using his law firm. I would highly recommend The Law Offices of Robert Gregg for my legal matters.

The staff of Robert Gregg are very friendly and outgoing. Robert Gregg definitely knows what he is doing. I used them several times and have been satisfied with each outcome. I highly recommend The Law Office of Robert Gregg.
Mr. Gregg and his staff were very professional and pro-active throughout the legal process. I would definitely recommend them!!

I would highly recommend the Law Office of Robert Gregg. He and his staff were awesome to work with. They were always available to answer any questions I had. Mr. Gregg provided on going communication, walked me through each step of the process and fought hard to settle my case with a great outcome!! I am very thankful to the Law office of Robert Gregg and his staff!

Mr. Gregg was great to work with.  He resolved my case expediently and within the timeframe projected.  If I have legal needs of this nature in the future, I would not hesitate to contact him to represent me again.

Went above and beyond what I was expecting. Patient, kind, and helped me every step of the way. They walked me through all the steps and what to expect at each stage, which helped me understand the process better and calm my nerves. Quick responses and very professional. Money well spent.

Working with Robert Gregg and Jessica is an absolute dream. They are so extremely knowledgeable and really took the time to share the little details. We felt so strong and solid during our entire work flow together. I would say working with them saves you money every time. There were things that we didn’t even think to have set up and we know this is going to save us so much hassle in the future. Thank you again Robert + Jessica for your warm hearts and extreme professionalism. They will always be on my top recommendations list! That’s for sure! Thank you again!
Mr. Gregg applied his knowledge and expertise and saved me over $35000 on a very complicated real estate transaction.  I recommend him highly.

Mr. Gregg and his staff were very helpful in handling my personal injury case resulting from an auto accident. They helped me understand the processes, answered my questions, and went above and beyond to have a fair outcome for my case. Mr. Gregg was honest, respectful and thorough in handling my case. His staff was available and prompt to respond to questions.

No blood n guts in my car crash so I spent time and money to see mr bob just to have my case turned down.
Could have done this on the phone.made me wait 5 days to hear Mr Gregg talk about places outher than where my crash happend. Unprofessional at most.
Helpful, approachable, professional.

Mr. Gregg very effectively handled my personal injury case due to a car accident.  Mr. Gregg's paralegal and staff were very responsive to my general questions, which allowed Mr. Gregg to focus on the litigation details.  He was strategic in when fight an issue versus let the little stuff go.  And the little stuff that was let go, was for very careful and strategic reasons that only benefited me.  He was professional and polite to the arbitrator and insurance defense counsel.  However, Mr. Gregg's prior dealings with the insurance defense attorney did not minimize or risk his effective representation of my case.  Mr. Gregg was honest with me on the potential outcomes and risks.  I appreciated him and his office for all of their hard work.

Nothing but great things to say about Mr. Gregg and his staff.  Since our first meeting with Mr Gregg we felt completely comfortable that he had our best interest in mind.  When we went to court the Judge actually said that he had all the paperwork in order and present our case in perfect order, the best he had seen.  We have needed Mr Gregg to address modification to our initial order and he has addressed them both times immediately and completely.  We can't say enough about how pleased we have been with the service Mr Gregg and his staff has provided us.

When I was rear ended on Hwy 14, I came to see Robert Gregg through a referral from a family member.  My insurance stopped paying partly way through and his office fought to get my insurance to keep paying.  I feel like they were honest and did a really good job getting my medical bills paid and  even some money in my pocket.

I was in a car accident and I needed to find an attorney to help me. Robert Gregg was highly recommend by many people. I went to his office and I was very impressed with him and his staff and found them all to be very helpful and professional with my situation. Robert Gregg helped me with all my legal matters pertaining to my accident.  I would highly recommend Robert Gregg to represent any one in need.

Chose him to handle a car accident injury claim since his office is small I thought he'd give more personal attention to my claim so it would get handled well and quickly. Neither of the two happened. The only nice meeting I had with him is when I signed a contract with him.After that-barely heard from him in 3 years. When my claim was one month from expiring, he wanted to mediate with the insur.co. We all met at neutral office, and he sat and hobnobbed with insur.co.reps and didn't even bring paperwork needed for the meeting. I realized then what side he was on and who actually keeps him in business!!  I later learned mediation allows other side to learn what evidence you have and puts you in a weaker position. Case was settled but I hope to never see him again - his lack of ethics is disgusting.  Do your homework and read reviews before you hire guys like this!

As a fellow attorney in Portland, I've known Tom for well over a decade. I've seen firsthand, over and over, how hard he fights for justice on behalf of his clients, the results he achieves, and the creativity and passion he brings to all of his representations. In my view, any case in Tom's office is a case in extremely good hands.

If you're in need of legal representation, I implore you to steer clear of this firm specifically Thomas. In my experience, this individual is the epitome of everything a lawyer should not be: rude, impatient, and downright mean.

From the very start, it was clear that this lawyer had little patience for their clients. They constantly interrupted and dismissed my concerns, making it painfully evident that they couldn't care less about my case. Their arrogance and condescension left me feeling small and uncomfortable.

What's worse, their behavior extended beyond mere rudeness. They seemed to take pleasure in belittling me, subjecting me to harsh criticism and sarcasm. Their lack of empathy was astounding, making a difficult legal situation even more emotionally taxing.

Beyond their appalling attitude, their work was subpar at best. Deadlines were ignored, promises broken, and their focus appeared solely on extracting fees rather than providing competent representation.

In conclusion, my experience with this lawyer was a nightmare, and I strongly urge you to avoid them. Their rudeness, impatience, and mean-spiritedness should serve as a glaring warning. Find a lawyer who not only possesses the necessary legal skills but also treats clients with the respect and professionalism they deserve. This lawyer is one you should absolutely steer clear of.

I was hit by a drunk driver and my car was totalled in Jan 2019. Gresham Injury Law Center helped with navigating and cleaning up the legal mess that came with me not having my own car insurance. They kept me in the loop throughout the process and up to date. I am very happy with their work and how everything was handled. Thank You for helping me.
Rude People dont go through them
reviews.ownerResponse: We expect people calling a lawyer to discuss a motor vehicle collision to know where the collision occurred and what kind of car they were driving. We ask question to ensure that our office does not waste the time of a potential client and, if the potential client is unable or unwilling to give us basic information then it would be impossible for us to help.

reviews.text:
A+  for Thomas Melville

We don't live in the Portland area and went forward with hiring
Mr. Melville on the recommendation of another Attorney in the state.

Our first meeting was friendly,  casual,  and professional.  He asked the important questions and evaluated the case to be certain there was indeed a case.

This wrongful death case was handled long distance and he made certain we were well informed and prepared.  Never did we feel like we were left with  any unanswered questions.  The Gresham Injury Law Center ALWAYS responded to our calls and updated us regularly.

We surely found the right person for our case and ....
We highly recommend Tom Melville.
I have never been treated so badly. All he could do is yell at me.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We strive to help callers to the best of our ability. Obviously we cannot give legal advice over the phone. Professional legal advice requires knowing all the facts and the law for any given situation.

We hope that our website and offer of a free consultation do not lead the public to assume we can resolve a case with a single phone call.

reviews.text: Mr. Melville and staff are very good at what they do!! They are very professional and take care of their clients. They aren't there to be your best friend, they are there to be your best attorneys... for that I am very greatfull! I would highly recommend this agency.
The rudest lawyer I've ever spoken to. Tried to set up an appointment for a consultation, was interrogated and accused of being defensive. Never will I turn to this terrible man to settle my claim.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We take all calls seriously. We do our best to learn the facts as early as possible in our first contact. Sometimes the people calling in have unrealistic expectations and then refuse to proceed with an in-person consultation.

We simply hope that everyone seeking legal advice can find someone who will listen. We do our best and apologize to anyone offended at our questions about their potential case.

reviews.text: I have co-counseled cases with Johnson McCall over the years, and they are truly a powerhouse in litigation. They aren’t afraid to take tough cases to trial and have genuine compassion for the clients they serve. I recommend them without reservation.
All nice people!

Megan Johnson and Kristen McCall lead a powerhouse team in navigating sensitive cases, including sexual abuse, elder and nursing home neglect, and serious injury claims.  Their attorneys and staff are committed to holding responsible parties accountable while supporting clients through difficult and emotional legal processes.
This is a top-notch law firm. I regularly refer clients here, and I feel confident that they will be in good hands with any of the firm's attorneys. Highly recommend.
reviews.ownerResponse: We feel proud when excellent lawyers in our community send people our way.  Thank you!

reviews.text: Did so much for me wouldn't be able to do it without them.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are glowing due to those five amazing stars, thank you for your kind review of our work.

reviews.text: The professionals at Johnson McCall are top notch, as well as kind, considerate, and dedicated. Our experience was wonderfully positive and beyond our expectations!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for trusting us with such an important event in your life.  We are thrilled to hear we exceeded your expectations. Best of luck in the future.

reviews.text:
The entire team at Johnson Mc Call LLP were professional, highly knowledgeable, sympathetic, caring and kind.
From the moment they took our case they were open and up front on our options and what each option could result in. They understand what we were going through, the grief, the pain, the anger. They reviewed each and every shred of evidence and made a bold move to challenge the "norm" and won setting precedence for future cases like our moms. If I could give 10 stars I would. We appreciate you all more than words can express! Keep fighting for change. We support your mission!

Thank you for trusting Johnson McCall. We wish you the best in the future.

reviews.text: Kristen McCall made me feel confident about her abilities to navigate the legal system when she created a team for all the needs of my case. I was able to lean on them and trust their direction. She constantly reassured me I was doing the right thing in pursing my case for justice. The Johnson McCall team understood how to be trauma-informed with their clients. I felt heard and seen throughout the journey of my case. They showed an understanding of my personal situation and demonstrated empathy throughout the legal process. This helped me a great deal to get through a difficult time. Giving me closer and justice for my loved one. I would recommend this legal team.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for this review. Kristen McCall and her team work hard at advocating for their clients while caring for their trauma. We are so happy that you felt supported during such a difficult time. We very much appreciate the opportunity to assist you, and we wish you all the best.

reviews.text: These attorneys are fantastic. Knowledgeable, skilled, and compassionate. An excellent choice for anyone who needs an advocate.

Couldn't have asked for a better experience or outcome. Kristen and Joy represented me in a bike accident case. They secured a great settlement and made the defendant change the practice that led to my injury!

Very Nice Interaction. However pulled out of the agreement seemingly out of nowhere and left me hanging. Had to ask lots of followup to clarify and I feel like this could have been discussed before they just dropped it. Made me feel like they didn't believe me. However I appreciate the second look they gave my issue but the outcome was not any different than the other attorneys I contacted. Unfortunately corporations that also have to follow laws in Oregon seem to get away with hurting people and the poor person that gets hurt has no remedies if one is depending on pro bono lawyers.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Knebel –
We understand how frustrating it is to hear, over and over again, that the lawyers you are consulting with are unable to take your case. We agree with you, our system of justice is imperfect. We appreciated the opportunity to review your case, and are glad that you mentioned that we took a second look at it at your request. We enjoyed meeting you and wish you the best.

reviews.text: I spoke with Megan Johnson.  She was empathetic and kind.  Even though a potential case is a ways off, she took the time to explain our future options without hesitation.  The rating is for her willingness to discuss our options. If we pursue, she will be our first call.  Thank you Megan.

I am so grateful I had the pleasure of working with the Johnson McCall team. My case was unique and legally laborious, and all of the women of Johnson McCall took this challenge head on with an obvious passion for fighting the good fight. Beyond their impressive expertise in law, these attorneys know how to be trauma-informed with their clients, something vital in personal injury law. Their dedication and hard work was greatly appreciated. Thank you for really hearing me and seeing me throughout our journey together!

Tamra took on my case last minute when a less inclined attorney bailed on me. reviews.ownerResponse:
While I cannot comment on the individual circumstances of someone's matter, if any, I can say a few things about our standard practices. Second DUIs can be complicated with regard to licensing and ignition interlock consequences and requirements. The Dept. of Licensing sometimes handles old prior convictions differently than newer ones when imposing ignition interlock requirements. The Dept. of Licensing is an independent agency and makes administrative decisions based on convictions or other circumstances. We always advise clients as to the possible scenarios and refer clients directly to the Department of Licensing to understand the actions the Department may take post-conviction.

Anytime a real chance exists for getting a charge reduced to negligent driving in the first degree, you can bet that we will fight for that result. At the Dalton Law Office, PLLC, we obtain numerous reductions and dismissals of DUI charges. Sometimes people make big mistakes in their lives and, though we can lessen the impacts and guide them through the process, it is not always possible to work against reality and obtain results that don't fit the facts, particularly in the absence of officer mistakes or technicalities. Sometimes the officers involved are thorough and make their case strong and complete so that the risk of losing after trial may be greater than the client wants to accept.

The process can be overwhelming for some and people don't always absorb or remember all the details about the ramifications of their choices. We wish jd the best of luck in the future.

reviews.text: I disagree with these positive reviews. I am the owner of a 33 SPACE RV PARK and wanted to evict tenants occupying my mobile home. We believed we could terminate their month/month lease based on “no cause”  with a simple 60 day notice of Termination.   I spoke to Stephanie Radecke an attorney at Erin Bradly Mc Aleer who looked at the facts (especially an email from my tenant who said she would be following "THE LETTER OF THE LAW"  and proceeded to take my case ; Even though I did NOT have a proper foundation. Her after response was after I lost this case, that I told her “ to proceed any way”. Why would I proceed on a case without a proper foundation for FOUR THOUSAND dollars is beyond me???  The ETHICAL thing to do was NOT take my case and make it undeniably clear, I did not have justification in moving forward.  When I question her on the high fee of a $4K  retainer, she told me her fee was high because she would be  vigilant and responsive as she does not use paralegals and I would have my case strongly represented in a shorter period of time; that apparently seems their “mantra of justification” of fees. Once this firm received my money,  she was always in court on various other cases and barely accessible; communication was POOR at Best,  with my  managers needing to go to court delivering documents,  the last minute due to her inattention.   My case was contested by a public defender representing these tenants at the last moment based on NO CAUSE. Then Stephanie told me she can amend my case for another $2K, and base it on “non payment” by the tenants. I did not accept payment from them when I started the eviction and returned their first check, so I was 50/50 on this,  however told her to proceed and get them served, that was on a Friday; On the following Monday when my managers called her to see if they were served that was not done;  When I spoke to her, she said she was “spaced out” and she was going to withdraw from the case.  I called the owner Erin Bradly who said he would look into the case and to get back to him the following week. I did in fact call him on that following Monday, he was out of the office and would “call me back” which he never did and then that Friday again, and was informed he was there, preparing for a case on Monday  and would call me sometime in the future when he is available.  I am writing this for YOUR benefit so you can accurately evaluate whether you  want representation from this Law Firm. Let these facts speak for themselves. Ralph Waldo Emerson said “You’re Actions Speak so Loudly, I can’t Hear what You’re Saying. Amen to That.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are sorry you feel this way. We definitely advised you of the risks with your proposed course of action. When it didn’t work out you doubled back and placed blame on us. We disagree with your take and analysis on the case, but nonetheless I wish your the best in the future.

Dedicated Intake Coordinator gathers your case details and sends you the retainer agreement right away.

24-Hour Availability Check: As soon as we receive your signed retainer and initial payment, we confirm which attorney can take your case—and let you know within one business day.

Immediate Referrals if Needed: If no one on our team has availability, we’ll give you that answer immediately—and connect you with a trusted colleague who can help.

In your situation, our team was ready to assign counsel the moment we had your signed commitment; the back-and-forth on authorizing representation—not any gap in our internal process—held up the assignment.

While my car was repaired, I’m still dealing with the aftermath of being rear-ended at 65 miles an hour. Cameron made an overwhelming and intimidating process feel manageable and clear. Without him, I would have had no idea how to navigate the mountains of documentation, doctor visits, physical therapy, surgery, and follow-up appointments required in a case like this. He guided me every step of the way and gave me confidence that I would be awarded something so I could continue taking care of myself when insurance would not cover what I needed. Hiring Cameron cost me nothing—if there had been no award, I would never have owed a dime. His professionalism, knowledge, and genuine support made all the difference during one of the hardest times of my life. I truly cannot recommend him enough.

Big legal things are scary. Cameron and his team did everything they could to make it not scary. His calm demeanor was infectious and made the entire process smooth and easy. My questions were always answered, communication was fast and simple, and having someone who knows what they are doing on your side is very valuable. Before I reached out, I was dealing with all the leg work and communications with the insurance companies and my medical providers. Once Cameron took on the case, all of that went away and I was able to focus on healing. I highly recommend Cameron and his team.

My husband and I were hit by a man running a red light last October. Our car hit another car and our two dogs who were in the back were ejected out the back.  Luckily my dogs and husband were not badly injured but definitely traumatized. I was badly bruised and in a lot of pain when I reached out to Cameron.  The insurance company was offering me the same lowball offer over and over.  When Cameron took over, I stopped having to deal with the insurance company and all of the intricacies of the claim. Cameron kept me informed through the negotiations. I felt like I was in great hands.  I was able to let go of worrying about the claim and spend the time healing my body. The resulting settlement felt fair and I think it was the best outcome for me.  I would definitely recommend Cameron for anyone who is injured in a car accident.

Cameron and his team were a lifesaver throughout my 3-year ordeal following a car accident. From the start, they were approachable, compassionate, easy to reach, and incredibly knowledgeable. Their professionalism and expertise gave me confidence every step of the way. Both Cameron and the mediator stated that the settlement I received was one of the largest they had seen for my type of injury. I couldn't be more pleased with the outcome, and would highly recommend Cameron to anyone in need of legal assistance.

I had a great experience working with my personal injury attorney, Sarah. She was always on top of my case, consistently attentive, and genuinely listened to my concerns throughout the entire process. I felt heard, supported, and well-informed every step of the way. Thanks to her hard work, I received a fair settlement that reflected the impact of my injury.

Both Sarah and Lisa are exceptional at what they do — knowledgeable, professional, and truly client-focused. I couldn’t have asked for a better team to represent me. Highly recommended!

I cannot recommend this firm enough! Scott was fantastic to work with. It was my first time ever needing legal assistance and he made sure all of my questions were answered and walked me through it all smoothly. I got in a car accident near my University’s campus and was unsure of what I needed to do but Scott reassured me of all the steps I needed to take to not only start the case but take care of myself physically and mentally.  I was extremely happy with the outcome of our case and satisfied with my service!

Scott and Lisa were both incredible to work with throughout the entire process.  I needed to seek legal counsel for an issue despite not being the type who wants seeks to financially harm others.  Based on prior reviews, I knew they would not be forceful and "sleazy". They understood where I was coming from and never pushed me out of my comfort zone despite a very clear case that could warrant a more litigious approach. They treated my case just as seriously as one that would have been more aggressive. They were diligently on behalf with insurance companies.  They were very responsive and thorough.  They sought additional knowledge when things began to involve another state with a move.  I cannot recommend them enough.

I was so happy that a friend led me to Levin and Levine LLP. They have been 100% professional and have kept me in the loop the whole time. Everyone that I have met or talked to from their office has been very kind and friendly. They have gone above and beyond to help me. I will definitely be passing their name on to any of my family or friends that need them and if anything arises for me again, they will be the first ones I call. Thank you again for all your help.

I can't thank Scott Levin and Michelle enough for the incredible support and representation they provided during one of the most difficult times in my life. From the very beginning, they were professional, communicative, and genuinely compassionate. They guided me through every step of the process with clarity and patience, helping me navigate an incredibly traumatizing experience with confidence.

Scott and Michelle were always available to answer questions, offer reassurance, and keep me informed. Their dedication and expertise were evident throughout, and I always felt like I was in capable, caring hands.

Thanks to their guidance and hard work, I was able to get through a challenging situation and find some peace of mind. If I ever need legal help again, they will be the first people I call—without a doubt. I wholeheartedly recommend Scott Levin to anyone in need of a personal injury attorney. I’ve already told friends and family about them, and will continue to do so with complete confidence.

Excellent service from start to finish! Scott and Michelle  were both incredibly kind, helpful, and easy to work with. They made the legal process smooth and stress-free. I’m thankful for their support and feel confident knowing my case is in such capable hands. I highly recommend them for reliable legal representation

Scott and his team were a pleasure to work with. They were good listeners, patient, and thorough with my accident injury claim. They were never pushy and only offered advice when solicited. I never once felt like my case was in the wrong hands, and I felt my case had a positive outcome. I highly recommend them and I will seek them out again if ever needed.

I cannot express enough how grateful I am for the outstanding service I received from Scott and Michelle. After my mom's car accident, we were overwhelmed and unsure of where to turn. My mom was especially overwhelmed with the fact that she doesn't speak English to begin with. From the very first consultation Scott and Michelle were not only compassionate and understanding but also highly knowledgeable about the legal process.

They walked us through every step, explained my mother's rights, and made sure we understood all of our options. Throughout the entire case, we felt supported and confident in their ability to handle everything. The level of professionalism and dedication they showed was truly exceptional.

Thanks to their hard work, my mom received a settlement far beyond what we had hoped for. I highly recommend Levin Levine, LLP to anyone in need of an experienced and trustworthy car accident lawyer. They made a difficult time so much easier and we got the results my mom deserved. Thank you again for everything!

I have had the pleasure of working with Levin and Levine, and I can confidently attest that they have provided exceptional service throughout my experiences with car accidents. Scott and Lisa have consistently demonstrated their availability and responsiveness, ensuring that I was well-informed and updated throughout the process. Initially, I discovered Levin and Levine while seeking chiropractic care following a car accident. After reaching out, I was able to schedule an appointment with Scott, who has not only an office in Portland but also one in Newberg, which is more convenient for me. He has successfully assisted me in settling two accidents. Although I did not anticipate becoming a repeat client, Scott's expertise and dedication have been invaluable. The communication with Levin and Levine has been outstanding, and I appreciate Scott's availability through phone calls, text messages, and in-person meetings. Lisa has also streamlined the document-signing process, even offering to meet me at a location convenient for my family. I highly recommend Levin and Levine to anyone in need of their services. They consistently exceed expectations to ensure that their clients receive the compensation they deserve.

I highly recommend Cameron as a personal injury attorney. He was professional, personable, and incredibly easy to communicate with throughout the entire process. Cameron provided clear, knowledgeable answers to all of my questions and helped me feel informed and confident every step of the way.

During a very stressful and uncertain time in my life, he made the legal process feel manageable and straightforward. It was a true relief to have someone so dependable and compassionate in my corner. I'm grateful for his support and expertise, and I wouldn't hesitate to refer him to anyone in need of legal representation.

Cameron and his team were amazing to work with! He came highly recommended to me after my car accident, and I'm so glad I went with him. He and his team were kind, communicative, and took care of all the logistics around my car accident - insurance, billing, and everything in between - so I could focus on getting better. They were very knowledgeable and made sure the outcome was fair and right for my situation. I always felt informed and taken care of throughout the process, knowing I could reach out anytime with questions and receive excellent support.

They made a tough situation so much easier, and I cannot recommend them enough.

I would choose more stars, if I could.
Cameron and Arina have helped me in two different situations, and both of those experiences have been flawless. When you get in an accident, you have to spend so much time on healing and taking care of your body, and having a team taking care of all the paperwork and legal side is so incredibly helpful.  If I hear of anyone else that needs injury help, I tell them about Cameron Levine.
Thanks again for all your help Cameron!!

Debi M.

It was a pleasure to work with Cameron Levine following my motor vehicle accident in 2023. The support he and his staff offered was thorough, more than competent, and allowed me to focus on my care - which was the most important thing. Every interaction I had with Levin and Levine felt like I was dealing with a friend, someone who would level with me and whom I could trust to be on my side. They helped me get a fair settlement and I wouldn't hesitate to work with them again, or to recommend them to anyone I know. Thank you Cameron and Arina!!
Excellent communication, very knowledgeable and quick to respond to questions. I’m extremely grateful they took my case and i got so much more than i expected.

If I had to use one word to describe my experience with Levin and Levine I’d say MAGNIFICENT!! Cameron and Michelle are truly some of the best people ever. Very patient, understanding, always willing to help you understand something (because legal vocabulary is confusing sometimes lol) and just over all very good lawyers. I appreciate that they see the human side of things and not just the black and white of it all. I’d definitely recommend them if I were asked about who I think is good representation. Cameron and Michelle, thank you for all of your hard work, and getting me through it. Y’all are truly the best!!

We loved working with Cameron! Really great experience and friendly vibe, and incredibly efficient and knowledgeable. Everything was explained to us in a kind and easy to understand way, which was great as people with little experience dealing with legal matters. We are so grateful to have had such a supportive and incredible Dream Team help us get a little bit of good out of a terrible situation. I would highly recommend!

I highly recommend Levin and Levine! It truly felt like somebody had lifted a weight off my shoulders. To start the process, I simply handed over my paperwork, and for the first time in a long time, I felt like someone else was handling most of the work for me—it was like I had pressed the easy button! The team was responsive, and I achieved the results I desired.

I rarely write reviews; however, I want others who are looking for legal help to know what exceptional support I received from Scott Levin and Michelle de Supinski this year in settling my personal injury insurance claim.

From my earliest contact with them, I was met with consideration and respect. When Scott met with my husband and me via Zoom (we live out of state), I was struck by how genuine and forthright he was as well as by his relaxed and, simultaneously, focused attitude as he guided us through the settlement process. Scott not only answered all our questions, but he concluded our meeting by inviting us to email or call him whenever we had more questions or comments (which we did).

I'm equally grateful for Michelle's support: she notified us promptly whenever action was needed on our part, she always responded to our emails quickly, and she kept us appraised of the progress of our case.

However, it was while reading the concise and compelling demand letter that Scott and Michelle submitted to the insurance company that I truly understood the extraordinary skill both of them had brought to my case. Their demand letter was so clear and compelling that I actually applauded as I sat at my computer. I was delighted when Scott called me personally to tell me successful the results of their efforts in negotiating my claim…in fact, the results were beyond what I could have imagined.

Scott and Michelle are masters of their profession, handling me and my claim settlement with sensitivity and grace. I was very, very lucky to have encountered them. I expect you will be, too.

Scott Levin and his paralegal Michelle are amazing. Hands down the best experience in settling my auto accident case with the behemoth Geico. Scott is a very talented and passionate lawyer. Michelle is an incredible support for Scott. They communicate effectively and clearly. Scott was available for my questions, concerns, worries, anxieties, etc. He did such a great job of navigating my case and keeping me informed along the way. He really knows his craft and performs it well. I ended up with way more than I expected as settlement from my accident and that is all down to Scott’s expertise. I HIGHLY recommend Levin & Levine for all your personal injury claims! If I could I’d give them 20 ✨

Scott Levin was an excellent advocate for me. He is knowledgeable, experienced, and responsive- I sincerely appreciated working with his paralegal, Michelle, too. I was in a non-at-fault auto accident and my case was anything from straightforward- from avoidable delays in my vehicle’s repair when it should have been totaled to my later being rear-ended while in the rental car. I was injured 4 years ago when I was stuck in the head by a heavy flying object at a well know home improvement store as the result of one of their employee’s negligence. I was diagnosed with a traumatic brain injury, short-term memory loss, tinnitus, PTSD and numerous other injuries that continue to affect my life to this day.    When I attempted to deal with their insurance company, the claims adjuster told me I could not have been injured, and basically told me to get an attorney.   So, I did. And he is a good one.
I was honored that Dr. Aaron DeShaw took my case.  I was impressed by academic acumen as well as his many legal victories.  He and his staff went above and beyond for me and their expertise and dedication made a stressful situation much more manageable. They listened to my concerns and explained the steps of the legal process in a way that was easy to understand.
Their communications were prompt and kept me updated on any developments. Dr. DeShaw’s knowledge of personal injury law is impressive, and he navigated the complexities of my case with skill and confidence, which made me feel reassured throughout the entire process.  He prepared me for arbitration and, later for a deposition, so there were no surprises along the way.
The compensation I received won’t bring me back to a physical level I previously enjoyed, but it helps easy some of the stress and pain I’ve been through. If you're looking for someone who is knowledgeable, dedicated, and a fighter, call Dr. Aaron DeShaw.

Great place and excellent representation for any legal problem you might have.

If it was possible to give Brian Walker more than 5 stars we would do so in a heartbeat. When looking for an attorney back in 2020, I had called more than 5 attorneys and each one saw our case as a money case. They wanted money before even going out and speaking to my significant other which was an important thing to us. When I had found out about Brian I called right away and his assistant patched me through to speak to Brian. Brian talked to me over the phone for over an hour talking about my significant others case and what he could see and understand just by glancing at it. The very next day he spoke to my significant other and got down to business. Brian called me right after letting me know how much the total would be to take on his case, I mentioned to him that I was doing this all on my own. He offered me an amount of retainer and the rest to be paid off in payments. When I had the retainer amount ready Brian was actually on a trip but took my significant others file with him just in case something came up & it surely did. That same week Brian came back and appeared in court as my significant others attorney. Brian has worked hard these last 4.5 years on our case. Despite our trial date being pushed out over and over again Brian had us ready either way. He was always ready to answer our questions no matter how big or small the question was. He’s a very sympathetic person when speaking to him outside a court room, but the moment he’s in the court room representing his client he is quick to dismiss any accusation and stand behind his client no matter their race, charges, or attitude. After 4.5 long years Brian has now given us our freedom from all of this. My significant other was told he was facing many years in prison & Brian got us out of this problem. My significant other is now my husband and father to our two beautiful girls & none of this would’ve happened if we didn’t have Brian fighting in our corner to reduce his bail & give us the opportunity to continue living our lives as normal as we could while the case was being worked on and Now that it’s all over we couldn’t be more grateful!

As much as we are thankful for Brian we are also thankful for his legal team. His assistant have always been so kind, thoughtful, and very cooperative with us. There was never a moment we felt like we were being dismissed by them, we always felt heard when expressing our questions and concerns. They see their clients more as just clients, but as a family. Many times when we would call they would ask about our family and how things were going in the pregnancy and our toddlers life.

With that being said, if you’re looking for someone to fight for you or your family member with such a passion and dedication Brian Walker Law Firm PC is the way to go! Be mindful Brian is a very busy attorney and can be a little hard to get to, but when he gets to you his mindset and priority are you in that moment. Brian Walker will never see your case as a money winning case, but as a person needing help to prove their innocence in a system that can seem hard and unfair at times. Words can not begin to express how thankful we are to have had Brian as our attorney, without his help none of this would’ve been possible.

We truly appreciate the work Brian Walker did for us. We are so thankful we found a lawyer who put so much effort into what we needed and cared about us personally. He goes above and beyond and kept up awesome communication and updates through our process. Thank you Brian!

Brian Walker and Brian Hunter are hands down the best attorneys that I could have been blessed with. The amount of research and dedication they paid to my complicated situation where endless. Thanks to these two amazing attorneys, I have regained control of my life after a sad and desperate situation was thrust upon both myself and my children. If it wasn’t for the support of my family and both of these attorneys I would not have been able to rebuild my life as quickly and successfully as I have. I would give them both 10 stars if it were an option. Thank you both for your tireless efforts, knowledge and professionalism while bringing justice to my life. I am forever grateful.

Matt did better than amazing. Took a care that I had been battling for 3 years and finished it within a couple months. (NO THANKS to VANCOUVER DEFENDERS, and their PATHETIC set of crooks and cronies.)
I highly recommend Brian Walker Law Firm PC.
You will walk out satisfied, and with a feeling of accomplishment and security.
They'll have your back.

I did not feel like this firm was trying to do what's best for me. I felt like they were trying to get as much money from me as possible but not really putting effort to do a good job. reviews.text: In all fairness...I did not deal directly with Mr. Walker. I did however speak with whom I Assumed was a receptionist who was nice and cordial. The problem was with the legal aide, She was very condescending and didn't seem to know much as to the systems and processes of the office of which she worked...But the main reason I fired them before ever hiring them was I asked for a simple 2 minute phone call from Mr. Spears so he could give me a plan of action for my case and was told verbatim "He has a case today and said he don't have time for you...if you want to hire us, pay the retainer and he will do the best he can"...all with a condescending tone and with no level of confidence at all.  Mr. Walker, if you see this, then please have a come to Jesus meeting with your staff, cuz I can guarantee you are losing clients that you probably never know about. People want to know what they are paying their money for...they deserve the courtesy of a 5 minute phone call and to be spoke to with respect.

The one and only Roy Fernandez attorney-at-law along with his spell casting magical legal genius Cary Barber from the extraordinary Bridge City Law Group.

reviews.text: Bridge City Law has been so great to work with.  Jim my attorney and Savannah his assistant have done so much for me and my claim. They went above and beyond to make sure I was healed and ready to move forward with settling my claim. When I was not all the way healed they wrote a letter of protection for me to The Wellness Center and Compass Pain and Wellness so I could continue treatment until I was physically ready to end my claim. (I recommend both of those places by the way, such great teams and wonderful treatment) They took my health and well being into consideration.  I have never been treated like this before. It was amazing and I could relax some and get well. Before we ever settled my claim Jim and Savannah wanted to be clear with what I WANT THE OUTCOME TO BE, not what they want. They always continued to put me and my requests first. Jim or Savannah would always take the time to reach out to me to go over the claim or answer any questions I may of had. And Jim and Savannah are HONEST! If it is something they do not handle, they will let you know immediately.  And maybe recommend someone. Plus a free consultation?!!! Why not? The attendending Er Physician released me to the care of my personal Physician and stated I had no visual broken bones. As part of my recovery treatment I began Physical Therapy. After two months  I was still in such exscruiating pain, that my Physician sent me back to the Hospital for an MRI on my chest. The results of this MRI revield I infact still had 6 broken ribs and a broken steriunm, that was still healing.
Realizing the results of what had happen to me I turned to Robert Le Atterney at Law. Mr Le then found and expert Radiolgest to review the Medical file and exray films from the hospital. The expert foung it was clear from the begining that my bones had been broken from the accident in October. Mr Le then started financial restitution on my behalf.
Through out this hard and trying time in my life I feel Mr Le was emotional supportive, undertanding, encouraging and always had a positive attitude for a good out come. He did infact succed in winning this case and recover a substantial amount. Thank you Robert Le. I recommend you highley.

The Clark County Prosecuting Attorney's Office has demonstrated a troubling lack of urgency and responsiveness in handling critical cases that affect public safety. After law enforcement conducted a thorough investigation and worked tirelessly to apprehend an offender—who has been incarcerated in Multnomah County since April 19, 2025—it would seem that the next steps should be swift and straightforward. Yet, despite repeated calls to the Prosecuting Attorney's Office to advise them of the situation, the case has remained in limbo. Untouched.

The office has cited a lack of paperwork and an ongoing intake process, yet efforts to provide them with necessary information have gone unanswered. Multiple phone calls, messages, and even an in-person visit have yielded no productive results. Instead, the process has been obstructed by rigid and inefficient procedures—such as requiring an appointment to discuss any matter, while also failing to provide a timely way to schedule one.

As of May 16, 2025, much of the office, including the office manager, operates remotely, making communication and resolution even more difficult. Calls to the office manager result in voicemail, and responses take upwards of 72 hours—if they come at all. This inefficiency raises serious concerns about the ability of the Prosecuting Attorney's Office to fulfill its responsibility to the community, taxpayers, and those who placed their trust in the justice system.

Public officials, such as Tony Golik (who I voted for twice),  must remain accountable to the people they serve. Justice should not be delayed due to bureaucratic barriers and unresponsive administration. The residents of Clark County deserve better.
Justice for Courtney Clinton. The person who killed her is still on the loose in portland/Vancouver area. Her family deserves justice.

An alleged DV victim will get an advocate in less than 24hrs, shouldn’t all victims of violence be prioritized the same and offered the same resources for the trauma they experienced? Or is it because he’s not a white woman Apparently they don’t care about men or men’s mental health in Clark county.
Woke justice system

reviews.text: My fiance, my dog, and myself were hit by a drunk driver in Summer 2017. It was a very bad car crash, with our medical bills landing in the six figures. Josh was a fantastic resource from the first phone call. He navigated us through the absurdly expensive medical bills, the criminal and civil case against the driver/their insurance company, and was our greatest advocate the entire length of this journey ensuring we made it out the other side of this whole. After being involved in an awful accident last year, my family and I were very concerned about whether I needed a lawyer.  Some friends and family-- as well as my very own insurance company-- State Farm-- advised   I didn't need one--that they would only "take my money".  Boy, were they wrong!!!
Thank God, I found Josh and his excellent assistant Jessica.
From the beginning, they promptly, efficiently, and compassionately answered all my questions and concerns and supported me throughout the  legal process.
Going through the process of dealing with the court system, insurance companies and the many, many, health care providers wanting to be paid was intimidating and overwhelming as I was dealing with multiple injuries.
Jessica took over dealing with all the bills I was receiving from medical  providers. She also helped me  apply for and get Crime Victims financial assistance which relieved a huge burden for me.
In the end I received a substantial settlement. If I had done this on my own, I would have received ABSOLUTELY nothing!
I can't thank them enough!!!

I'm incredibly grateful for his expertise and dedication. I highly recommend David Eder and his team if you're looking for an attorney to fight for you and stand by your side through the most challenging times.

Ben handled my case with patience, care and expertise. He inherently knew that holding out and playing the long game would be the better choice. He also knew EXACTLY how the other side would play their hand. I'm so grateful I hired Ben, I felt comfortable and cared for.

We had the privilege of working with Ben Eder as our attorney, and the representation we received was nothing short of outstanding. Ben’s extensive trial experience was evident throughout—from critical insights during jury selection to his compelling delivery in both opening and closing arguments. Most impressively, his cross-examinations were skillfully executed, revealing key truths that significantly impacted the outcome.

This firm operates as a cohesive, highly professional team, and they have unquestionably earned my trust. They will be my first call for any future litigation needs.

ATTENTION VERY BAD ATTORNEY BEN EDER. In 2012, I hired attorney Ben Eder and paid him sixty thousand dollars to represent me in a criminal trial. Unfortunately, what I received was not professional legal representation. During a five-day trial, Mr. Eder spoke for no more than 45 minutes. He made no objections, even when unqualified witnesses were allowed to testify about handwriting analysis — something only certified experts should do. He did not challenge the prosecution’s claims, did not speak up for me in front of the judge or the jury, and did not defend me in any meaningful way. At the end of the trial, he simply put me on the stand to testify on my own.

Additionally, Mr. Eder did not hire a private investigator to look into my case. Instead, he relied on state investigators who were clearly biased against me. Every professional attorney understands the importance of hiring their own private investigator to build a strong defense, but Mr. Eder failed to do so.

Because of this lack of defense, I was convicted and sentenced to 35 years in prison. I served the 12 YEARS of my sentence. At that time, I had very limited English and didn’t know how to file a complaint within the legal time limit. Today, I speak better English and feel a responsibility to share my story publicly, so others don’t go through what I went through.

This is not an act of revenge. I am not making threats or breaking the law. I am currently on probation supervision and follow all rules strictly. I have the legal right to share my experience so people can make informed choices. It deeply concerns me to see this attorney rated as a five-star lawyer, knowing what he did — or failed to do — in my case.

I lost twelve years of my life. The damage was emotional, mental, physical — and permanent. People deserve to know the truth.

My mom was in a large car crash.  She had extensive medical needs, medical care and complicated facts.  We were referred over to David Eder. When the mediation reached a resolution, they continued to work on lowering medical reimbursement liens.  I had my own car crash case.  I wish I had called these guys to handle it!

Choosing an attorney can be a difficult process.  As I had previously worked for 20 years as a police officer, FBI task force officer, and corporate investigator, I’ve interacted with  many lawyers.  I wanted a lawyer that I knew would always be honest with me, care about my case, give me realistic expectations,  and had a reputation for being fantastic at trial.  The case got close to settling prior to trial, but the opposing team of lawyers took unreasonable positions and my attorney advised me that trial was my best option.  Although a trial is stressful, time consuming,  and nerve racking, I had complete confidence that Ben, David, Andrew and Joel had thought about every angle for my case from evidence review/preparation, trial strategy, and legal motions.  They asked important questions, met with witnesses, selected and reviewed evidence, and worked tirelessly on my behalf.  I had heard about Ben’s reputation as one of the best trial lawyers in the State of Oregon with an impressive track record.   He proved it in my trial.  What struck me was how calm and controlled he is in the courtroom.  Things got very heated with opposing counsel, yet he remained composed and professional in his interactions as he was representing solely my interests.  His style reminds me of the type of lawyer you see in the movies where jurors are captivated by his natural delivery and questioning of witnesses that follow his carefully planned strategy of eliciting the truth.  His word choice is excellent, speech pattern is fluid/relatable, he doesn’t use notes when he speaks to witnesses or jurors, reacts to what each witness is saying and keeps the jurors’ focus on what is important so they aren’t confused.  I’m still amazed at how relaxed, confident and authentic Ben was in every stage of the trial and how he was able to relatable to everyone, from possible jurors during the selection process to witnesses.  I already knew that the lawyers at Thuemmel Uhle and Eder were wonderful people with great admiration by other lawyers, but I didn’t realize when I hired them how good really great lawyers are.  It’s tough to put full confidence in a  lawyer or lawyers, but my lawyers came through for me.  Trust their process because they are incredibly knowledgeable.  If you have been hurt in a car accident, I highly recommend this entire firm.

I was rear ended in a motor vehicle accident in December of 2021 and suffered a neck injury. I tried months of physical therapy and eventually connected with Joel Sturm and TUE. I can not even begin to describe the level of effort and concern they put into my case. Joel was present at doctors appointments, he constantly checked on me. The thing he said over and over was "Let's get it fixed, we can worry about other stuff later." The decision to eventually undergo surgery was left to me, and what I thought was best with the advice of the doctors. There was no talk of money and no pressure to settle the claim quickly. It eventually concluded in November of 2023. When it came time to take care of things Joel did an AMAZING job. I just stayed out of his way and let him use his expertise. When he called me to tell me what the settlement was, I didn't believe him. I thought he was pulling my leg. I made him repeat it three times. The job that Joel and TUE did was incredible. I wish the accident had not happened because of the pain and suffering that it caused. Even with physical rehab and surgery I am going to have some soreness and stiffness in my neck for the rest of my life, but because of the accident I met Joel and I am so grateful to him because he worked so hard to represent me and my interests. It was a blessing that I got connected with Joel and TUE.

“While I hope you never need a personal injury attorney, if you do, I highly recommend Thuemmel, Uhle & Eder. A year and a half ago, I was hit by a car while crossing the street at an intersection. In shock, I was taken to the emergency room, where it was determined that I'd sustained a concussion and significant damage to my neck and hip.
The following day, while I was still in shock and concussed, I began receiving calls from the insurance company of the driver. Their concern for my well-being sounded genuine, but thankfully, a friend suggested i contact a lawyer.
David Eder was phenomenal right out of the gate. He immediately stepped in as my biggest, most outspoken advocate, and continues to be to this day. He placed himself between me and the insurance companies, hospital administration, and even my employer. He allowed me to focus on what I needed most; rest and recovery.
David was able to get me started on physical therapy the day after his first call, and just as importantly, he ensured that I never saw a single bill for the myriad of treatments I received.
When it was later determined that I would need spinal surgery, David again advocated passionately on my behalf. He negotiated with the surgical center, and again with the insurance companies. He continued to check in with me throughout the process, often feeling as much like a friend as a lawyer.
When I first met with David, we had to sit in the lobby because I couldn't climb the short flight of stairs to his office. Eighteen months later, I feel better now than I did before the accident, and I know that this is entirely thanks to David and his team.
I would not hesitate for a second to refer anyone to this firm. No matter your financial status, they will work with you and treat you with the respect and courtesy we all deserve.
My family and I thank you, sir.

After my car accident when I was rear-ended, I needed someone to advocate for me and guide me through the process. David Eder provided excellent advice and direction. David and his partners Ben, Andrew, and Joel worked hard on my behalf to represent my complicated case to achieve a very good settlement. In December, 2019, I was rear-ended by a large utility vehicle and had to be taken to the ER by ambulance. I had a concussion, a jaw injury and symptoms of vertebrae injury. My car was totaled. The next day, uncertain of how to proceed, I called Joel Sturm, a lawyer I knew through my work. He was immediately responsive and met with me to hear more about my situation and discuss how he could help. He was warm, friendly and personable, and I felt relieved to have someone navigating insurance company hassles, and making sure I got the medical care I needed. My medical rehab took a long time, and on one occasion Joel met with a consulting doctor to discuss the case. When my medical was complete, the insurance company lawyers demanded a deposition to interview me. Joel, and his partners Ben and David Eder, sat with me ahead of time and educated me so that I was fully prepared for that deposition. Afterwards Joel negotiated with the attorneys for the insurance companies, and did a masterful job of laying out the consequences of them not agreeing to settle for the maximum amount of money possible. They agreed to pay the full limits of the policies which was gratifying to me in that it was fair, and it acknowledged the permanent physical damage with which I live. Joel, Ben and David are very experienced at depositions and trials and I would absolutely put my confidence in them again.  I highly recommend them for their professionalism, expertise and kindness.

I was referred to Thuemmel Uhle & Eder after my mom had a great experience with this firm.  From my first consultation through the end of the case, I was always in the hands of a skilled lawyer. reviews.text:
I am writing this to file a formal complaint against Philip “SCAM” Gilbert for harassment and unethical conduct. Despite overwhelming evidence proving my niece's innocence in a hit-and-run case, this attorney has continued to pursue legal action against her for almost a year. His actions are a clear abuse of the legal system, and his relentless harassment has caused significant distress and harm to my niece.

We have alp of the documentation that irrefutably proves my niece's non-involvement in the incident, including a video before and after this “supposed” hit and run proving there has never been any damage. Moreover, her vehicle has never been involved in any accident.

I am going to request that the appropriate authorities investigate this matter and take disciplinary action against this scam artist for his unscrupulous behavior. His actions are a disgrace to the legal profession, and he should be held accountable.

I have attached a photo of his “supporting evidence” of the $10,000 claim against my niece who has already provided proof that she was at work the day and time of this made up accident that caused someone to get $10,000 work of medical treatment. 😂😂😂

IN RESPONSE:
I am posting this to express my extreme concern and disappointment regarding the handling of this situation by yourself and the Gresham PD. After reviewing the evidence provided, I am shocked and disturbed by the lack of substance and the reliance on circumstantial claims.
The attached photo of a scratch on the car is not conclusive evidence, as my niece has provided proof that the scratch was present when she purchased the vehicle. Furthermore, she has supplied evidence and witness statements from her workplace, confirming that her car and she were present at work during the alleged incident.
The police report is equally troubling, as it relies solely on the claimant's own testimony, over a phone call, and lacks concrete evidence. The report also details a long pattern of harassment by the claimant against my niece over the course of 9 months, which is unacceptable.
I am appalled that a grown man was encouraged to stalk and harass a 24-year-old female, showing up at her home and public parking lots, taking photos and videos of her and her car. This behavior is intimidating and threatening, and my niece is rightfully terrified.
I demand that you take immediate action to address this situation and ensure my niece's safety. We have been advised to seek legal counsel and will pursue all necessary measures to protect her rights.
Furthermore, the photos provided of the supposed damage are also questionable, as they show no visible damage to your claimants car. The scratch in question (pictured) is on the opposite side of the car and about 2 ft apart from top to bottom of where your claimants alleged damage is, and considering the claimant's vehicle is significantly higher off the ground than my niece's, making it unlikely that the damage occurred as claimed by my niece or  her car. I strongly advise that you reevaluate your standards after this because this is a very disturbing case with troubling implications. We will keep you posted on our next steps in this matter.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. Monaco, being a "family man" myself, at one level I can appreciate your support of your niece. Having said that, it is clear that you are not aware of all of the evidence that exists in this case; one would think that you might wait to have complete information before reaching conclusions and making the insulting comments that you have. I'm quite certain that I won't be able to change your mind, no matter what, but since you've publicly stated that you will be reporting me to the "authorities" and seeking "disciplinary action" against me, I am sure that you'll agree that it's only fair that you add to your post after you hear back from those authorities with their confirmation that there are no grounds for discipline.

Thank you.
Thank you for the five-star review, Michael.  It was our privilege to take the insurance companies on for you.

reviews.text: Phillip Gilbert was recommended to me by another client, and the recommendation was entirely well-founded. After two months and being sick of the games and my own insurance doing nearly nothing, I reached out to Mr. Gilbert. Things were started within the day despite the short notice, and he took up the mantle of fighting for what they owed me. He communicated every step of the way, provided extra details and clarity whenever I asked (which was frequent given that I’ve never been in this situation), and made sure to know what my goals were in the situation. With Mr. Gilbert handling my case, I finally received the settlement for my car and rental car reimbursement (they had initially refused me), taking an enormous weight off of me. The professionalism, communication, work ethic, and transparency he displayed were unmatched, and I’m certain that I would be nowhere near done with this fight without him. Most importantly, Mr. Gilbert made me feel heard and took the time to explain everything in a down to earth-straight to the point- no bs- way which was super helpful. During the 2 1/2 year ordeal, Mr. Gilbert or his team was in communication with me at all turns and if I reached out I would hear back within the same day. They fought for me tooth and nail and in an ethical and moral way.

In the end, it all worked out but if it wasn't for Mr. Gilbert, I would still be a hot mess and out a lot of money. Regardless, of the outcome, I would choose him again and again.

With attorneys like him still in this world, standing up for the people who can't or don't know how, is what makes this world a better place. Hands down!

reviews.text: I was feeling frustrated after several attempts to reach the insurance adjuster, so I could find care for my injuries. I was referred to the Larson office, where Monica demonstrated exceptional knowledge, professionalism, and efficiency in obtaining a prompt response from the adjuster, enabling me to settle my claim and receive necessary care. Monica went above and beyond.
They were very responsive, helpful and helped me and my family! Monica allowed me to even text her with questions or concerns. If you ask for her cell she will give it to you. Great service!!

Worst attorney ..never hire him. Unprofessional and insolent at times. Wouldn't answer my questions would say all the time  "don't you trust me"! Advised  me to not see another IME when Safeco requested that I see another one. According to Oregon law, if you don't honor that request, they have the legal right to go to Arbitration and not pay medical bills that go over 6 months! Larson didn't seem to know that! Not going to trial over my injuries cause me a loss in compensation. This should have gone to trial! He calls me up two years later and says we have to go to Arbitration not to trial! Gave me poor advice for the Deposition...I did well  I didn't listen to him. Gave me poor advice about my Arbitration. He just didn't represent me! Didnt have my records. My orthopedic physician was never mentioned! The IME Dr. Earl Duncan  failed to get the scans of my torn rotators. Attorney Larson advised me to lie to Medicare that there was no causation because there was a $32,000 lienMedicsre put onthe any award  on the award I would get! It meant that he would get paid however.   Obviously doing nothing but just sit there quietly..letting Safeco use the error filled IME to say "no causation" in the 2019 accident four-car collision and I'm the fourth car. Hurt at the scene! He knew all that. Larson knew I was going to therapy. Dr. Hanley, the orthopedist physician said that I had permanent damage and that he would have to do surgery in both arms! I did receive a reward however my medical bills or four or five times that award over the period of 3 years. The hestt of my case rotator tears.  I am a musician difficult to play. Still my viola or my accordion. I can't even tie my hair up because my arms are so damaged or put dihes in my kitchen shelves.
reviews.ownerResponse: Sally I am sorry you feel this way but most of what you say in your review is incorrect. Arbitration is mandatory and that is out of our hands. When an arbitrator makes a decision on a case that is the decision and award. Also in regards to Medicare they send us the lien and that is also out of our control and if the visits are accident related then Medicare asserts a lien.  Cases do not always go in our favor especially when they are filed in court. When a claim is less than a certain amount arbitration is what the courts make mandatory and that is where a decision is made. All of this was explained to you. Good luck and wish you the best. Take care!
