reviews.text: We were in immediate need of a lawyer to file a Petition for the Guardianship of a Minor for two precious kids who came unexpectedly into our care due to neglect. We believe we hit the jackpot when we found Kathy McCann. She hit the ground running for us and saw the case through to a victorious result, despite many hurdles along the way. Petitions for Guardianship of a Minor are relatively new in the state of Washington, and when we began the process it was difficult to find lawyers willing or knowledgeable enough to take these new case types. With her extensive family law background, Kathy researched the new requirements as needed, always ensuring she was thoroughly prepared. She is a consummate professional, well respected by her peers and the court, and as her clients, it was easy to see why. Kathy is dedicated, honest, succinct, effective and compassionate - she fought for the safety and health of these two precious minors as if they were part of her own family. Thank you, Kathy!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Valerie. Your words truly mean a great deal. It was an honor to advocate for you and for the well-being of the children in your care. reviews.text: Kathy 100% went above and beyond for a very long adoption case for our first granddaughter...now ours❤️! Kathy was extremely engaged and took LEADS , to secure our adoption via telephonically! She stays in contact in every aspect. Her Irish wit is something that definitely shines on her profession! WE WOULD HIGHLY HIGHLY HIGHLY RECOMMEND  KATHY MCCANN as an attorney to stand beside you and even in some circumstances battle for you! Amazing woman and attorney!  Absolutely amazed at everything she did and even during these very hard times... Kathy keeps pressing forward on your behalf! Thank you Kathy! The Dugan’s look forward to thanking you face to face! reviews.text: I just lost my husband so I picked this lawyer, one she's a women and that I thought she would be unstanding to me. But here's what I got: front desk said leave a VM (was someone else name, no return call. I called office again, front desk said my case is something they probably won't take and I said don't you do probate case's? The answer was yes but they were not interested!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Tonya, Please accept my apology for adding to your burden during this very sad time in your life by not returning your call.

We have a policy of returning calls or providing referrals to other legal resources if we are unable to...at the very least...by the next day. The nature of the legal business often involves deadlines and responding to emergencies. Because of the time I spend in court, or to prepare for court, sometimes, I cannot be reached directly.

Having your client sign final documents in an open reception area with others right by is not appropriate. If my case mattered, you would have sat me down in an office to actually go over the paperwork.

You knew from Day 1 I was dealing with injuries, stalking and harassment, being bullied, and being mocked for having a chronic health condition. This is what happens when you work for large corporations like NIKE. So big they dont even what is happening.

You did not explicitly say I was signing away all rights, yet the paperwork very clearly said this. If you were uncomfortable taking my case, that should have been communicated.
That is your duty to your clients.

For future clients, do your research. Don't accept poor behavior and excuses over the truth.

reviews.text: Mr. Chen and his team are a blessing. I was injured at work, and as soon as I reported missed wages to my employer's Worker's Comp Insurance company shenanigans ensued. It was already a stressful time. I had never been unable to work because of an injury. Doctor appointments every week and Physical Therapy three times a week. The insurance company were difficult to get ahold of and did not appear interested in making payments to me. After it became clear that they were slow walking my claim I became nervous that I was going to get screwed over. My union rep recommended I reach out to Mr. Bin Chen. Mr. Chen is the real deal. I wasn't sure what to expect out of the process or what he would be able to do for me, I just knew I needed help. Insurance companies are very good at making people feel helpless and that's exactly how I felt. That stopped as soon as I left Bin's office. The insurance company didn't immediately stop with the games, but Mr. Chen and his team dealt with them for me, allowing me to focus on recovering and getting myself back to work. The process took several months but Bin and his team kept me up to speed at every step. Any questions I had were answered quickly and in full. Any time I called he made time for me. These are good people. Mr. Chen's experience and expertise were on full display as my case came to a close. He was able to give probabilities of outcomes as well as their timelines and he was spot on. He clearly is known and reputable to these insurance companies. He reached a settlement on my behalf that was beyond what I thought possible. I am so grateful for Bin and his team. I work a very physical job around a lot of dangerous equipment. Everyone should get to go home the way they came in but that doesn't always happen. When people break their bodies for a job then the Insurance company should hold up their end of the bargain. They didn't with me, but Mr. Chen and his team took on my case and made things right. I trust them and will definitely reach out again if, God forbid, I'm ever in this situation again.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Brenton.  It's been a privilege to work with you.

reviews.text:
I cannot recommend Bin highly enough as a Workers’ Compensation attorney. From the very start, his and his office’s communication was exceptional. He kept me informed every step of the way, ensuring I understood the process and felt confident in the decisions we were making.

What truly stood out was how much he cared about my case. Bin took the time to understand my situation and worked to get the best possible outcome. His dedication and hard work were evident throughout the entire process.

If you’re looking for an attorney who is knowledgeable, compassionate, and relentless in pursuing justice for you, Bin is the one to call. I am incredibly grateful for his help and would recommend him to anyone in need of a Workers’ Compensation attorney.

reviews.text: I think this was a great call on my part! Need a lawyer? Come here!

Absolutely appalled by the lack of help we've received. We had to wait 5 whole years after the accident we were in for the settlement. Extremely frustrating. I suggest that if you're looking for a lawyer, search somewhere else. Not only were they unreachable by phone and didn't return calls, but the lack of compassion and understanding showed me that they did not care for anything other than the amount of money they'd get out of the case.
They do not care what lies are told and who they hurt. The real life Saul Goodmans.

George and his whole staff are very kind and considerate people. They helped me through all the confusion of the legal part of the accident. When George took my case, he said to let him handle all the legal stuff and my job was just to heal. That is exactly what he did. I would have been lost in this mess without this legal team.
George Curtis and his staff are professionals and will bring order to the chaos of an accident and personal injury. If there are finances to recover, they know how to do it and will.

I was involved in a car accident with injuries. The person who hit me fled the scene.
I didn’t know what to do first as I’ve never experienced this situation before.
Mr George Curtis and his staff immediately gave me such a peace of mind . I was so impressed with the confidence, professionalism and outstanding communication with me from start to finish.
I was beyond grateful and happy with how my case turned for the best outcome possible.
Great attorneys, the staff is always friendly and helpful. George Curtis is The best! He cares and works to get a fair settlement and is always willing to explain what is happening.
Excellent service, professional and friendly staff, honest and helpful. I personally had a great experience and I'm very happy with them. I highly recommend them.
Very impressed with the work and results that George got for me. Would highly recommend this firm .

Very kind and compassionate. Never made me feel like a bother when I needed clarification on something. Office staff always available and quick to respond. Mr. Zbinden often took the time to respond instead of leaving it up to his staff, he is very personable.
I Think I received good service overall! I wish my demand would have been Higher than it was! Man may have his plans but God will have the last word!
Very thorough and professional.

In 2019 I got hit by a drunk driver who did not have insurance, and I proceeded to have the worst couple of years of my life. When I came to George it was a result of a friend (who identifies as non binary,) referring me. I am a recovering addict with a significant mental health history and ADHD, I am not easy for an attorney because I say too much at the wrong time. George has treated me with grace, AND kindness in that he never let me harm my own case. He knew when to pull me aside he knew when to take a break and despite my mental health being weak when I started working with George, his incredible team went above and beyond to make sure that I crossed all the ts and dotted all the is.

If I’d taken the amount offered via the insurance company I would’ve had under 10k. I didn’t even try to negotiate with them however just my portion (after legal fees,) is over  4 times that. I was on Social Security disability when I came to George, I was unable to get the medical care for my injuries in Pandemic and today I’ve a big life , with a big job and I have a down payment for a house as a result of George’s representation. For me, I am someone who has had significant loss and trauma and out of this accident I am now getting more stability. I assure you this is not something I am myself thought was possible for me.

Also, well at George’s office, today, I noticed that there was someone a little disruptive, and very likely in mental health distress. Due to working in the field of behavioral health, I will absolutely watch how absolutely everyone responds. I was pleasantly surprised to see that George didn’t make a thing of it, I watched him assess the situation, ensuring everyone’s safety and then immediately continuing on. I don’t have a clue where George falls on the political spectrum But I do know as a result of his representation that I, a disabled person and a friend who identifies as queer both had improved outcomes which lead to a better quality of life.
Personal injury attorneys specifically tend to have a bad rap. Which is why I find it so vital to share that it’s not just that George got me more $ but that he’s sincerely shown himself to be a good human. At the end of the day I’m happier knowing that the attorney fees went to someone who not only earned them, but is a good person because it’s the good humans I want to see thrive most. I highly recommend his services because someone who is both a shark and proven highly moral isn’t easy to find. However, if you’re reading this, you found one too and here’s your sign this is the one you should call. I am pretty sure that my daughter who has lived in the section 8 housing with me as a disabled single parent will also agree with that sentiment when I get the keys to a house I’d never have if I’d not chosen George too.
They did an amazing job, got my settlement fast! Highly recommend! George Curtis is The Man!
Jon and his team answered all my questions and provided excellent communication through the duration of my case. I chose Jon because of his legal experience and was not disappointed.

I had a very tough case- 4 car pile up and it happened right before Covid so everything was insane! George is a fighter! Him and his team worked so hard for me and were always available for any of my questions! They were amazing at communication, sent me copies and updates of everything along the way! Best decision I made was to hire him and take the stress off myself!

George is very professional, courteous, helpful and to the point. He’s the best in my book! His office (or himself) always returned my phone calls, and he always answered my emails. Always kept me up to date on my case.
I’d recommend him to anyone. If I ever need George in the future (hopefully I won’t LOL) he will be the first person I call.
Thank you George!

I have now been working with George Curtis for the last three years and I can tell you that while this process takes a long time overall - George made my experience amazing! He heard my concerns, validated my experiences and told me what I could realistically expect out of my situation. While it wasn't exactly what I hoped - that was out of his control. George was outstanding in his communication methods and kept me in the loop best that he and his paralegals could. I worked closely with Elda as well and had a pleasant experience working along side her too. I will be returning to Zbinden and Curtis for any future legal needs they can help me with!! THANK YOU GEORGE!!

I was hurt in a car accident. Chose an attorney online thru Google reviews and it seemed they were too busy to be in touch or work on my case. Months had gone by and a friend recommended George Curtis. I called, we spoke on the phone and I was in his office for a 2+ hr consult the next evening. He worked till almost 8pm to work around my schedule. He was accessible the same day if I needed to talk to him, throughout the entirety of my case. He is a real go getter, stayed in touch as the case progressed, super funny, and fought like hell to get me every penny he could! And then fought harder! Highly recommend! Truly THE BEST! Thanks George!

I appreciate the clarity & transparencies of each communication
between Jon and I. He was exceedingly kind and I feel He and his staff did their due diligence to assist a WIN on my case. I was treated with respect in any form of communication I had with his office. I would get a call from Jon on any updates regarding my case as soon as he got them.
Fun Fact;  His staff was fantastic, I gave them 6******!!

Working with George Curtis was one of the best business  experiences I’ve had.

When I was trying to decide if I would retain his services, some of the questions I asked included whether or not he would be available to me, personally, every time I called to talk with him or if I was going to be pushed off to somebody else. He guaranteed me that he would be working directly with me and be available when I called. His word was true! In addition to that, he was very professional and was able to achieve exactly what I requested as an outcome for my claim!

I would never hesitate to work with George  again. I recommend anybody that needs legal assistance, he is someone you should work with.

George Curtis is the worst attorney. He was yelling at me because I’m under a lot of stress and have told my story multiple times so I was struggling getting my facts straight and he literally was just yelling. I don’t recommend at all.
Professional services very nice and understanding Mr.Curtis was amazing to work with thank you so much
Working with Zbinden & Curtis was a great experience. They made all my worries end once they took my case. Walked me through detail of my case all the way to the end.

However, he wasn’t the first lawyer I spoke with about my case and I believe the case was too difficult for him. He clearly didn’t want to do the work and wanted to put it all on me. They’ll put more stress on you than make you feel like they actually want to help you. HIGHLY UNPROFESSIONAL and POOR QUALITY.

Awful service and how they speck to people is not okay and to hang up on someone was Evan more rude. Especially given the difficult situation people are in. I give em stars on the sole fact they allowed me to switch my attorney   I was  extremely insulted by the way Mr. Curtis spoke to me with biasy and with tears in my eyes continued to tell me my concerns were not his problem  I don't recommend George  CURTIS HE'S  VERY COCKY

I will say  I HAVE NOT MET MR. ZBINDEN.
Marla is very nice  wonderful and quick to call back

Was in an auto accident in 2001.  Mr. Curtis came to my home.  After that I received no help as to what services were available to me .I didn't know how to proceed and they were not helping me.  I contacted another attorney who gave me some great information.  I tried to pay him, but he wouldn't accept it.  Long story short, Zbinden and Curtis negotiated a settlement of $13,000.  I fired them at that time and proceeded forward on my own.  My settlement was $100,000 + they paid all my medical bills.  If I could rate them a zero, I would.  They obviously have not improved since 2001 and it is now 2020.

Best  there is. Professional, and smart. I would recommend them to anyone. Treated me like family. I felt comfortable working with them.  I could tell they are on your side, not insurances. They helped my dad with a case that no other firm could do it. If you want to win your case and as fast as possible.  Contact them!

I was involved in a car accident and the other party was at fault. When I spoke with their insurance company it was apparent I would need someone to help me. I remembered commercials advertising Zbinden & Curtis from when I was younger so I figured I would reach out to them and see if it would be a good fit.

I sat down and spoke with George Curtis about what happened, what was going on with me, and how to proceed. He made me feel very comfortable and his office was very accommodating.

I had a costly auto repair and heavy medical bills from exams, emergency room visit, and neck surgery. They were by my side the whole way and their main concern was how I was feeling and doing, not wanting to resolve the case. When I was ready they moved forward and helped get me a resolution that was fair and would help me for future medical bills. I will be forever thankful for all their help in this matter and recommend them to anyone that needs help or just needs to sit down and figure out if it will work for them. The whole staff was very friendly and I appreciate all their efforts! Thank you Mr. Curtis, Dominique, Elda, and everyone. It was a nice and comfortable experience and took away a lot of stress dealing with everything.
Jon zbinden is an amazing attorney. He helped me with my first car accident and made sure I was taken care of. The staff is wonderful. This is a very helpful law office. Definitely recommend

reviews.text: Every published number website and Facebook, is disconnected.

So after I told the woman Amber I no longer felt comfortable with call and hung up . Because the call was very scripted and didn’t seem authentic. Yet as other reviews here stated no follow through! I’ve still yet to get anything from them ! So I have found another place to help me who is actually local and appreciates the business far more .

Would not recommend.
The only time they respond in a timely manner is when I told them I was going to pay them off because I didn't want to deal with direct draft. They also waited until the last minute to anything, lost some of my documents, and threaten to throw out my case because it was Christmas and I was out of town and unable to sign their documents right that second. I was also really sick with the flu. (Bedridden sick.)
They won't even give me a receipt for paying them off. So that will probably come back to haunt me. Keeping all my records though so if they try to come after me because they didn't record my payment I am prepared. They also said they would help bring my credit back up, (that's why I picked them) and they haven't done anything of the sort.

team

They called me a week later to let me know that my appointment was reschedule for 12/03, one hour later
I explained I had only 45 minutes break they said it will be plenty of time
Today I was in the zoom meeting since 12:55, nothing until 1:15 when I called them to let them know I was waiting there since 12:55
"Zoom problems"
They wanted to reschedule for next week for me to go to their office in Vancouver to have another online meeting

reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Edy,

You are correct, we had to reschedule your appointment because of a health condition. We tried to give you as much notice as possible, and we apologize again. We contacted you to book a new appointment as soon as possible (the next day).

In that appointment zoom was experiencing some issues. I personally called you and spoke to you and explained the issues we were having, and I offered to continue and answer any question you had on the phone or in the alternative, a new zoom date and time.

You expressed that you wanted to meet in person. I offered to book an appointment in the office where we have our staff to assist you and help with any technical issues. you declined that as well. Instead, You wanted to reschedule the zoom meeting I gave you on next available time which I had just offered.

Your preference was to cancel. We tried to best accommodate your schedule and assist you in any way we could. Our sincere apologies for not being able to do so.

Thank you.

reviews.text:
Highly recommend Geordie! He was professional, extremely knowledgeable, and helped me win my case.

He gave me space to speak in the arbitration which allowed me to share my statements and get closure.

He trusted me as a client which is big. This case was challenging and he crushed it. Would totally refer anyone else to him.

He really helped me get my agency back after an unspeakable tragedy.

Mr Geordie, was very personable and professional representative that my wife and I could have asked for. He spent a lot more time than the 30 minutes (free for 30 minutes) consultation detailing answers to all of our questions, and was always reachable, informative. We were successful with his help in our case! Thank you again for your professionalism .
We recently engaged Mr. Duckler regarding a challenging case involving a large corporation. Mr. Duckler always treated our situation with both a high degree of compassion, knowledge and skill.
This has been a great Company to work with.  They are quick to respond, always friendly, and we have great success collecting their past due accounts.   I must give them a 5 start review.
Geordie Duckler did an outstanding job with our case, I would definitely recommend!  Very Satisfied!

Geordie was the most personable, accountable, and professional representative I could have asked for. He spent an hour and a half in our first (free for 30 minutes) consultation detailing answers to all of my questions, and was always reachable, informative and encompassing of my opinion as time progressed. Moreover, his office staff were always responsive and very respect. I could not recommend his services more.

I cannot express my gratitude for Geordie and his team more. My husband and I were being sued by a predatory animal sanctuary in Oregon for having to rehome our alpacas because they attacked our daughter. From
our first phone call with Geordie he gave us such confidence and calmed our spirits. He fought for us and was such a shark that he got the sanctuary to drop the case completely because they knew they couldn’t win against him. We are so thankful we found such an amazing lawyer with such expertise in animal law.
What a guy, very professional and very kind, to the point, and takes care of business.

Mr. Duckler had been the attorney of record for my non profit animal rescue over many years. He has represented our rescue on numerous occasions for many reasons and in different types of situations in multiple counties and states in the country. He has always been very upfront and explained everything in detail. He is caring and kind, but most importantly he is extremely well versed in animal law and takes time to explain things in the way that hits home.
We also appreciate his timely responses and attention to detail, which always includes caring for our financial well-being. He listens and hears.
We are very happy with his professional services and caring personal attitude.
We would recommend Geordie Duckler to anyone who is seeking representation and/or advice on animal related legal issues, disputes, defense, on city, county, state and federal level.

I was very worried I would not see my dog ever again, not only did Geordie understand my frustration he set me at ease and his team kept me updated and when it came time for court it was like he knew what to d so I would get my dog back to me ASAP. Thank you so much guys!!!!!

I honestly can’t believe that I won as much as I did. He is so easy going and so helpful explaining things, super professional, very laid back and non confrontational. But don’t let that fool you! He is professional and to the point in the courtroom. Very polite.
Definitely would recommend to anyone!
He is a good lawyer and advocate

Geordie was retained by myself to represent a friend in a pet custody case. Communication was excellent, case was resolved quickly with great success and have referred him to anyone in need.
It’s sad these catty juvenile reviews have been left out of spite due to their own negligence and research.
If you want an ambulance chaser to get you money from an accident then don’t retain a specialist in pet law. Smh...

Mr. Duckler handled a dissolution of partnership between my stepdaughter, Laura Shaw and myself in a dog breeding business. He did so intelligently and with the competence that only comes from being an expert in his field of law.  What I appreciate most about Mr. Duckler is that he would allow me to vent, but then he would help me remove emotion and proceed within the law. Not just knee-jerk reactions. Laura Shaw's review of Mr. Duckler is without merit and simply sour grapes on her part. She claims she was tricked into signing documents by Mr. Duckler. However her attorney was sitting right next to her. He reviewed the settlement agreement and instructed her to sign it as written.  In our settlement conference we discussed the documents were to be held, but it did NOT make it into the final settlement. Laura's oldest daughter's therapist  has labeled Laura as a Narcissist. She is much more than that. She is a stalker and will stop at nothing to cause damage to those that do not "bend the knee" to her will.  Her father and I are very glad to have her out of our lives.  If you are reading reviews in order to decide upon an attorney to hire, you will be well served to hire Mr. Geordie Duckler @ The Animal Law Practice.

Mr Duckler was the attorney in a recent lawsuit were his client sued me for our co-owned dogs.  We came to a settlement agreement and as part of this settlement I signed all the co-owned dogs AKC papers and mr Duckler agreed to hold the papers and only give them to his client after I received a pick of the litter puppy for each female and a stud litter out of each male.

Mr Duckler did not follow the agreement and without notice gave his client Jeanine Stewart the signed AKC papers and she's put them in her name without me receiving a pick of the litter puppy.

I believe he tricked me into signing the papers with promises

Geordie handled a case for us where all 3 of our pets died from toxic chew bones. From the beginning, he stepped us through what was needed and handled the negotiating with the chew bone manufacturer excellently. We would highly recommend him for any situation regarding your pets.

Worst experience ever! Hired for an MVA that he clearly was unqualified for. After several months the only thing he got was for pain and suffering. He doesn't know how to negotiate, just simply told them my bare minimum, which of course they accepted. Screwed me out of $2000 worth of lost wages by misleading me as to what all I was agreeing to. He charges for every little thing on top of his percentage (not agreed to). Seriously, he charges for making copies! Copies he doesn't need to make because he should be emailing this stuff in the first place. It costs me half a cent to make a copy myself. He tried to push through paperwork agreeing to less than half my actual repair costs. It took over a year and I actually was the one who got my insurance company to pay for the repairs, in full. So he didn't even handle the basics of the case. He acted as if my insurance company didn't have to pay my medical bills too. Yes, they do. They have to pay up to $15,000 for ANY  accident regardless of fault. They weren't doing me any favors, it's what they're required to do. Terrible at communication and clearly was out of his element. He was paid thousands and wasn't worth one penny. The entire purpose of hiring him was to get my insurance company to accept the claim under my uninsured policy so I could get my car fixed quickly. Total incompetence. Lack of details from the other reviews makes me think they are fake.
World's greatest animal law ATTORNEY
The absolute best attorney ever! Highly recommend this man!

What an incredible office. Eileen O’Reilly and her team worked very hard for my case. I especially thank Irina ,she’s a paralegal on the team for working diligently to get me a good settlement. Provided excellent guidance and support. They give excellent doctor referrals , doctors who care for your well being. excellent response time and care for their customers to be made whole after traumatic experiences. Thank you team sincerely from the bottom of my heart
The team here is amazing. I got the most payout and everything was done quickly and professionally I highly recommend!
Attorney Eileen and her team are awesome and did a good settlement on my case ...I absolutely recommended her team to everyone

Eileen and her team have been an absolute godsend to work with. She has handled my case with compassion, patience, straight talk and a wealth of knowledge. My personal injury settlement was a difficult one with a few factors that could have really hurt my award amount. Eileen and her staff worked hard to get everything that was coming to me. I would highly recommend her office! They are amazing!!

Eileen O'Reilly is the finest personal injury attorney that I have ever known. Her background includes having worked on both sides of the insurance industry, which leaves her uniquely qualified in the arena of personal injury claims. She is an intelligent and elegant human being who covers all the bases for you as a client. Two years ago while my wife and I were returning home from grocery shopping, we were hit head on by an uninsured motorist. We were both injured, a police officer was behind us and our safety camera recorded the incident. The at fault driver lied to the police officer and said she had USAA insurance, which is our insurance. Luckily we have an uninsured motorist policy. In the end Eileen was able to secure two settlements for us that produced larger than expected dollar amounts. We both highly recommend Eileen O'Reilly to any person requiring the representation of a personal injury attorney.
Eileen is a great attorney. Her office was on top of things. I would definitely recommend this firm!

I am so grateful to Eileen O’Reilly and her associates for how easily they handled my case! I was rear ended in May 2021 and tried to handle everything myself… and I failed. I was incredibly overwhelmed, so I decided to hire an attorney. Eileen took on my case, and that was it! Within the year my case was closed and I got a great settlement! Any time someone asks me about legal help, I will always refer them to O’Reilly Law Offices. Thanks again Eileen! You’re the best!

I thought they did a fantastic job. Story goes... I was involved in an accident that was not my fault. My first major accident in my life. I had no idea how to go about this whole process. Was told to find a lawyer immediately and was referred to these folks to take care of me. Took 2 years to get anything but I suspect that's not the law firm that's just these stupid insurance people and medical industry that take forever to release records and such. Finally reached a settlement and I certainly felt like they fought to get every penny. Of course it benefits them to get more as they get their cut, but I like that and appreciate that to ensure I get top dollar. They did a great job. Good communication, and very kind over the phone I really appreciate that.
Amazing communication, even before and after the pandemic there was still effort being put into my case and I am beyond relieved that she was able to help me. Definitely know who to go to again ❤️
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Mariah!

reviews.text: best attorney in town

Eileen O'Reilly is ALWAYS my first referral for friends in need of a family attorney.  She also is an expert in Immigration and Criminal cases, which her reputation amongst our community is stellar.  She has helped over 5 of my personal referrals with success in their personal legal cases.  Eileen's approach is an expert professional, while maintaining close touch and personability throughout the case.

I have hired Eileen on a couple of different occasions, both which she helped me receive the most prompt and successful results.
A great team that really cares about their clients!
Happy with the results of choosing Pickett Dummigan!
I'm very happy with the services of my lawyer Berendan and Verónica, who were very kind. I will recommend them to everyone. Thank you.

Kimberly is a thoughtful, skilled advocate who is deeply committed to pursuing justice for injured people and their families. She brings strong courtroom insight, careful preparation, and genuine care to her work. Kimberly is also an engaged member of the legal and local community, which reflects the integrity and values she brings to her practice. I highly recommend her.
Kim Weingart is truly exceptional.  She cares about her clients, and fights hard for them.  She is unstoppable in trial, and a fierce attorney in every regard.

Had a great experience working with Chris and Brittanie for a favorable outcome after an injury. Great folks to work with when you are in need! Thank you and your team for your attentiveness and hard work!

I am so grateful to work with Kim on a regular basis.  She elevates every team and project she joins.  She is an absolutely brilliant, unstoppable force when it comes to representation but is wholly genuine, compassionate and ego free on a personal level.  I would unhesitatingly recommend her.

Working with Samantha and Kim was easier and much more enjoyable than any legal matter I've ever encountered. They were incredibly well organized, highly communicative and so good at explaining everything and preparing me for every step of the way, whether it be mediation, deposition, negotiation, etc.  I felt like I had an All-Star Team behind me. Truly, they blew away all of my expectations. I'm eternally grateful for both, Samantha, Kim and the whole firm.

Pickett Dumigan Weingart is a best in class legal team you will want to work with.

When people think lawyer, many things come to mind. After my husband’s accident we felt lost and confused about what to do and where to turn for help. Everything was new and different from our normal day to day, and we were struggling to grasp this new world. But from our first phone call to the offices of Pickett Dumigan Weingart that found us speaking with Gary Pickett, it was clear they truly care about the people they work with and intimately know the law that protected our rights. It was as if we had found family who would take our hand and guide us through this complicated process. They were always by our side, explaining what we needed to know, easing us through each step to ensure they had what they needed to do their best work for us, and that our questions were always answered. They used their expertise to achieve best outcomes on our behalf. We couldn’t have been in better hands and are so thankful to have found a team that made us and our well being a priority.

A sincere thank you to our team, Kim Weingart, Kyle Sharp, Amanda Fitzhenry, Rachel Kacalek, Maura Wood, Gary Pickett, and all of those at the law firm involved in our case that I have missed naming.

If you find yourself in a position to need legal representation related to personal injury, for your best results, you must reach out to the offices of Pickett Dumigan Weingart.

- Andres and Michele Galvan
Kimberly Weingart is one of the best lawyers in Portland.  She works hard, takes her cases to trial, and gets results.  This is because she cares for her clients and gives them her best.

Kim is incredibly intelligent and truly went above and beyond for my case. She and Kyle kept me informed the whole way and always had my best interest at heart. After years of fighting and multiple mediations, Kim stood by me through trial and delivered the results we hoped for. I highly recommend this firm to anyone who wants attorneys who truly care and fight for you.
Excellent service
I worked with Deena and Kim and I had a wonderful experience the entire way through. They were so helpful and supportive. I highly reccomend their skills.

I had an amazing experience working with Brendan Dummigan—so professional, yet incredibly down-to-earth. He and his team supported me through such a challenging time, and I truly couldn’t have done it without them. A special shoutout to Rachel Heppner, who was an incredible paralegal and always there when I needed help. I 100% recommend this law firm!

We can't say enough good things about Kimberly Weingart and her associates. They were thorough, professional and easy to work with. We had little to no hope of getting reimbursed for medical expenses from a fall that resulted in my hip getting fractured. She was able to get us a fair settlement. We will always be grateful and highly recommend her and her exceptional team.
Kimberly Weingart and her associates were very helpful and professional. They put a great deal of effort into resolving our issue, and we were very satisfied with the outcome.

I had a great experience. My representative was very knowledgeable and understood my situation. It was very easy and required little effort on my part. I would recommend this law firm to anybody that was in need of their services
PDW LLP is wonderful. Totally professional, very personal and incredibly knowledgeable. I would recommend this firm 100% with zero hesitation.

I had the misfortune of being rear ended and flipped over into the ditch in a MVA in the summer of 2021. My Toyota was totally crushed on every angle -top, sides, back, front, underneath from 3 high speed impacts from being rear ended, being spun and crashing again backwards onto Big boulders in the ditch, making second impact cause the car to fly up in the air and flip upside down for a third crash onto more big boulders in the ditch. It was a miracle to regain consciousness and slowly crawl out of the wreck and have TBI level 2 concussion and whip lash soft tissue trauma to my neck and spine. The crash was caught on the security cameras of the nursery that I was going to so the video showed the time of when I was rear ended by an elderly person going at speeding velocity and the minute and a half before I started to regain consciousness and help was arriving to assist me out of the vehicle. I am so lucky that I didn’t die of a brain bleed or smashed internal organs. Brain bruising, swelling, sensitivity to light and sound, and need to rest for months to let the brain slowly heal is an ordeal to get through. Premature jostling of a bruised concussed brain can lead to long term damage like early onset Alzheimer’s. Soft tissue trauma to the spine from being whipped around with three high speed crash impacts was challenging to slowly and gradually recover from.  A friend referred me to Kimberly Weingart and I am grateful for her legal support negotiating with the insurance companies to obtain a decent settlement compensation for my losses and injuries. I could focus on the big job of healing when I could trust her skillfulness in negotiating for me. She was excellent in compassionate listening, attention to detail, communication with me to work together on strategy for important choices and positive diplomatic focus for most favorable outcomes. Ethics of personal integrity are so important in sticking up for oneself for the hard work of recovering from traumatic injury and loss. Insurance companies are like sharks to try to weasel out of fair compensation for a person’s medical trauma. Kim was great with being diplomatic and tough, fighting for me and keeping my recovery and wellbeing as number one priority. I highly recommend her. I turned 65 during this so Kim also did a great job navigating red tape in advocating for me and negotiating with Medicare and Medicaid about both my rights and their rights in regards to medical compensation for accidents.

A family member referred me to Kim Weingart and she was able to take my case with very little notice. I found the firm and Kim kind, professional, and efficient. This was nothing like the corporate, impersonal lawyering I’ve received from personal injury attorneys in my past.

I cannot say enough positive things about the exceptional advocacy Kimberly Weingart provided following an accident last year. Her combination of empathy and skill showed me her human understanding of my circumstances while maximizing the outcome on my behalf. There are many choices for attorneys in this area of law, but few can strike the balance of compassion and tenacity that Ms. Weingart achieves.

Very much am thankful for Pickett Dummigan LLP. Caring for my best interest & well being. I am grateful to feel safe, heard, & respected. It's a nice change of pace to have people that are so supportive- In my cases I felt well guided as well as protected. I couldn't rave about the lovely people more. 🩷🩷🩷

Deena and Brendan were excellent! They were professional and I felt comfortable enough to explain my situation. Throughout this experience Deena kept in close contact guiding me through the process and helping answer my questions in a timely manner. I felt genuinely cared about.
Thank you guys for all your hard work!

As a client with a very complex injury case Randy and his team stayed dedicated and honored my side to the best efforts possible. They went above and beyond! I can't appreciate them enough for everything. It was worth the wait and I can now say "I can see the light of day and move forward from this now." All thanks to Randy and his team.

Thank you.

I recently had the pleasure of working with Pickett Dummigan Weingart LLP after a car accident left me with injuries. From the start, the entire team was professional, compassionate, and dedicated to helping me obtain the best possible settlement and compensation for my injuries.

The legal process can be time-consuming and complex, but Mr. Brendan and his team guided me through every step with patience and expertise. They consistently kept me informed of the progress on my case, and I never felt out of the loop or overwhelmed.

I am incredibly grateful for the help and support I received from Pickett Dummigan Weingart LLP. Their commitment to my case and to recovering my rights made all the difference. I highly recommend this law firm to anyone in need of exceptional legal representation.

Abdul

I had a really good experience with the attorneys at Pickett and Dummigan. They held on for years fighting through Covid to get the best possible outcome financially for my workplace injury. These are kind, hardworking attorneys that won’t take more than what you receive and fight to get you as much of a return as possible. So if you’re looking for great attorneys that you can trust for your injury claim these are the folks you should call.

Vanessa
compassion real

I had the pleasure of working with Deena at PDM. She and the team at PDM worked tirelessly and extremely thoroughly to help me get to my final settlement. She walked me through every aspect of what to expect as the case progressed which eased my mind. She and the team are very professional, courteous and friendly. They were my best advocate. I can’t say enough good things about my good experience with Deena and PDM. Based on my experience I highly recommend PDM!

DEENA HELPED ME OUT WITH A CAR ACCIDENT THAT I HAD. THE FIRM SHE WORKS FOR ARE VERY FRIENDLY AND ATTENTIVE WITH CASES. I CANT THANK DEENA AND HER LAW FIRM FOR THE HELP AND SUPPORT I NEEDED.

THANK YOU ALL AND GOD BLESS
Brendan and his staff went above and beyond to ensure that I was taken care of. As someone in the legal field myself, I can confidently say that they land in the top 10% of plaintiff’s firms.
A great legal representation. Deena was instrumental in approaching this in the most professional manner possible.

I'm very appreciative of Kim and Randys help over a long 5 years! It was a long time they had to deal with my case, but they made me feel understood and comfortable the whole time. I felt that they genuinely had my best interest at heart from the beginning to the end. I could say a lot of great things about these two, but that'd be 5 years worth of good things to say! I would recommened Kim and Randy to my family and friends. I know I would definetly reach out to Kim and Randy again if I ever needed any legal help again!

This is the second time I have worked with Pickett Dummigan McCall LLP and both times I have had a wonderful experience. I worked specifically with Kim Weingart and her team and her work with both of my cases was unmatched. As most people will at some point have to work with a lawyer at some point.  This experience was professional honest dependable and this firm advocated for me against a big powerful company. They worked hard to resolve or case.

They were very professional and hard working on my case from the very start They handled everything the correct way with efficiency and Some creativity.. I recommend them for   Any case that is out there . 5 stars all the way, especially for Kimberly!
Hi had the pleasure of working with Deena regarding a malpractice incident. Deena was on top of it in every way! The case was settled with a wonderful outcome. I highly recommend her.

Was represented by Kim Weingart in a personal injury claim. Really appreciated how she set expectations and guided me through the process. Was really nice to feel as though my interests and feelings had priority.

PDM legal was recommended to me by a family member.  They were outstanding to work with. At times I had a hard time talking because of an injury. Everyone at PDM treated me with respect and always gave me the time I needed to get my words out when I talked with them. Sometimes my family had to communicate with PDM for me and it was extremely nice working with a legal firm that understood the situation and made things very easy. Thank you Randy, Kim, Kyle and staff for the privilege of getting to know you and work with you. All of you did an outstanding job in my opinion!

I got referred by one of my clients who is an attorney to Pickett Dummigan law firm. Deena Sajitharan was my attorney and she’s very through and honest  at what she does. She’s there when you need her and she’s committed to excellence. I highly recommend Deena if you’re looking for a dedicated attorney.

Kristen McCall represented our family in our Mother's wrongful death claim. She walked us through the legal process and set realistic expectations for us.  Despite the limitations of COVID, Kristen did an excellent job communicating with us and keeping us informed as the case proceeded.  She was very supportive and empathetic and fought like a pit bull for us. We would also like to thank her support team, especially Travis Cody.

Without any hesitation I give this exceptional firm, and employees, my very highest recommendations! Brendan is an amazingly talented, caring and experienced  lawyer who makes you feel like you are a friend...never known a lawyer like him...ever! Deena also a very talented lawyer has the gift of joy...she can make you laugh at any moment, and yet have your back 110%! Brittanie, was an absolute pleasure to work with on many, many tasks! I will highly recommend these upper deck professionals to anyone searching for genuine help, support and competence! Like the commercial says, I've now found a friend in the legal profession!!🤔😃👏💯

I had a great experience with Pickett Dummigan! Deena Sajitharan was my lawyer and she was so helpful. Dina was very responsive, thorough, and always willing to follow up to make sure we were both on the same page with my case. She kept a positive outlook on my case the whole time, even when I was unsure what the outcome may be and we won! 100% would recommend Dina, she’s the best!

Shangar Meman represented my husband and I in a personal injury claim. She was very knowledgeable professional and attentive throughout the process. She took extra time to inform of us of each step and how the process would unfold. When we had questions she was always available by phone or email and responded to any request promptly. One thing I noticed is she knew when my husband and I were apprehensive and knew just what we needed to help us. She is amazing and I would highly recommend her for any legal/attorney needs in the future.
I would recommend them for sure 100% They speak Spanish and English. All the employees are very nice helpful. Thank you guys for everything 🙂Best Team.

I had a small case and contacted multiple law offices, but none were willing to take on my case.  I was about to give up when a friend of mine referred me to Pickett Dummigan McCall.  This law firm was the only one willing to take on my case and I am eternally grateful.

I had the absolute pleasure of working with Deena.  Words cannot express the amount of gratitude I have for her.  I would love to sing her praises on this review, but there is not enough real estate on this page.  She is the most genuine, hardworking, and down-to-earth person you could ever meet.  She went to bat for me and won my case.

If you’re “web browsing” and reading various reviews in search of a law firm, you’ve came to the right place.  Please call Pickett Dummigan McCall and ask for Deena.  She’ll take good care of you….I promise!!!

highly recommend Apolinar and his team to anyone in need of legal support. Apolinar is a trustworthy, empathetic, and passionate attorney who truly cares about his clients. Over the years, he has helped me review and draft contracts for my nonprofit organization, always providing transparent communication and prompt responses.

You never have to worry about whether he’ll return your call or answer your questions—he always does. Apolinar ensures that you feel comfortable and seen throughout the entire process, which says a lot about his character. Not only have I had a great experience working with him, but everyone I’ve referred to him has shared the same positive feedback. I couldn’t recommend Apolinar and his team more highly.
Thank you, attorney Lourdes Sanchez, and your team for your great service and excellent work. I highly recommend you. Blessings.

I would highly recommend Apolinar for anyone in need of a trustworthy and compassionate lawyer who can get the job done well. He helped me with my motor vehicle case where I sustained property damage and bodily injuries and went above and beyond throughout the entire process. He took the time to explain everything in clear, simple terms, making sure I understood each step. His empathy, patience, and genuine care for his clients stand out, you can tell that he genuinely wants to help out with whatever situation you’re dealing with. He’s incredibly thorough, knowledgeable, and dedicated to achieving the best possible outcome. I wouldn’t hesitate to seek his guidance again in the future if needed. Apollo is exactly the kind of lawyer you’d be lucky to come across.

Absolutely loved working with Apolinar and his team! He was referred by family and not only was he very knowledgable and helpful during my case, but he was such a friendly genuine person to be around and work with! Eulalia was very kind and friendly during the call.

Eulalia is heaven sent! I heard of her from my cousin who used her services for her husband's green card. Eulalia helped me with my mother, my father, and most recently my husband. She is so humble, knowledgeable, caring and invested in her clients. She cares about her clients and the immigrant community. We felt safe and heard with her. She gets things done quick and she gets things done right! I am forever grateful to have found such a good lawyer for my family. I will always recommend her to everyone I know.
I was very impressed with the attention detail and care the Lawyer took with my case. She truly went above and beyond. I highly recommend anyone to her. Thank you!

I'm very grateful to them! Eulalia and Mauricio are always on top of your paperwork and have accurate information. They settled my family in less than a year. They're now here legally, thanks to them. I recommend them 100%. Eulalia studies your cases very well. Talk to her and make an appointment.
The best immigration lawyer! I applied for residency and citizenship with her, as did my children. Very professional, honest, and respectful. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!
Good lawyer
Eulalia Soto, Attorney. Very professional and working for the community.

I have been working with Eulalia Soto for the past 4 years and she has always been very professional and listened to my concerns. I am very grateful that I hired her to help me with my parent’s petitions. I was pleased with the work of Eulalia, she is an excellent attorney who cares for your case. I am glad that I found her because, during the entire immigration process of my parents, she was very diligent. My family felt safe and we knew that Eulalia would take care of anything that came up during the process.
Even though our immigration process was very stressful, having her as our attorney was a relief. Every time I had a question she was very helpful and explained very clearly the process of my parents' case. I believe it is very important to hire an attorney with a lot  of experience and Eulalia Soto has proven that she is capable and an expert in immigration cases. I have recommended her office to other people because I believe she is one of the best attorneys in the area.
Excellent

I highly recommend to Eulalia Soto! I want to thank Eulalia for everything she had done for my family. She help my Husband  with his case when he had a zero chance of winning it but never gave up on this case. Then I came back for her to help me with my case in less than a 8 month I got my green card I really appreciate everything she has done and because of her I feel that my family got another opportunity and I feel safe in this country thank you so much I really appreciate you and may God bless you and your family!!!

Don't waste your time and money! I would definitely pay attention to the negative reviews here. She was supposed to represent my mom, not just take her money.
She was fully aware of my mom's background and yet had the audacity to lie to the USCIS, thereby causing more problems for my mom's case. Like the other comment said, if you are looking for someone to take your money, misrepresent you, and just waste your time, this is your lawyer.
This lawyer is useless; don't waste your time or money. I would definitely pay attention to the other comments here. She lies to the USCIS and takes your money. If you have money to lose or want to give away and want to waste your time, this is the lawyer for you. Please be careful. She only answers the phone when you are first using her services, but after that, she is always "busy," but she is very quick to charge you.
Lawyer Eulalia has excellent customer service, and Is a Amazing Lawyer

I highly recommend, Eulalia Soto Law office! She has helped many Washington and Oregon State Residents with cases regarding Immigration Law. Her honesty, professionalism, integrity, and hard work put her above the rest!. I love her compassion in serving our community and how she always finds ways to also volunteer! I wish her the best and many years if successful service!

Roberto
Very good

If you're in a hurry because they're taking your money and not getting anything resolved, this lady will take care of it...

MAN came through for me when no other attorneys wanted to help me. His team made sure i was up to date and explained each step of the process throughout my case. I would reccomend him to anyone. He will make sure you are taken care of.

Man and his team were amazing! They helped me with my car accident and $2,500 citation. Everyone was so warm and professional - they even remembered my birthday and wished me a happy one! Man explained everything clearly and got great results for my case. Highly recommend if you need a lawyer who actually cares about their clients.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
I had a great experience working with Man Vu. He was extremely helpful with my car accident case earlier this year and went above and beyond to make sure everything was taken care of. He was professional, responsive, and truly cared about my situation. I highly recommend him to anyone in need of a dedicated and trustworthy attorney!

The Jade Law Group went above and beyond for me. Man Vu and his team treated me like family and made sure I always knew what was happening with my case. I know for many people, it feels uneasy to see nothing happening to their cases, but it’s the nature of the process. I found out being patient and reaching out within a reasonable amount of time is the best thing, like giving it a few weeks before checking in. I did not have to worry about my case at all because I know his team works hard to push my case forward. I do find keeping in touch with your attorney is a good thing because they can help guide you through the process, and the more information that they have, the smoother the case goes along.

When I got rear-ended and the other driver took off, Man came to my rescue and gave me alot of insightful attorney advice. I took that advice and he squeezed every dollar from the insurance company. Thank you!

I could say so many good things about Man Vu and his incredible team. After being turned away by several attorneys who said my work comp case was "too difficult" or "not worth the fight" I found Man Vu.

From the very first consultation, Man Vu treated me with compassion and respect. He took the time to listen to my concerns, understand the details, and explain every step of the process clearly.

The entire staff at was amazing—always professional, kind, and quick to respond to any questions I had. They truly care about their clients and made me feel supported throughout the entire journey.

Man Vu fought hard for me and secured a result that I never thought was possible. Thanks to his dedication and skill, I finally received the compensation I deserved.

If you're looking for an attorney who will stand by you when no one else will, I wholeheartedly recommend Man Vu. He is not only an outstanding lawyer but also a genuine advocate who truly cares about his clients. I am so grateful for everything he and his team have done for me.
Amazing Attorney! No confusion what’s so ever with the process after the accident and was prompt about responding to all of my questions. :)

I had to leave a comment since i saw some other reviews. He was honest and straight forward.  He under promised and over delivered.

Glad I found him and would recommend him.

I was the passenger in a car accident where fault doesn’t matter In my case because I wasn’t the driver of either car, I appointed Man M Vu as my attorney to represent me in this case only a few days after the accident. It has now been two years since the accident and I can honestly say I’ve probably spoke to Man 10 times maybe even less. I would call and text him and It would be 3-4 months at a time that I would hear from him. I understand with covid that things move a lot slower but this is not the service that I was expecting nor what I was promised. I’m by no means any sort of lawyer or a law major at all, but it doesn’t take a genius to see that this is not how a lawyer should go about representing someone and I definitely don’t think a professional would make promises without knowing that those promises are realistic or accurate. When it’s all said and done I do not feel properly and professionally represented in this case and I now wonder if I just waisted 2+ years of waiting on the wrong person to help me.
Didn't like the process that I experienced with them on my case. I feel ripoff, they made more money than me..I will not recommend this lawyers to anyone..

IF YOU GET A CHANCE TO WORK WITH THESE LAWYERS DONT DO IT!!!!!!!!! If I could rate -100 stars I would. This office absolutely sucks, I was in two rear ending incidents. And then right after TWO YEARS from the first incident, they had me sign a paper with one amount, then they made me wait 4 months to disburse my check because “the insurance can’t figure which incident pays for what” ……
And it wasn’t until I told them I was gona consult with another lawyer that they finally gave me a check. A check with a lesser amount, like 1400 less than the first amount. I took it because it was so disgusting dealing with them. They never answer calls emails or texts. So do yourself a favor and NEVER hire these “lawyers”

I was referred to Posner law firm after my brother went through a car accident and had a good experience with Jason. Not only was Jason able to answer any questions and worries I had regarding my own car accident, but he was ultimately able to get me a better outcome to my case than I would have on my own. I am very grateful for all of his help. Thank you Jason!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Laura.  It was a fun working with you, and I'm grateful for the trust you and your brother placed in me.  Good luck.

reviews.text:

reviews.text:
Absolutely! Here’s a concise and polished Google review you could post:

---

We were referred to this firm through MetLife and had an outstanding experience working with Jawad Ali. Tremendous thanks to Jawad for his diligent and thoughtful feedback, prompt communication, and all-around professional and friendly approach - highly recommend!

This law group's handling of my son's case was frightening. They sat on the case for months pretending to represent my son and then out of nowhere bailed on the case, no explanation. This is a serious case involving a car collision and brain surgery, fraud and six figure medical bills. Sitting on the case for as long as they did, considering the statute of limitations, effectively nearly sabotaging the case, definitely crippling my son's chances of any restitution. Makes me wonder if they weren't working for the other insurance company behind the scenes.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We respect your concern for your son, but we want to clarify a few points. Our communications and representation were with him directly, and you were not involved in the consultations or correspondence.

From the outset, we explained that our ability to move forward would depend on whether the evidence supported litigation. Your son hired our firm in June 2025 and provided extensive documentation, the final set of which was received in August 2025.

After thorough consideration, in September 2025, we determined that the case could not be responsibly advanced. We were not the first law firm to review and ultimately decline to proceed with this matter, and our decision was based entirely on the strength of the evidence and our ethical obligations.

Our firm has been serving clients for more than 20 years. We regularly file lawsuits, and we never shy away from taking on insurance companies when the facts support a claim. This case was no exception: our decision was not about avoiding litigation, but about our professional judgment that the evidence did not provide a strong legal foundation.

We communicated this directly to your son in writing, well before his statute of limitations, specifically so he would have time to pursue another attorney if he wished. While we regret that this has been a difficult process, we wish him and your family the best moving forward.

reviews.text:
The Yunus Mohammed Law Group came highly recommended to me by MetLife Legal Plans, praised for their reputation of standing by clients to the very end, a reputation supported by many positive reviews. I turned to them after my previous attorneys walked away from my case when the insurance adjuster refused to budge.  From what was explained to me, their entire effort amounted to little more than asking the adjuster to reconsider, and when that failed, they simply dropped my case.  My situation is far from minor: I was struck by a car, sustained fractures to my neck and skull, which required emergency brain surgery that doctors did not expect me to survive.  The physical evidence highly indicates that the person turned sharply into me, I also possess extensive documentation of insurance fraud, along with two letters, one from the insurance company and another from their subrogation firm, apologizing for unlawful collection practices on fraudulent debt.

At first, I was encouraged.  The firm responded quickly to my initial outreach and scheduled a meeting.  Our first consultation was productive and straightforward.  Shortly after, I was informed that they would take my case.  During the fee agreement discussion, the associate carefully explained every detail, which is something I respected deeply, especially given my severe brain injury.  It felt considerate and professional.
I promptly provided the firm with all of my documentation, an extensive file of about 70 documents, I also arranged the finances for filing fees, expert witness costs, and other case expenses, as agreed.

However, after this promising start, communication entirely stopped.  For about a month and a half I heard nothing.  When I followed up, I was told the attorney was tied up in another case but assured that mine would still be handled.  I trusted this assurance considering their extensive positive reviews and our previous communication.  I provided them with state of the art AI analysis showing that the person sharply turned into me as per their request and waited.  But again, months passed with no meaningful updates.  Then, without warning, I received a letter stating the firm had closed my file and would no longer represent me without any reason whatsoever.

This was profoundly disappointing and, frankly, feels unethical.  I had the evidence and resources ready from the beginning.  If the firm did not wish to take the case, the honorable path would have been to decline from the outset, not to repeatedly assure me otherwise, waste critical months, and then withdraw abruptly.  With the statute of limitations on my case approaching, that lost time is invaluable.  I could have pursued representation elsewhere; in fact, I had another attorney willing to take my case.
I am sharing this experience so that others can make informed decisions.  The early professionalism I experienced gave me hope, but the lack of follow through and communication ultimately left me in a worse position than when I started.  I strongly encourage this firm to reflect on how they handle vulnerable clients and to act with more transparency and accountability in the future.

UPDATE Responding to the Yunus Muhammad Law Groups claim

I am not part of any coordinated campaign, and I am not impersonating anyone.  Negative feedback does not make a review fraudulent, on the contrary  it makes it important.  I used a pen name to protect my privacy because I suffered a severe traumatic brain injury,  and based on how my case was handled and how communication abruptly ended, I noticed red flags that made me concerned about possible retaliation.  Given the severity of my condition and the ongoing physical pain which I have been unable to seek treatment for, I am in no position to fight unnecessary battles, but I still have the right to warn others about my experience.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for clarifying that you are using a pen name to leave us a review. While we also do not wish to engage in a back and forth, we want to clarify a few things:


We are sorry to hear that you feel disappointed with your experience. When we accepted your matter, we explained to you from the beginning that our ability to proceed would depend on a thorough review of the evidence. You provided extensive documentation, which we carefully reviewed, and we also scheduled follow-up meetings to clarify key issues.

After this review, it became clear that the available evidence did not support the claims in a way that would allow us to advance litigation. We were not the first law firm to evaluate and ultimately decline to proceed with your case. As attorneys, we are ethically bound to pursue only matters that have a viable legal basis.

For more than 20 years, our firm has successfully represented clients, filed lawsuits at a high rate, and taken on insurance companies directly. We never shy away from litigation when the facts support a viable claim. In your matter, our decision was not about avoiding a fight but about our professional judgment that the evidence did not provide a strong legal foundation.

We communicated this to you in writing well in advance of your statute of limitations, leaving you with ample time to seek other representation if you wish. While we regret that this did not align with your expectations, we wish you the best moving forward

reviews.text: I called to set up a trust through my MetLife legal plan because Yunus is listed as a provider. I spoke with the legal assistant from Washington State and spent maybe 20 minutes on the phone with him, answering his trust-related questions. He said he would take care of us and have Yunus Muhammed call us to set up a meeting for our trust documents. Then he ghosted us. Never called or emailed us about anything and never returned my call. Absolutely worthless. Don't waste your time with this disorganized and unprofessional law office.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your feedback. We’re concerned this review may not reflect an actual client experience. Our estate planning intake process—including MetLife Legal Plans—never begins with a 20-minute phone call. Clients first schedule a free Zoom consultation with our intake team, and only after hiring do we request trust details through our Long Form.

Our process is built for structure and efficiency. First, a prospective client is sent a secure email link to schedule their free consult. Next, they complete a short intake form. Only after the consultation and actual hiring do we send the online Long Form to gather the information needed to prepare their trust and other estate planning documents.

Up to that point, we do not ask for trust-related details such as distribution plans, trustee choices, or assets. Because this reviewer claims someone would “have Yunus Muhammad call” to set up a meeting, this review doesn’t match our process. “Yunus Muhammad” is our firm name, not a person, and our team, not an attorney, handles all scheduling through booking links. We also found no record of this name or any similar lead in our CRM (intake process).

We invite MetLife members and other prospective clients to reach us through https://yunusmuhammad.com/#contact. Once a form is submitted, our team reviews it and usually sends a booking link within an hour. We take pride in providing a remote, organized, and professional client experience focused on clarity and prompt service.

From our first call he took a genuine interest in helping me and gave the guidance and support I needed throughout the entire process. After our first call, he immediately dug in. Billing was a no-nonsense affair, extremely fair business practices. I also really liked that he had a private, secure messaging system for communication. This made keeping track of the case as it progressed really easy and straightforward.

I cannot recommend Yunus Paisner enough. He knows what he's doing, supportive, dedicated, and most importantly, gets results. Words can't describe how grateful I am for his service.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words and recommendation, Caprice! We're glad we could help you through this challenging time. Wishing you and your daughters all the best!

reviews.text:
I had the pleasure of working with on Yunuf Muhammad law firm. From start to finish, he provided exceptional legal representation and guidance. He demonstrated a deep understanding of the law and the intricacies of my case, and his expertise was evident in every aspect of his work.

Yunuf was not only knowledgeable and professional but also incredibly responsive and attentive to my needs. He took the time to listen to my concerns, explain the legal process in clear terms, and provide timely updates throughout the duration of my case. His dedication and commitment to achieving the best possible outcome were truly commendable.

I am grateful for his guidance and support during what was undoubtedly a challenging time. I would highly recommend Yunuf law firm to anyone in need of legal representation. He is a consummate professional who goes above and beyond for his clients.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words and for taking the time to share your experience. We're thrilled to hear that you felt well-represented and supported by Yunus throughout your case. It's always our goal to provide responsive, clear, and professional service to our clients. We appreciate your recommendation and are grateful for your trust in us.

reviews.text: Younus and his team were respectful, straightforward, extremely honest, and set realistic expectations, good or bad. He was prompt with his emails, answered questions thoroughly and clearly, and was very patient with us. Younus cares about getting the best outcome and he was there with me with every step. His guidance throughout the legal process provided me with confidence and peace of mind. His team stayed in contact with me every step of the process. We appreciated his honesty through the case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind review. We're glad to hear that Yunus and our team could provide you with the clear guidance and support you needed.

reviews.text:
My experience with Yunus and staff was exemplary.
Yunus has a strong presence in the court room and will address your situation with confidence, clarity, integrity and a strong understanding of the law.
Yunus and staff will present an organized outline of your case and keep you updated as they move through the process of a resolution.
On a side note- I will tell you that Yunus does not mince words. He is 100% honest and transparent. His integrity is noble and he is simply put, “a very kind human”. Something we need to see more of these days. Thank you for all your support Yunus. I will use your law firm again should a need arise.
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow. Thank you so much Tanya! Yunus and his team are grateful for positive feedback but frankly don't deserve so much praise. We hope to keep trying hard for our clients every day so they know someone is in their corner when the other side wants to be a bully. We don't like bullies.

reviews.text: I haven't received any response from them. I went to their workplace and they wouldn't open the door because, supposedly, it's by appointment only, and when did I call to make an appointment? 😭😞

HI PEOPLE IN NEED OF ATTORNEY AND POOR JUST LIKE ME !!!! HERE'S WHERE YOU WANT TO GO THIER VERY FRIENDLY AND OH SO HELPFUL !!!! EVEN PAID PARKING METERS !!!! I RECOMMEND THAT YOU USE THE STAIRWELL  NICE OLD NEAT STAIRWELL IF ABLE THR ELEVATOR WORKS GREAT BUT I COULDN'T MANAGE THE BUTTONS WELL.... AND THE GIRLS THR WERE VERY NICE AND PULLED OFF THE NEEDED LEGAL ASSISTANCE AND THEY'LL HELP YOU ALSO OKAY YUP BYE 🤗🚭
