Knowledgeable, professional , explained everything so that it was understandable.  Recommend for elder law.

Joshua did an excellent job handling my deceased mother’s estate. He went above and beyond to find answers about an unusual Medicaid lien situation, and I ultimately received an inheritance because of it when it seemed unlikely. He was responsive to calls and emails, straight to the point, and overall, compassionate during a situation that nobody wants to be in. I highly recommend him.

We worked with Joshua Pops to establish an estate plan. He listened to our needs and gave us the best possible recommendations. Revisions were handled quickly and seamlessly.  Our banker commented that it was the most organized estate plan she had seen. He was kind, efficient and a pleasure to work with!
Mr. Pops is an excellent lawyer.  He's very easy to talk to and is very good about explaining things.  I recommend him highly!

I consulted with Joshua on a child support modification matter.  Although it was counter to his interests, he ethically advised me that I COULD pursue the matter through support enforcement.  He gave me the pros and cons of such an action and time to make a decision.  Ultimately I elected to use his services, rather than going through the state agency.

At every turn, he made suggestions to me when he saw and opportunity for me to save money in my endeavor and when my case took a deep left turn, he stepped up to change process in order to accommodate me and see my wishes through to action.

He also identified areas in my changed course of action that might leave me exposed in the future and worked hard to advise me and make sure that we shored up those areas of exposure.  I was more than pleased with the services Joshua provided.

Do need a lawyer who charges a hundred dollars for a 15 minute consultation? Then Joshua Pops is your man. Do you need a lawyer that gets paid to go the distance and then drops out? Then Joshua Pops is your man. Do you need a lawyer  that would rather watch sports then attend to your case? Then Joshua Pops is your man. Do you need a lawyer who thinks he's superior and talks over you? Then Joshua Pops is your man. Do you want a lawyer who calls you names in court behind your back? Then Joshua Pops is your man. Do you need a lawyer who makes it seem like you're burden on him and that your case is not a priority? Then Joshua Pops is your man. Do like being told to shut up by your lawyer? Then Joshua Pops is your man. I don't recommend Mr. Pops unless you just have money to burn. It turns out that even if you do all the leg work and investigation and supply all the pertinent information Mr. Pops will find a way to seem burdened.  I would give no stars

Josh Pops was personable, easy to work with and his sense of humor ameliorated the stress of the situation. Personality alone does not merit 5 stars, though.

I chose Josh over other attorneys I met with because he gave me the clearest understanding of what he felt he could and could not accomplish. When I retained him I had a reasonable concept of his strategy and he worked as an effective team with me to accomplish what we could. He was flexible in methods of communication, scheduling and never wasted my time. To be fair, it's rare to meet someone as personable as him as well as professional.

When it is necessary, I will be retaining Josh again and have already recommended him to friends.

I had an extremely difficult and unusual divorce issue that other lawyers would not take on due to uniqueness and difficulty.
From the first day meeting with Josh, I was impressed with his compassion and positive outlook on my case. His fees are some of the most reasonable in Vancouver.
Josh's legal expertise made the whole process easy to understand and financially affordable.

Joshua Pops...one of the best!

I went to the law office of Joshua pops for legal help on a wrongful child support order. From the moment I met Mr. Pops I was impressed by his optimism, motivation, and genuine concern for my case.  Mr. Pops worked tirelessly on my case and kept in constant contact with me, and his fees were very reasonable. Mr. Pops won the case and brought peace of mind back to my life.                                                                If you’re looking for a great family law attorney I highly recommend Joshua Pops.
I love all of these people; professional and authentic and I can’t say enough about how awesome they are!

Alex stepped in when other attorneys turned me away.  He approached my case with confidence, understanding the complexities involved and reassuring me with his expertise.  Within just two and a half weeks of accepting my case, Alex secured a maximum value resolution.

Throughout this process, Alex’s dedication was unwavering.  He not only exhibited extensive legal knowledge and assertiveness but also displayed compassion and understanding, which made all the difference.  He took the time to walk me through every detail, explained next steps clearly, and consistently made himself available to address my questions.

Additionally, I must commend Andrea McGrath, Litigation Paralegal, whose follow-up and follow-through were exceptional.  Andrea’s proactive communication and attention to detail further eased the stress of the situation and ensured that nothing was overlooked.  Together, Alex and Andrea make an incredible team.

If you’ve been injured in a car accident, I cannot recommend Alex Wylie and his team highly enough.  They are committed to fighting for you, achieving results, and keeping you informed at every turn.  Don’t hesitate—reach out to Alex for the support and expertise you deserve.

From the first day, Alex and his team took charge, handling all the paperwork and facilitating clear communication between me and the insurance companies. Their thoroughness and attention to detail were nothing short of remarkable, ensuring that every aspect of my case was meticulously prepared.

Throughout the two-year ordeal, Alex's kindness and understanding were a constant source of reassurance. He not only fought tooth and nail on my behalf but also took the time to explain each development and strategy in a way that I could understand.

Their efforts culminated in a successful court decision where we were awarded the maximum compensation possible. I wholeheartedly recommend Alex to anyone seeking legal representation involving car accidents. His dedication, expertise, and genuine care for me set him apart as an outstanding advocate for justice. Thank you, Alex, for your exceptional service and support throughout this challenging time.

reviews.text:
When my father was hit by a car while crossing a street on foot, my brother asked a lawyer friend to recommend an Oregon law firm. That person quizzed associates, then recommended Dwyer Williams Cherkoss. We are eternally thankful.

Our father was under-insured, and so was the driver of the car that hit him. Our own research regarding how best to settle the resulting medical bills / liens was very confusing, and we entered our relationship with DWC with low expectations for a positive settlement.

The settlement process took nearly a year, and it was nerve-racking to see all the big hospital bills pile up during that time. But DWC was good about answering questions and making sure the process stayed on track.

Then, when things did finally settle, we were shocked that DWC was able to negotiate a resolution that not only covered all our father's medical costs, but also allowed him to pocket tens of thousands of dollars for his pain and suffering.

The attorney representing us in the Portland office was Jeffrey Carter, and his personal attention is something I also have to mention. Jeffrey personally visited and inspected the accident site (way out on the Oregon coast). And he offered to meet with our dad in-person at his rehab center, at his house and more. It was a level of service we never expected.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks so much for the kind words, Peter.  We were honored to have stood by your father's side in the successful pursuit of justice!

reviews.text: Update: personal injuries only. Sad. I have a slam dunk case but most are scared to sue the state of Oregon. I thought lawyers were brave and would fight for the rights of the innocent. I'm disappointed but Tim williams helped me with a few new numbers to call. Thanks Tim.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Mow,

We are sorry you are disappointed. However, our firm specializes in handling ONLY personal injury cases. It’s all we advertise for, and all do. Our systems, case management software, staffing and compensation structure are all designed to support ONLY personal injury cases. While I’m honored you wanted to hire us so badly that you were disappointed we couldn’t take your case, we simply do not practice outside our area of expertise. It’s like asking a brain surgeons to operate on a torn ACL. Or asking a motorcycle repair shop to fix a Ford F-150’s transmission. We honestly do not want to handle a type of case we weren’t totally adept in, as it sets the client up for nothing but disappointment.

I’m happy to chat about this by phone or in person. And, respectfully, I would suggest that this review is not appropriate, as it does not address the quality of the specialized services that we offer and work hard to excel at; but rather, merely complains that we don’t practice in areas we do not specialize in. Again, I’m happy to chat and certainly invite you to touch base to do so.

Sincerely,

Tim Williams

P.S. I messaged you through FB Messenger as well so that you have a direct line of communication with me. I do hope you respond. Thanks.

reviews.text: Ronn was an amazing and was fantastic when it came to the assistance I needed. First, I reached out with an extremely short timeline and was unsure that I was able to get assistance. Not only did Ronn contact me immediately after I reached out to his office, but he was able to get everything filed and sorted within a few hours.  I can not stress how much of a relief that his assistance was, but with how quickly he was able to not only review everything, contact the creditor, work out a deal (which was well within my means) he was also able to have everything filed, sent over and me on my way to no longer losing sleep was super human. Second, was how he was able to get my obligations within my means and below my cap was more than life changing for me.  Lastly, was how he was able to get everything filed in a deadline that was approaching fast well before I reached out to him and everything back over to me so that I can move on with my life to me was super human.  I can say on the day of writing this review comes with the official notice that I can put this in the history books.  I would not have been able to do it without his help, his willingness and ability to expedite things, his relationships and knowledge in the field is something that is gained over a lifetime of dedication and desire for excellence with compassion that only the best can dream of.  Although, I hope that I don't end up in the same situation, I can sleep better as long as Ronn is in the game I can rest easy!  Thank you from the bottom of my heart and I thank the Lord I reached out to you, and thank you for answering the call!  As I tell my friends who have gone through the same thing, I am Free and Clear because Ronn was there!

I appreciated Ronn's efficiency and his ability to quickly grasp the key aspects of my situation. His advice felt insightful and appropriate, giving me the confidence to move forward. Once I have implemented his advice, I will update this review with the outcome of my situation.

If you're facing legal questions or concerns, I confidently recommend reaching out to Ronn Elzinga. His professionalism, promptness, and genuine willingness to help, make him a valuable resource.

After being ghosted by contractors and left with a failing renovation project, I felt completely overwhelmed and unsure how to move forward. Working with Kenji Kozuma and the team at KB Law was a huge relief. They were was incredibly attentive and took the time to walk me through all the nitty gritty details I didn't fully understand at first. He and the team were unfailingly kind and patient throughout the entire process and ultimately helped me recover the finances I thought were lost for good.

I'm beyond grateful for their support and would highly recommend for anyone dealing with contractor disputes!

Lawyers are sometimes necessary, but, let's face it, often derided. Recently I was in need of a lawyer and was lucky enough to receive a recommendation for KB Law. To say they exemplify the exact opposite of every cliche about lawyers is an understatement. In a word, they were outstanding. Every step of the way, through a lengthy legal process, I was painstakingly kept up to date, and I never had doubts about all the facts that were always carefully explained to me, nor did I ever lose faith that my case, though relatively small, was of utmost importance to my legal team. I highly recommend KB Law and have already done so on many occasions.

Attorney Kenji Kozuma did a fantastic job representing me after a car accident that injured my neck, back, and shoulder. He was attentive, thorough, and made sure I received the medical care I needed while also helping bring the case to a successful resolution. I highly recommend him to anyone in need of a personal injury attorney.

Chris Burke and the KB Law team assisted me with a personal injury claim after a car accident. Every one of my *many* calls and emails were responded to the same day, and my questions were always met with patience and understanding. Thanks to the KB Law team, I was able to recover a significant financial settlement. Highly recommend!!!

A contractor damaged our home during a remodel and refused to hire competent professionals to remedy the issues. After hiring another attorney, who unfortunately did not seem familiar with construction lawsuits, KB Law was recommended to us by some friends. Kenji and his staff secured our family a six figure settlement. Everyone at KB Law was friendly, helpful, and patient. They walked my family through the steps of the lawsuit and repeatedly calmed our nerves when the mediation process took longer than expected. If we need legal help in the future we will be contacting Kenji and KB Law. Thank you for all your help.

After being injured in a vehicle/pedestrian accident, and completing various and numerous treatement and therapies, I was in need of an attorney to assist me in settling the claim with insurance companies.  I received a referral to KB Law, and contacted them about taking my case.  My initial contact was 2/20/24, 5 months prior to the 2 year mark following the accident.  Kenji Kozuma, attorney, agreed to take the case, whereupon he and Jessica, paralegal, provided me with detailed, clear, easy to understand and follow, steps to gathering all the invoices, medical records, photos, and information needed to begin the process.  With each task completion, I was validated, guided, encouraged and supported.  KB kept me informed of each development, communnication between parties, and updated tasks still in process.  We exchanged email messages continually along the way, and Kenji and Jessica welcomed my inquiries openly and supportively every step of the 5 month process. We had set the timeline to be completed by July end, 2024,  and that goal was achieved on time, with settlement outcomes above what I anticipated, as Kenji pressed for fair and just settlement with both insurance companies involved.
I cannot say enough positive comments about the care and attention to detail that KB Law provided me.  Never having to work with a law firm for anything like this before, I felt completely " in the dark" at the onset.  Finding KB Law, meeting with Jessica and Kenji, working step by step with them "holding my hand", guiding me throughout, has been one of the most satisfying experiences I have yet to have.  The professionalism, the experience, the knowledge of the legal inuendos, and the truly personal care I was given throughout, was soul-enriching and of the highest caliber.
And though, I hope to never need the services required following a pedestrian/ vehicle accident again, I have the highest regard for and would recommend KB Law, readily and 100%, to anyone needing outstanding, professional,  trust-worthy, and compassionate legal consultation.  They are the BEST!

Kenji Kozuma and his very professional staff represented me as the plaintiff for a motor vehicle accident and negotiated what I believe was the best possible settlement. I was well informed the whole time and Kenji even spoke to my father, who is also an attorney, several times to explain what was happening. I can't recommend KB Law enough. They made a less than ideal situation as easy as I could have hoped for.

KB Law provided us with excellent legal service. Kenji Kozuma was incredibly knowledgeable and took the time to explain our options at every step of the way. He was a great listener, retaining the details of our construction case and the story of our long journey that led us to seek his counsel. In the end, we are very happy with the outcome. His advise was on point and our situation played out as he explained it might. It was easy to have confidence in him and the team at KB Law. We are incredibly grateful for their help navigating a stressful situation. We highly recommend them.
Kenji Kozuma and his staff at KB Law LLC were amazing. They were able to guide us through a very volatile situation flawlessly. He is honest, ethical, and extremely hard working. I highly recommend.

Kenji, Chris and Jessica are top shelf! They were professional, honest and compassionate toward my situation and kept me apprised throughout the entire experience. They were prompt in responding to questions and were realistic when it came to setting proper expectations. Real cases are nothing like what is presented in mainstream TV shows, not that I ever had that perception. For me it was really important from day one my team new my mind, what was in my heart and how I felt about the situation that prompted me to call them. It was equally important that they believed in me, that my case was legitimate. So often there is shame and doubt associated in cases and I certainly carried a couple bucket fulls of it. Never once did they disappoint nor did I ever doubt they were the people I needed. I never felt judged or questioned their integrity.

Each one of these individuals have strengths that compliments one another to create an amazing team! Jessica is one of the hardest working, big hearted assistants I have ever met! She and I spent a lot of time going over so much information! She went above and beyond what was required.

Kenji and Chris know their stuff and were very down to earth. They did not talk over me or skip over things. They kept me in the loop every step of the way. They did everything I asked them to do and made suggestions and kept me grounded when I was coming from a place of emotion.

If you find yourself in a situation that is of their expertise, there is no one else I would recommend. If you are unsure what to do, (whether you have a case?, or if you should go the route of calling an attorney? ) call. They'll tell you.

If you want a team that actually cares, these are your people.

Kenji Kozuma of KB Law LLC was highly recommended by our own attorney for the vast expertise of KB Law LLC in Construction litigation.  We contracted to install a solar panel system in August of 2022.   The energy benefits of the solar system worked incredibly well, but the installation of the brackets was substandard and we experienced leaks from November 4, 2022 until KB Law secured an agreement with the solar company to replace the roof under the solar system and reinstall the panels in April of 2023..

The solar company would not discuss any redress besides temporary rubber cement patching that continued to fail until Kenji agreed to represent our interests.  He received our documentation, listened to our priorities, connected us to an expert consultant who documented every stage of repair who was eminently qualified to testify on our behalf, advised us with truth and integrity to expect several different scenarios, and then followed through with updates through several months of challenging communications with the company to secure an acceptable and fair arrangement without having to go to court.

If Kenji takes your case, you can expect the best possible outcome with expert and realistic experienced advice to guide you every step of the way.   We recommend KB Law LLC without reservation.  They were a lifeline through what could have been a far more expensive and drawn out process fighting a huge company for a fair outcome.

John and Diana DeMaria

This firm helped me draft a tort claim notice to a hospital so I could notify them within six months of the date of injury that I’m planning to sue them, as required by the hospital.

While calling around looking for someone to take the case, attorney Jina Clark and legal assistant Chris Hinze stepped up and took a lot of time and paid a lot of attention to help draft the notice for me and secure me the right to sue in the future once I find an attorney. I couldn’t have done this without them helping so much.

And they did this pro bono which massively helped me since I am low income and live month to month. Chris and I spoke on the phone several times and emailed a bunch, and Jina sent long, informative emails spelling out all my options and informing me how medical malpractice cases typically play out. I know the time they spent on me was worth at least a few hours of pay I can’t presently afford, and I’m so appreciative they took the time and treated me seriously and with respect.

If I can find an expert witness for my unique case, I wouldn’t hesitate to work with Jina and Chris on my case and know they’d work as hard and as long as possible to give me the best representation possible.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Gabe:
I hope you are able to find an expert for your case. If you find one, let us know and we will consider representation. In the meantime, I wish you the best of health and healing. BTW, this was the first time I recall that our firm has ever done a tort claim notice pro bono. Our hourly rate for tort claim notice is $400/hour and it generally takes 2 hours or more. Your case involved a unique issue of interest to Chris. So, I allowed Chris to do the bulk of the work on paid company time under my guidance to preserve the claim to allow time for you to find an expert. I pray you find one.
Jina

reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Raina:
Thank you for bringing this to my attention. I have instructed the legal assistants to promptly let prospective clients know if we are currently unable to fit a case into our caseload, so prospective clients can look for counsel with more availability. In the alternative, I have instructed the legal assistants to let clients know if additional information is needed to consider accepting a case.
All our attorneys have a full caseload, so we can only accept new cases as we settle cases. Since we have more demand for our services than availability, our attorneys prioritize accepting meritorious catastrophic injury and serious property damage cases and we have indicated our limitation in case acceptance in our phone tree. Occasionally, we consider less serious cases, depending on our availability and any pending deadlines.
After reviewing your intake, I noticed that you did not provide a date of loss to our legal assistant, which is very important as we cannot accept responsibility for case deadlines if we cannot calculate the deadlines.
I appreciate the difficulty of trying to book with a professional when there is a high demand for professional services. So, this gives me the opportunity to make suggestions to prospective clients seeking counsel:
Gather basic case information and corroborating evidence prior to calling a law firm and be polite to the legal assistant answering the phone. Please be prepared with the following:
• Date of loss
• Identity and contact information of at-fault party
• Insurance information of at-fault party if available
• Corroborating evidence such as:
o Receipts
o Photos
o Videos
o Witness contact information
o Injury information
o Contact information of incident/accident-related medical providers
o Property damage estimates
o Any other useful evidence
Please understand that lawyers must meet deadlines and prove cases using the legal rules of evidence. Thank you again for giving me an opportunity to clarify what is needed for us to consider accepting a case.

reviews.text:
My husband and I were in desperate need of an experienced attorney to represent us in contesting a restraining order that a disgruntled neighbor falsely filed and obtained against my husband. The order was filed with false accusations and could have negative affects on my husband if this order is upheld and not contested.
When I called Clark Law And Associates, I first spoke with Jennie. Jennie is the owner of the firm, she was very helpful. She took the time to help me, explain everything, and then referred me to her associate, “Cameron Green.” Cameron is extremely skilled in dealing with stocking and restraining order cases. From the time we hired Cameron until the time we went to court, Cameron literally only had a few days to prepare, I was a bit concerned, because Cameron was in the middle of trying another case. Our case was a bit complex and had a lot of details, Cameron must have a photographic memory, because when we went to court, Cameron had every detail!!!!
We could not have chosen better representation!!! Cameron is genuinely concerned about his clients, and knows the law inside and out!! He can quote “caselaw”like it is all on the tip of his tongue!
I would trust Cameron‘s representation with any legal matter, he is a fire ball in court and rules the court room. I felt secure and safe with Cameron by my husband side!
In court, Cameron brought out all the lies that have been told by the petitioner in order to obtain the restraining order in the first place.
Unfortunately, the judge ended up putting the hearing over until January because there was not enough time to finish the hearing. The hearing was on a Thursday, and by Friday, the next day, Cameron had already finished and emailed my husband a draft with a motion for the petitioner to admit her lies that were told, and court under oath.
Again, my husband and I could not be happier with the choice that we made for legal representation and would highly recommend Cameron’s legal services in ANY aspect.
We truly believe that Cameron possesses the skills and integrity to handle and successfully WIN any legal battle no matter what the issue!
Thank you Cameron!!!
We could not be happier with our choice, and cannot thank you enough for your willingness to listen to every single word we had to say, your integrity, genuine interest, and concern for the case, you are the BEST!!
Rebekah and Kevin

reviews.text:
The legal services Clark Law and Associates LLC provided were excellent. I am a return customer and no reason to go anywhere else now. I received help from them not once but twice over the year. My only regret, I wish I had contacted them earlier.

For months, I was feeling extremely negative about a number of legal conflicts I was caught-up in, but I made a call, came in to their casual-atmosphere office and got the professional treatment my situation demanded. The advice I received was above and beyond my expectations. Immediately, I was in a much better, more secure state of mind.

One issue I needed help with was my rights as a tenant during a no-cause eviction and successfully settled a disagreement my landlady and I were having over Multnomah County specific laws pertaining to relocation assistance. The other time, I had found myself in a situation where I was being asked to provide a police detective information. Clark Law and Associates LLC actually specialize in things like interacting with police, as well as issues like elder fraud, police misconduct protective orders and they provide wonderful help with all of it. My situation with the police had a positive outcome as well.

If you look at their site, it lists all the case types they do, which I would trust them to handle if need be. Knock on wood I hope I won’t find myself in a situation again where I need to seek legal council, but if I do, they will be the first I contact. It is great to have a local firm you can trust.

Prior to this year, I had no idea how much better off I would be hiring a lawyer. This past year was my first time dealing with legal problems. While sitting at home during lockdown, I had tried to research the law and negotiate my conflicts with my landlord and with the police. I did learn a few things by googling state laws, but it took so much time and was overwhelming. You can go on forever trying to do it yourself. What was especially helpful with Clark Law is they already knew so much about the specific laws that pertained to my needs and helped me in a tactical and efficient manner. They have handled many times over these type of legal predicaments.

What else can I say? Clark Law and Associates can help with writing letters on your behalf. For example, when I needed a letter written to my landlord to assert my rights, it was written effectively and without wasted words. It did cost what it did, but I came out way ahead financially because of it. Their fee was reasonable, worth every penny in fact, and then some. I should talk also about the emotional benefit of getting professional legal help. I felt more confident and positive, and you can't put a price tag on peace of mind. It is a great feeling when you can stop fretting about your legal issues 24/7. I was banging my head against the wall and it felt so good to stop doing that! Again, the only thing I regret NOT doing is contacting the firm earlier.

Thank you Clark Law for re-assuring me, making me feel comfortable and  secure and being warm to me when I was in crisis. You are all so cool. You have gained my trust!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for a detailed review.  I am happy we were able to resolve some of your predicaments.

reviews.text: I've known Chris Hill as a personal injury trial lawyer for 20+ years. He is considered by many as one of the very top personal injury attorneys in Portland. Chris Hill's professionalism, compassion, and patience let me focus on recovering from my injuries while he took care of the recalcitrant insurance companies. I was hit by a cargo van while biking to work. I was, like most would be, in shock. I also, like most, told myself I wouldn't need a lawyer despite my injuries and no fault for the accident. But insurance companies make their money by denying claims and coverage.  I battled months of insurance company denials while struggling to get better. Walking into Chris Hill's office and handing over my case lifted a weight off my shoulders so I could focus on recovery. Chris and his team took care of the rest.

Chris is communicative, taking the time to discuss my options and their potential up and down sides so that I could make informed decisions at each step. He made sure to find and incorporate relevant case law that protected my claim so I could be confident the insurance companies couldn't exploit any loopholes. He's not a good lawyer; I don't recommend him. I was involved in two car accidents in 2018. The first accident was caused by a semi-truck on I-5. In that accident, my 10-year-old grandson, my 2-year-old twin granddaughters, and my sister were with me. Of all the accidents, my sister was the most injured. In the second accident, while I was stopped at a red light, another person didn't stop and hit me from behind. One of the insurance companies started pressuring me to sign documents, so I found myself needing to find a lawyer. The clinic where I was receiving treatment for the first accident recommended Milla Law. I made an appointment and went to his office with the accident reports. The lawyer became very interested when he saw that it was a semi-truck; he said they had good insurance. However, it didn't help much, as the lawyer waited the two-year deadline to seek compensation. A month before the deadline, the lawyer called me and told me there was no valid reason to go to court and that the semi-truck's insurance company was only willing to give me $8,500, of which $3,000 was for his fees. He was also handling my sister's case, but it didn't help her at all, and in the end, he left the case to her. For the second accident, he only got me $4,150. Honestly, I was very disappointed. It seems they're working more for the insurance companies than for their clients.

He truly goes above and beyond to get great results. If you have been in a car accident and need an attorney give him a call. He will take care of you!

If you are looking for someone that is upfront and reliable, Steve Milla is a great choice. He handled my car accident settlement, and was extremely helpful in handling medical bills that were submitted late, and getting my case closed in a reasonable amount of time. He was also always kind, supportive, and attentive throughout the entire process.

I have used this Attorney for many years. He is very fair and nice. He explains things to you clearly so you understand. I would recommend him to anyone and everyone I know. If he can't help you he can most likely recommend somebody that does or can help you.

Mr. Milla and his people were wonderful!  My husband and I unfortunately were struck from behind in our van and Mr. Milla helped us immensely with what to do for insurance matters and damage to our vehicle.  We are extremely pleased, he worked hard for us and we are very thankful....

My husband and I were referred to Steve by a friend who is an attorney. We are so impressed with his personal integrity and how much he cares for his clients. He led us through each step of the way and by the end of it all, we could not believe how he cared for us. He's not about money he's about justice and that is rare to find these days. I came to Steve for a settlement for a car accident. He was professional through the whole process. He would take the time and listen and also state the facts and be a realist when it came time to settle. I would highly recommend hime for your litigation needs

We had an excellent experience with Steve and his team. Navigating the legal world can be challenging and exhausting, but Steve was highly knowledgeable and transparent. There was no fluff or exaggerated expectations, but instead an honest and thorough dialogue.  Steve was engaged, effective, and facilitated our case with ease. We couldn't be more pleased with the process! Thank you, Steve!

Why I’ll always be grateful for Steve Milla:

In 2013 I was smacked hard in the left temple by a wooden box carried on the shoulder of a grocery store worker.  His suddenly changed trajectory slammed the box into my head with the force of a baseball bat.  I saw stars (really) and fell sideways, twisting my right knee.  For the following week I was plagued with memory loss, including my own home address.  I was 77 at the time and credited up till then with having an excellent memory.

Visual difficulties (prolonged after-images and spates of double-vision) ensued, along with pain in, and periodic collapse of my right knee.  I brushed aside all suggestions to get a lawyer, until a reasonable friend pointed out that I was paying medical costs I could ill afford, and experiencing knee pain, headaches, dizziness and a staggering gait that was all the fault of a distracted employee’s carelessness.

I finally listened, searched the internet for a female attorney that handled cases like mine.  I figured the right female might be more concerned with an old woman whacked by a box in a supermarket than a male.  I pored through stacks of info I had printed out at the library and couldn’t decide.  Suddenly I remembered a wonderful female lawyer I had met a few years earlier who worked with auto insurance companies.   I called her, told her my situation and asked for a referral.

She told me she thought Steve Milla would be an excellent advocate for me, as she had known him as the opposition lawyer in court many times and had great respect for him.

Okay.  Back to the library.  I looked him up.  Not only a man, but a young man (relative to me).  But what a history.  I liked everything I read.  A man who in my opinion (based on his work history) could run for office at the federal level and win, but who chooses to defend the underserved, and often shunted-aside citizenry.

I met Steve in his welcoming office where he unhurriedly listened with 100% of his attention, explained that if he didn’t win redress for me (and he thought he could or he wouldn’t take my case) I would owe nothing.  If/when we won, a very reasonable percentage of the payment would go to him.

At every step in the process, Steve Milla’s wonderful office staff kept me informed (as did he, with emails) about small stumbling blocks along the way, and finally the excellent resolution of my case, with enough to pay all my out-of-pocket medical expenses, and pain and suffering compensation which was tied to other financial loss I experienced.  Not huge, but I was very gratified.

Steve Milla’s competence, intelligence, kindness and attentive listening skills are peerless.  Additionally, Steve radiates peak physical health, a necessary foundation for work that can sometimes be fraught with extremely stressful situations.

I am 80 now, no longer staggering, haven’t had double-vision for over a year, and remember all the material I need to, as well as the roster of phone numbers and addresses I retained before the concussion and knee injury.  Steve Milla’s attentive advocacy (and his caring office staff) during my two year ordeal was a constant comfort and a godsend.

If you want the kind of Lawyer-Hero they made movies about in the old days, you’ll want Steve Milla to represent you.

Forever Grateful,
Nancy Simmons

My wife and I are extremely appreciative that he took our cases . He is gifted to hear you out and share the plan every step of the way .my wife and I are honored that Mr Milla was referred to us .it is our pleasure to recommend him .

WITH STEVE MILLA AND ASSOCIATES I HAD EXCELLENT SERVICE. THEY HELPED ME FEEL CONFIDENT AND SECURE IN MY CASE. I HAD NEVER BEEN IN THIS SITUATION. ATTORNEY MILLA AND HIS STAFF SUPPORTED ME LEGALLY AND MORALLY. I WAS ALWAYS RECEIVED WITH A SMILE. THANK YOU, GOD BLESS YOU!!

I was referred to Steve Milla from another attorney friend of mine regarding a traffic collision that I was involved in.  Steve took the time to explain to my wife and I all of our options and probability of successful outcome.  He did not rush us and made us feel like he was genuinely concerned in our outcome not in what was in it for him.  He is knowledgeable and understands the legal system in Oregon.  As a recently retired police chief in Oregon, I have had a lot of professional interactions with different attorneys.  I would place Steve at the top and would highly recommend him.

Steve is an attorney who gets it!  He knows dealing with insurance companies and other professional agencies or businesses can be nerve-racking.  Unfortunately, these companies and their lawyers deal in these situations every day, so you need someone on your side who can make sure your interests are represented.  Steve helped us through the whole process, giving us advice on what to expect and what our options were all along the way.  He wasn’t pushy and was always willing to offer advice and also to try to give us an idea what he might do in our situation.  He is all about representing you, and helping you get to a fair resolution.  I would highly recommend him.

Steve Milla, in my opinion, is an excellent attorney.  I have used him twice now for two completely different cases. He knows the law and he know his business.  I was so impressed with his work that I have recommended him to family and friends and will continue to recommend him to anyone who wants to work with a good attorney.
I am glad I had him on my side.
Ray Matar

I came to Steve on several different occasions the past several years and each time he provided me with excellent advice.  What I really like about Steve is that he doesn't sugar coat things and tells me whether or not he can help.  I truly feel like he has my best interest in mind when I am speaking to him.

Thanks for your services Steve!  I hope I don't need your help in the future, but if I do, I'll be going to YOU!

Steve is fantastic and all of the secretaries here are great. I came here after a motorist ran a stop sign and hit me on my bike. Everyone at the firm responds in a timely manner and with respect. Steve went out of his way to make sure I did not have to do ANYTHING extra beyond simply recovering from my injury (he even came to me to sign paperwork so I wouldn't have to travel too far). This was great because it is very difficult being an injured cyclist who is a full-time physics student without a car. Most important, Steve restored some sense of justice for me in the world after I was hit by the car. By making these people who victimized me pay for the damages and woes they caused me, I was left with a renewed sense of justice in the world. This was extremely important because, as a lower-class person, I am often victimized by people in society and I do not have the money it takes to fight for justice. Steve handled all the fighting for me, and he asked for no money up front. His service to me was worth every cent I paid him at the close of the settlement. If you are injured and frustrated or depressed that someone seems to be allowed to hurt you and disrupt your life without recompense, call Steve Milla. He will preserve your sense of dignity in the face of bureaucratic demands from insurance companies, and he will help you seek some sense of justice. Thanks, Steve!

Steve is a amazing attorney very passionate about his work and treat his clients with the upmost care and respect and will go beyond for his client I have had nothing but a great experience working with Steve and him handling my case I would 100% recommend him to anyone looking for a attorney that is 100% about they client and fighting for what’s fair and the justice his client deserve thank you Steve for everything
Steve is the best! I felt so secure and well protected. He is an incredible listener and an all around great guy. You are in good hands!
Thank you for helping me out on it and you guys done a great job. I will tell my friends about you guys 👍
Amazing lawyer!

steve seal and his team are exactly the kind of people you want to be working with. steve’s wealth of knowledge followed by his own human-ness allow for there to be a real dynamic between myself as a client and him. i felt fully heard about my case and supported. he offered great tips and went above and beyond to start the process of navigating my insurance claim with efficiency and speed. he has offered his time and patience and i am so grateful! call steve!!

I'm not sure if this law office was being used by a professional phishing team or what but a "Kylie Bradshaw"; after collecting tons of private information a few weeks ago, gave me a call back this morning claiming the office of Steve Seal is over capacity to take on new clients and gave me a referral for a law office that deals in an entirely different area of law and seemed very suspicious to me. She had alleged not to have my email address. When I called her back she was hesitant to answer any questions or to offer me a referral or to transfer me to the attorneys line as I have a bunch of questions and still do.
Great, caring, empathetic lawyer

Steve is absolutely fantastic lawyer! He went above and beyond all expectation I had with resolving the concerns I had. I feel so lucky to have found someone to help me with my legal issues and to also be such a positive, friendly, honest, trustworthy, and competent person to do so.

Hire him. You will not regret it.

I had the pleasure of working with Steve Seal and his assistant Jessica, and I cannot recommend them highly enough. Steve was an exceptional professional—always responsive, communicative, and respectful of my time and boundaries.

As someone who works at another law firm, it was important for me to keep my personal legal matters completely separate from my professional environment. Steve handled everything with the utmost confidentiality and professionalism. I truly felt that he had my best interests at heart every step of the way.

Jessica was also incredibly helpful and supportive throughout the process. Together, they make a fantastic team—efficient, trustworthy, and compassionate.

Thank you both for everything. Your dedication and integrity are truly appreciated. I would absolutely recommend your services to anyone in need of reliable legal representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ana, thank you so much for the kind words. You were a great client and I'm honored that you trusted me with your case. Thanks for shouting out Jessica too. I couldn't do it without her.

reviews.text: Effectively communicative, compassionate, and human. We won my case. Thanks for everything Jessica and Steve!
Steve offers great advice and is easy to talk to.  He has a great way of helping to view the big picture in sometimes uncertain and difficult situations.  His service is highly recommended!

I highly recommend Steve. He’s very knowledgeable, as well as personable. He provided solid advice and guidance about options available that I hadn’t considered. He listens, asks thoughtful follow-up questions, and provides well-reasoned advice. I feel fortunate to have been directed to him.

I ended up reaching out to Steve after my daughter (who is a minor) received a subrogation claim 2 days before Christmas for an accident she was involved in over Mother's Day weekend.  I was beside myself with anxiety trying to figure out the best way to handle it as our insurance company was not willing to offer any help.  I didn't realize when I called that Steve is a litigation lawyer, but it didn't matter because he was willing to meet with me to discuss my options; he took the fear out of the whole process for me and helped me find my voice.  With his help I was able to navigate the process and clearly understood what my options were. He is down to earth, he made me feel heard and understood.  I have been telling everyone I know about him and If I ever need a litigation lawyer, I will be reaching out to Steve!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words. You deserved more peace of mind from your insurance company.

reviews.text: My man Steve. I should have the guy on a retainer with my track record but I'll tell you this: he works for you like Don Adams as the voice of Inspector Gadget, ("[he's] always on duty"). A dedicated advocate in the truest sense of the word, fighting for the rights of the consumer, the common man, the injured, the seemingly helpless. I hope to never have a reason to complain but if I do, Steve's the man for the job.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Bennie. Always happy to help. Remember that the only better thing than having a lawyer or doctor is not needing one.

reviews.text: Steve is a top notch Attorney for any type of injury case.  Heck, I would trust him for any type of case even if it is outside of his specialty.  He is dedicated, compassionate, and aggressive in his pursuit for justice for his clients.

I could not recommend Steve and his office enough. Steve offers only realistic outcomes with direct views on how to accomplish them. Fair, honest, and helpful across the board.

I had an insurance company ignoring my claim for years. Steve and his staff stayed positive and diligent in a case that took some time, helping me see it through in a situation that I would have given up on.

I would recommend Steve to others without hesitation. He’s supportive, easy to talk to, and generous with his time. I can’t say enough good things about him… Smart, professional, and somehow makes any situation feel manageable and approachable.

Steve helped my wife and I as we had a insurance company try to get over on us by not paying due fees. We called Steve and he was immensely helpful in giving us counsel and helping us figure out our next steps and explain things to us so we could learn from this moment. Super nice and knows what’s he’s doing.
Very thankful for Steve. No stress here! 😎

Barely started working with Steve Seal and have already found them to be professional, transparent, strategic and empathetic. I never felt rushed to get off the phone and their values presented themselves as big drivers in their practice. Grateful I found their office.

I had Steve help me in a personal case years ago. He helped me out with dealing with the other persons insurance company and helped me settle a claim through them. Not only did he help me with that I called him about another incident that happened not to long ago and he also helped me with all my questions I had in that matter.He's very fast at answering all my personal  and legal questions as well has always had great etiquette in helping me understand my situations.  Would highly recommend.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Joseph! It’s always a pleasure catching up with former clients. Glad you’re doing well.

reviews.text: Steve responded to my questions within a day, and he explained complex legal concepts in words that I could easily understand.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks so much for the kind words. It was a pleasure helping you. Don’t hesitate to reach out if you have more questions.

reviews.text: Far from any ugly stereotype of a personal injury lawyer, Steve is a truly compassionate and caring human who will always be honest and do his utmost for you. If you have the misfortune of being in an accident, you will be glad to have someone like Steve in your corner.
Very knowledgeable, helpful, and honest.  Definitely will be my go to if I ever need again.

I’m so glad a friend recommended Steve Seal. His experience, knowledge and compassion put me at ease in the weeks and months after my auto accident. He patiently listened to all the questions and concerns I voiced and provided excellent counsel from start to finish. I had a great experience not just with Steve but his entire staff, including Jessica. I was really impressed with how professional AND personable they are. I would trust Steve with any future settlement or litigation work and highly recommend his services.

Jessica is so helpful and such a great listener; always follows through and is quick to respond! Steve is really informative and truly has my best interest in mind. I'm feeling very secure having this team behind me!

I was referred to Steve by someone else and honestly I wish I would've contacted him sooner. The whole aftermath of an accident is exhausting and confusing, but Steve has really taken the time to break everything down for me in a way that non-lawyers can understand. It's put my mind at ease through this process. He's also incredibly responsive, and so is his assistant, Jessica. Highly recommend contacting Steve if you're in need of a personal injury lawyer!
Steve was very helpful with some useful advice. Helped me understand the situation I was in and what kind of options I might have. Easy to talk to. I recommend giving his office a call.

Steve worked with me on a personal injury claim. He is professional, responsive, empathetic, and patient in explaining the legal process and pros/cons of every decision I needed to make. His assistant Jessica was also a pleasure to work with.

Where do I start? If you are looking for a Law Office then okay.. But if you are looking for a great Law Office then your in the right spot 👌🏾. Steve reminds me of Matt Murdock and if you haven't seen Daredevil, then I suggest you watch it 😉.
The communication and the passion Steve and his team has was awesome. And to tell you the truth, I was thinking about ending it all. Because my accident set me back a few years I felt like... but Steve called and checked up on me and his assistant which I'm forever grateful 🙏🏾. your not reading my comment by mistake trust me, I highly recommend you give him a call or a buzz.

Son was recently involved in auto accident.  Contacted Attorney Seal who provided expertise dealing with the situation.  His experience with and knowledge of the process and interacting with insured's insurance company was invaluable.  Advised us and helped us settle on what we considered an equitable figure.  Good to know there is this type of assistance available!

After my car accident my car insurance company was not pleasant to work with and it constantly felt like they were trying to take advantage of me.

Hiring Steve Seal was the best decision i could've made, i no longer had to talk with my insurance company about the accident and they finally started to treat my accident appropriately.

Very professional and overall great experience
reviews.ownerResponse: Hey Derek, thanks a lot for the kind words. It was my pleasure to help you out. Dealing with insurance companies can be very overwhelming and I'm happy I gave gave you some piece of mind.

reviews.text: Steve was really easy to work with. After my accident I had to go to many different medical appointments and he made sure that everything was paid for and covered and always went the extra mile to make sure there were no mistakes. Even with covid, Steve worked hard with my case and talked me through it all every step of the way.
Steve is a great guy who is honest and forthright. He was willing to go the extra mile just to help me out.
Helpful in every way I needed, was able to provide answers to all of my questions.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the kind words. I'm happy to help.

reviews.text: Steve represented me in a personal injury case where I was hit by a vehicle while I was on my bicycle. I was very happy with the time he took to explain things to me and of course I am very happy with the settlement  he was able to get me so I could put the whole thing behind me. I have consulted him on other legal matters and he is very generous with his time, giving free advice and referrals. Steve is great and I highly recommend his services!
dedicated, thorough, helpful and all around genuine lawyer you can count on and trust...

Steve is a first-rate attorney and person. If you need someone to help you with a personal injury issue, he's the person to call. Professional, responsible and personal, he's a pleasure to work with. Highly recommend.

Steve Seal represented me after I was in car accident and was injured.  I honestly didn't plan on getting a lawyer but reached out to Steve after getting very poor service from my insurance company and the offending parties insurance company.  It was the best decision I could have made.  Steve ensured I got the care for my injury.  It was great to have someone looking out for my best interested and who knew the law so all I had to do was focus on getting healthy again.
I highly recommend Steve Seal. I have already referred him to a co-worker.  If you are not sure if you need a lawyer give him a call and ask he was very up front about the entire process.

Steve is incredibly personable and professional. He makes the entire experience very understandable and as smooth as possible. I'm very glad to have found him! I highly recommended him to anyone who needs this expertise!

Having to find a lawyer after an accident can be scary. I appreciate that to Steve I wasn’t just another case, he cared about what I’d been  through, & how my life was effected. Steve also was able to put everything into terms that was easy to understand & explained the process thoroughly.  He is there to help you however he can.
Very empathetic and generous with his time. He really cares about his clients.

Steve is the best!  He represented me when I was hit by an impaired driver on my way home from work.  My car was totaled and my shoulder was injured.  His experience and knowledge was crucial in helping me navigate the insurance and medical claims.  My medical care was fully covered and we were able to avoid a trial and still reach a fair settlement. He really cared about my case.  He has my gratitude and I highly recommend him!

Steve was absolutely amazing. I needed a lawyer for a fender bender, and a friend of mine recommended Steve. He was very diligent, honest, and explained things in a way I could understand. He was also on top of the insurance companies, and made the process easy for me by corresponding with not only phone calls, but emails as well. He was always quick to reply, and had my best interests in mind the whole time. Steve was never about money, money, money. He was about how could he help me! I am a single mother of three, and Steve even reduced his fees for me, making less money for himself. I would give him 100 stars, and would highly recommend him to anyone in need of a great, honest lawyer. Thanks again Steve!

Steve totally went above and beyond what I expected from any attorney Totally professional in all aspects regarding my case. He wasn't afraid to go the extra mile, and was willing to listen to all feedback. If you want a lawyer that'll do what it takes to do whatever is best for you, no matter what, then Steve Seal is the ONLY attorney for you.

Steve was referred to me by a friend and I'm glad it was him. Steve is a very laid back, even tempered guy and was very easy to work with. He will give it to you straight and does his best to represent you in a way that makes you feel comfortable.  My case was very stressful,  like most and every step of the way was explained in detail so that I understood why certain steps took longer than others. He literally took care of every detail of my insurance and medical billing info and I didn't have to worry about anything other than getting better. I wouldnt hesitate to refer Steve to any of my family or friends and will be the guy I call if I ever need a lawyer again.

I highly recommend Nick Neidzwski and his team at BoatLaw in Bellingham, Washington to anyone considering a maritime claim. Nick and Alyssa always stayed in touch with me, genuinely considered my concerns and answered all my questions. Nick went out of his way to resolve my case successfully. I couldn't be more pleased. I am truly grateful for his help.
reviews.ownerResponse: It was a pleasure representing you, Kevin! We really appreciate your kind and thoughtful review of our services. Hoping all is well with you!

reviews.text: Boat Law LLP fought tirelessly for my case. Their professionalism and sincerity are commendable and I am profoundly grateful for their exceptional legal services. Very satisfied with the favorable outcome of my case. Highly recommend this firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words, Tony! Hoping all is well with you.

reviews.text: I have had a wonderful experience with Boat law. Not only professionally, but personally always there to answer our questions in a timely fashion, and gone above and beyond. We would recommend them to friends and family.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words and glowing review! We are thrilled to hear that you’ve had such a positive experience with Boat Law, both professionally and personally. Your recommendation to friends and family means the world to us. If there’s anything else we can assist you with, don’t hesitate to reach out. Thank you for trusting us!

reviews.text: Nick and his team are amazing!!!! Not only did they fight to give my family a future, they came beside us and walked through the pain, frustration, anger, and depression that comes with a major injury and the legal woes that follow. Their GENUINE concern for mine and my family’s well being made all the difference in weathering the storm.I couldn’t be happier with the outcome or the privilege I have to call them friend.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review Cory. We were honored to represent you and you can call us for anything in the future.

reviews.text: Never would I have thought I’d need a maritime attorney…when that day unfortunately came Im forever grateful Nick and his team were available to support me. The amount of information, patience and grace that I received from the team meant so much to me during such a scary time.  Forever grateful.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words. We're deeply touched by your gratitude, and it was our honor to support you during such a challenging time. Nick and the team are committed to providing our clients with the information and guidance they need, especially in tough situations. We're glad to know that our efforts brought you comfort and clarity. Should you ever need anything in the future, don't hesitate to reach out. We're here for you. Wishing you all the best moving forward!

reviews.text:
I am very pleased that I chose the right law firm that will stand up for me with integrity and respect. My heartfelt appreciation  to Nick Neidzwski  my lead lawyer, and Gordon Carey. Not only their expertise and extensive knowledge, but they also have a client-focused philosophy. And for me, that was a huge PLUS! Even when the pandemic struck, I was treated with care and respect. Nick was straightforward; emails and phone calls were always returned promptly, and he made  certain  that I understood everything. This law firm exceeded my expectations and I had a wonderful experience for their excellent service. They truly
deserve more than that.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your thoughtful review! We are truly grateful for your kind words and for trusting us with your case. Nick Neidzwski, Gordon Carey, and the entire team are dedicated to providing client-focused service, and we're glad to hear that you felt supported; it's especially rewarding to know that we were able to exceed your expectations. Your appreciation means the world to us, and we are honored to have been able to stand by your side. If you ever need anything in the future, we’re always here for you! Wishing you the very best moving forward.

reviews.text: Been with this firm for awhile and I have nevet had a bad experience!!! LOVE LOVE 💘
Henderson Taylor Law Firm was outstanding with my personal injury claim. They handled everything professionally, and got me the maximum settlement possible. Truly the best. Highly recommend!

I was struggling with the adverse insurance adjuster on my claim and asked Henderson Taylor Law Firm for help. Not only did Jordan and Rose make this whole process much less stressful, but they also fought the providers who were refusing to bill my health insurance despite being contracted with them and were also able to get my bills reduced. They were all very kind, thoughtful, and fun to work with on my case! I seriously could not have done this without their help, they made this whole thing so much easier to manage. I highly recommend reaching out to them for help!!

From the time I got out of the hospital and I went to the lawyer he made sure that my medical bills were taken care nothing went to collection he was always checking on me. The lawyer and his staff was very concerned about me , made me feel better  and everything was going to be okay he always let me know when he sent letters or paid any bills he kept me in inform of what was going on. he really made my car accident so much easier all I had to worry about is getting better have my surgery. Thank you for everything I recommend him 100% I give him five out of five stars

Jordan and his team are the best, they understand your concerns and your wants. They were quick to respond to any issues through out the claim/demand process. The team was patient and had a desire to heal fully vs settle quickly.  Thank you Jordan team, thank you Rose!

On behalf of my husband, Jorge, and I, we will always be grateful to Jordan and his legal team, including Roselyn, for helping us through the legal process of fighting a car accident case. Throughout the process, they made us feel very supported and always kept us informed of any questions or concerns we had. We would recommend Henderson Taylor Law Firm to anyone who needs legal support because they are the best! Thank you, Jordan, Roselyn, and your entire team.

I was in a car wreck and Jordan acted more concerned that I was getting better than being concerned about the lawsuit. He told me getting better is the priority. I was very fragile and unable to do much of anything to defend myself due to the trauma of the accident. I'm so grateful Jordan was there to handle all the legal details and settle my debts and medical bills for me so I could just focus on healing and getting better.

My case was extremely complicated and if it went to court it would have taken an enormous amount of time. When it was time to decide whether to settle or possibly go to court, I said, "I'm ready to stand up for myself and go to court if need be." He said, "That's what I like to hear!" This gave me the impression that he was not afraid to go to court, and he is willing to do the hard work required to win.

We settled out of court. Jordan decreased his fee because he didn't have the expense and time needed to go to court. This was incredibly kind and generous and really demonstrated his honesty. In my interactions and experience with Jordan I found him to be a good person who was caring and willing to fight for me if need be.
We had the best experience with Jordan!! Jordan and staff are so helpful and quick. 10/10 would recommend!!!!
Excellent experience with Jordan Taylor. They have Spanish-speaking staff who are always attentive, and the service from everyone is very good. 5 stars for the Jordan Taylor team!!

I shopped around but Jordan Taylor was the only one that really took the time to understand my case and made sure I understood my options in order to fully represent me. I highly recommend Jordan Taylor and his team for highly knowledgeable, consistent clear communication with expert representation.
This law firm is amazing they helped my wife and I through a difficult time they were thorough and they treated us like family. I would recommend this law firm to anyone going through a misdiagnosis
Jordan and his team are the best they helped me with my misdiagnosed ectopic pregnancy suit and theu were very thorough and up front. I am so glad they helped me!

My experience  with Henderson Taylor Law Firm  was absolutely amazing, let me just say Jordan Taylor, was an amazing lawyer and he helped me with everything, any questions that i had he made them very easy to understand and got me more than i could have ever imagined. very kind and supportive to my decisions and if i ever had a disbelief he would be there to tell me that everything was going to be okay. He supported me and my mom in a way that i thought wasn't possible. We got into a very big car crash and our car was totaled. Thankfully we are okay except for a little ptsd and some back problems that will sadly never go away, he helped us get the best possible outcome for a crash like that. I wasn't ever scared to ask or talk to him about anything i could be honest with him and he would be honest with me. He was the best first lawyer i could have ever asked for! And if i was still in Washington state he would be my go to lawyer for whatever i needed and i will 100% recommend him to anyone out there that is in need of assistance from a lawyer such as himself! Do not hesitate to call them or him for any inquires or questions  that you may have because they will help you and get you the best outcome you could have ever asked for, I dont have much to say about anyone else that worked there because i was still very young and dont remember much about anyone else. But as for Jordan he was amazing and he is actually the owner of Henderson Taylor Law Firm so he will help you with whatever it is, and you can trust him with anything. if you ever get into an accident in Washington state please please please please please contact Henderson Taylor Law Firm and they will get you what you need if not more than what you expected! Thank you so much again Jordan for everything that you helped us with! WE greatly appreciate you and your practice more than you will ever know!

Jordan, Rosé and the entire team were AMAZING from day one! I can not say Thank You enough. From the moment Rose answered my call in May 2018 to when we settled in the Fall of 2022 they treated us like family and made my daughter and I feel as though we could always trust them. We had gotten in a head on car accident in Vancouver, WA that I was not at fault. I was driving and my 13 yo daughter was in the passenger seat. The other vehicle that was driving the wrong way in our lane towards us hit us head on at 35-40 mph. Once we decided to hire Jordan and his team they always followed through with everything they said and kept all promises made. THANK YOU JORDAN!!!!
My family & I have been using Henderson Law firm for years, they are very efficient and professional. Any & all questions are always answered with a resolution. We highly recommend them!

I worked with Jordan Taylor and his team for my MVA. They were amazing to work with. They are so knowledgeable, hard working, and communicative. I have already recommended them to friends and family but I would highly recommend. This is the best experience I have ever had working with any law firm. Sue Nguyen is Jordan’s Paralegal and she was so quick to help answer any questions I had and I felt like they really had my best interest at heart the entire time. 12/10 experience!

I had Jordan Taylor represent me a couple of times, both times I had  wonderful experience.
I would highly recommend him and his team to my family and friends. They are very professional and helpful.

I was very happy with the services I received from the start to finish. Mr Taylor and his staff did an amazing job. They were very informative and professional. I highly recommend Henderson Taylor law firm to represent you.

I was referred to this firm from a friend of mine who was very happy with them and their service. My daughter and I have the pleasure of working with them and now also my husband. We are very pleased with the friendly staff and the excellent results of Jordan Taylor. I will always recommend this firm to anyone who needs this type of service.
Thank you Mr. Taylor and staff.

In my experience with Jordan Taylor and his staff, I was treated very well and they were beyond helpful with my personal and legal situations. I had been in a terrible motorcycle accident the year prior and they were helping with the repercussions from that. I had also just lost my only son and they were very empathetic. I would highly recommend them.
Incredibly understanding and patient, went above and beyond to get me a fair settlement.

Jordan Taylor my attorney has been handling my injury case due to an auto accident. From the very beginning Jordan has been professional, added with a touch of humor and relaxed mood. As we have worked through the legal process, he has explained in detail the steps, making it easy to understand, every step has concluded exactly as explained. I have complete faith Jordan and his team to continue to handle my needs, should I have a legal situation in the future I will without question ask him, and the firm to handle it for me.

I had Jordan represent me in a car accident. He was so great to work with all while being upfront, informative, and honest. Henderson Taylor made the process so simple. I would definitely use them again, and I recommend Jordan to my friends.

Jordan Taylor along with Rose and Bre , finished my accident case of 3 years . It was during Covid so a lot of the normal course was different than the usual . Jordan was able to pivot and adjust as needed .  I felt supported by him through out the process . Thanks to the whole team !

I can't express enough gratitude for Jordan Taylor's outstanding legal support during the difficult period following my auto accident. From the first consultation, Jordan Taylor exhibited professionalism, compassion, and a deep understanding of the legal complexities involved in my case.
Throughout the process, Jordan Taylor and their team demonstrated remarkable dedication and commitment to ensuring my rights were protected and that I received the compensation I deserved. Their attention to detail and thorough approach to building my case instilled a sense of confidence in me during an incredibly stressful time.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much Roberta, that means a lot to us.

reviews.text: Mr. Taylor and his office staff did an amazing job.  It took a couple of years and the case was transferred to federal court. We got honest answers to our questions and never felt pressured to make uninformed decision.  My neighbor is a retired attorney also used Mr. Taylor to represent him.  I highly recommend them to represent you.

understanding through the process of a
lawsuit. I had multiple issues and they were

I highly recommend Henderson Taylor Law Firm if you need representation for injuries.  My experience with the Staff  and my  Attorney, Jordan Taylor, was more than I expected.  They were informative and very professional.  Kudos to Henderson Taylor Law Firm! You guys are the best!!!

reviews.text:
This law firm was recommended to me after I was involved in a motorcycle accident (not my fault), as they are known for specializing in motorcycle-related cases. From my first contact with them, I found everyone I interacted with to be responsive, professional, and easy to work with as we established a relationship.

Over the next year, while I was being treated by various medical professionals during my recovery, I was consistently reassured by the frequent and compassionate communication from their legal assistant, Kris Kohler. Kris has a remarkable ability to combine professionalism with warmth — truly excellent bedside manner. My attorney, Patrick DiBenedetto, was also directly involved and provided clear, knowledgeable guidance whenever I needed more detailed legal insight. Together, they kept me well-informed about the process and what to expect every step of the way. As someone who had never experienced an accident or financial situation like this before, their support was invaluable in easing my anxiety.

Throughout my recovery, I sent them regular updates from my daily logs, and they responded with genuine kindness and encouragement. On the practical side, it was a huge relief to have them handle all the insurance claims, medical billing, and financial negotiations with hospitals and insurers. Had I tried to do that myself, it would have been overwhelming. Thanks to their help, I was able to focus on healing instead of getting buried in paperwork and stress.

Nearly a year after the accident, they successfully negotiated the maximum settlement from the insurance companies. As my case now comes to a close, I can wholeheartedly recommend The Metier Law Firm. I’m deeply grateful to both Kris and Patrick for their professionalism, compassion, and expertise in making an incredibly difficult experience far less stressful. The financial arrangement was well worth the peace of mind they provided. I give them a full five-star rating.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dave, thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience with our team. We're truly grateful for your kind words and glowing review.

We're honored that you trusted us during such a challenging time in your life. Motorcycle accidents can be particularly devastating, and we understand how overwhelming the aftermath can feel - dealing with injuries, medical treatments, insurance companies, and financial stress all while trying to heal.

Kris and Patrick will be so happy to see your kind words about their dedication to your case. Your recognition of Kris's compassionate communication and Patrick's legal expertise perfectly captures what we strive for every day - combining professional excellence with genuine care for our clients as human beings, not just case numbers.

We're so glad we could handle all of the complicated parts for you, so you could focus on what mattered most - your recovery and healing. That's exactly why we do what we do. No one should have to navigate the complex processes of a case while dealing with injuries from an accident that wasn't their fault.

Most importantly, we're grateful that you've recovered well and that we could help secure the compensation you deserved. That's the best outcome we could hope for.

Thank you again, Dave. We wish you continued health and safe rides ahead.

reviews.text:

We're especially glad that Kris's responsiveness and our transparent approach to explaining your options helped you feel supported throughout the process. Helping our clients to make the best decisions for their specific situations is at the heart of what we do.
