reviews.text: Scott and his team made the process painless. They were prompt in responding and a pleasure to work with. I would highly recommend them!

My experience with this firm was not good. Almost 4 long years of mishaps, mistakes, negligence, and all the other ugly adjectives. To be denied my second hearing by the same judge that was in full favor of my disabilities and who approved me the first hearing before the SSA appeals council intimidated her, questioned her credibility? Tell me? The Senator was involved. For what? What good did it do?! Idk what the malfunction is/was, but I'm so ill! Then being told I'm going to have to wait a year to go to federal court! I've spoken with another firm and they're able to go to federal court immediately and are also extremely confused by what is going on with my case. I'll finish this with remembering the day I came into the office and was filling out paperwork in the glass conference room and some old white man that clearly worked there wanted the room and questioned whether I was even a paying client, and why I was in the room in the first place. The worst thing was that when I turned in my paperwork I apologized! The receptionist was clearly embarrassed by his stupidity, and thinking I didn't overhear. I should have fired you then! I would not recommend this law firm to anyone after what I have discovered and after the things I endured.

Chris Thomas and staff worked tirelessly to represent me. The settlement was substantially larger than we initially discussed. The staff is incredible and they not only care for their clients, they make you feel seen and heard. Absolutely the best.

Truly could not have been more fortunate to work with Cynthia Newton and her team including Rose, Amber, Dalia, and others. They were there every step of the way through three years worth of medical battles after being rear-ended. Their endless support allowed me to focus on my medical as they took care of anything and everything else on the legal side. They went above and beyond helping me within my case but also outside my case making sure I was okay. They made me be able to move on with my life despite my life-long injuries I endured. I would not have been able to start this new chapter without these amazing women! I hope no one else ever endures a life-altering accident, but sadly these happen every day. The best thing you can do for yourself is find a team who can support you through this hard chapter and I was beyond lucky working with a team like them. Do yourself a favor and work with an attorney as strong, kind, and caring as Cynthia Newton and her team.
reviews.ownerResponse: On behalf of the whole team, thank you! It has been our privilege to represent you and a pleasure to work with you. - Cynthia

reviews.text:
Sydney Montanaro was my attorney for my Workman’s Comp claim. Sydney made it so easy and worry free! When the Workman’s Comp didn’t pay like they were supposed to, Sydney was hot on it. She got them paying me straight away. They hadn’t paid me the difference after my wage increase at work, Sydney went back to them and had them increase it. But they didn’t pay me the late fee like they were supposed to. Sydney fought for me even after my case was settled and I received another $5200 for the late fee.
We settled with a mediator and Sydney was there with great advice and information on what to expect.

reviews.text: A simple narrative won't do them justice. Songs should be written. Epic poems should be written. A lifetime of lunches should be provided. On July 7, 2022 I was hit by a car while crossing an intersection on my bike. I was hospitalized for 4 days with a fractured hip, and on the fifth day I called Cynthia and Amber. They guided and supported me through one of the most difficult years of my life. I would've been lost without them. There was no way I could've possibly figured out health and auto insurance coverage along with getting paid for lost wages and the final payment for pain and suffering. I would've been crushed by anxiety on top of the physical pain. Amber, I'm sorry for all the emails describing my hip pain, my doctor appointments, and my fears about my future. My apologies to Cynthia who was cc'd on all those emails. Amber and Cynthia bouyed my spirit for a full year while working tirelessly for my financial well being. I am so glad I made that phone call. I am so grateful. They seriously went above and beyond all expectations. If you ever need legal representation, I'm sorry. Sucks to be there. But TCNF, Cynthia and Amber, will get you through this. A recommendation? A review? There aren't enough stars. And words can't begin.

Below is a brutally honest, nuclear, but still defensible Google review. It is framed as my experience and what the invoices and records show, without asserting motive or crimes.
Review of Landerholm Law Firm
Based on my direct experience and the firm’s own invoices and correspondence, Landerholm Law Firm exploited the vulnerability of an elderly widow following her husband’s death by instructing her that she was required to turn over extensive trust, tax, and estate documentation. Much of that documentation has never been returned or accounted for.
The firm obtained and retained private trust materials and then refused to provide complete copies back to the lawful beneficiaries and successor trustee, while simultaneously using those materials to commingle assets, relabel accounts, and edit or revise the structure of an irrevocable trust after both grantors had passed away—something the trust instrument does not permit.
Invoices and banking records further show that multiple payments were made to Landerholm Law Firm during a period when no valid EIN existed for the trust. The firm nonetheless asserted authority, billed fees, and participated in trust-related administration despite knowing an EIN had not been obtained. In fact, no EIN was obtained for approximately 21 months, yet trust-related activity and billing continued anyway.
These are not judgment calls or gray areas:
Irrevocable trust terms cannot be rewritten after the grantors’ deaths.
Trust assets cannot be commingled or restructured without authority.
Trust administration cannot lawfully proceed without a valid EIN.
Withholding trust records from beneficiaries while billing against the trust is not acceptable.
The invoices document the conduct. The gaps in records speak for themselves. Anyone considering this firm for trust or estate matters—especially involving elderly or vulnerable clients—should be fully aware of the authority, compliance, and transparency risks before engaging them.

This is Roy Pyatt 2023 president for Landerholm PS quote, "Clients should receive excellent legal representation, strategic council and highly personalized attention."
Quote from attorney, Gregory J. Hall at Landerholm, letter of withdrawal, stating that, my responses were, "incomplete, contradictory, and otherwise unhelpful."
My situation concerned a transfer of funds of stocks and bonds in an estate matter in which I was personal representative. Not an expert in this field, I sent all statements received that fit the date in question and that I thought were pertinent. These were incomplete. I sent an email telling Mr. Hall to give all the estate's financial records available to the beneficiaries. I was told the estate could be held liable IF there was a problem. The estate hired a CPA to look into the situation. The CPA had an answer but not enough statements to back it up.
I was given no suggestions on how I might find a solution. On my own I called a representative of the financial company involved. He tracked the transfer, determined the statement needed had never been sent to me, sent it, and confirmed the CPA's assessment and offered to answer any questions from Gregory Hall who had already withdrawn.
I was a client of Landerholm PS for two years.
I found another attorney. The estate was settled without discrepancies.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ A Miracle Worker: Gary the Workers' Comp Champion.

When I injured my leg at an off-site job, I thought my world had come crashing down. The physical pain and mental anguish from the accident were only compounded by the feeling that my employer was leaving me out in the cold. From our very first meeting, Gary was a breath of fresh air. Gary's knowledge of workers' compensation law was astounding, and he had the tenacity of a lion when it came to fighting for my rights.

His communication was top-notch, ensuring I was informed and involved every step of the way and the outcome of my case has given me the opportunity to rebuild my life and regain the dignity I had lost.

If you ever find yourself in need of a workers' comp attorney, do not hesitate to contact Gary.

reviews.ownerResponse: I’m sorry you had a negative experience contacting our office.  We strive to provide conscientious and compassionate service to everyone who calls.  I encourage you to review our website for our practice areas.  The type of “civil rights” cases our firm handles are primarily housing and employment discrimination.  While victims of violent crimes have rights that they can pursue through a lawsuit, those are not the types of cases we handle, but we can refer people to lawyers who do handle those types of cases.  Unfortunately, you ended our call before I could give you that information.  Finally, I do not recall telling you  that “we do [civil rights cases] just not for you”.  I recall saying we do not handle your particular type of civil rights.  I am sorry if I was unclear with communicating this.   It is my goal to try to help as best as I can, and I feel bad when I am not able to be more help. I hope that you are able to find someone who is able to help you and wish you the best of luck in getting the justice you deserve.

reviews.ownerResponse:
We’re sorry to hear that this was your experience. We understand how frustrating it can feel when expectations around communication or timing aren’t met, and we take that feedback seriously.

Transparency is very important to us. Our planning services are provided on a project-based fee that is discussed and agreed to from the very beginning. For planning projects, we do not bill hourly, and there are no itemized charges added along the way without being discussed in advance.

Trust and estate planning often involve detailed conversations, careful drafting, and revisions to ensure documents are done correctly and reflect a client’s wishes. Most of our clients share that they feel informed, supported, and confident throughout the process, though we recognize that expectations and experiences can differ.

We continually review our communication and processes to ensure we are providing timely, thoughtful service. We welcome the opportunity to speak directly to better understand these concerns and review what happened. If you’re open to that conversation, please feel free to contact our office.

Thanks to Pettis Webber Pacific P.S. I now have a comprehensive will and trust that I feel secure about. I highly recommend Pettis Webber Pacific P.S to anyone needing estate planning services. Their expertise and dedication are truly unmatched.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your thoughtful review! We're thrilled to hear you felt confident and supported throughout the process. We're glad to know you now have peace of mind with your estate plan in place.

reviews.text: Pettis Webber Pacific's staff is courteous and friendly.  They were very helpful with our questions and took the time to answer them completely.  They walked us through a process that rearranged our finances, placing us in a more advantageous position as senior citizens.  We highly recommend seniors consult with this firm regarding their economic situation.  We are certainly thankful that we did.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words! We’re so glad we could help place you in a stronger financial position and answer all your questions. It’s wonderful to hear you felt supported and well-guided through the process.

reviews.text:
I cannot recommend Attorney Karen Webber and her team at Pettis Webber Pacific PS highly enough. They recently prepared a living trust for my family, and the entire process was exceptional from start to finish. Karen and her team were incredibly thorough, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in ensuring our needs were met and our future was secure.

Throughout each step, Karen demonstrated not only deep expertise in estate planning but also a sincere dedication to understanding our unique family dynamics and wishes. She explained complex legal terms in a way that was easy to understand, ensuring we were comfortable and confident with every decision we made. Her attention to detail and her commitment to our peace of mind were apparent in every interaction.

The staff at Pettis Webber Pacific PS is equally impressive. They are prompt, professional, and compassionate, creating a welcoming environment that made what could have been a daunting process feel seamless and reassuring. I’m so grateful for the outstanding service and expertise we received, and I highly recommend Karen Webber and her team to anyone in need of estate planning. They truly set the bar high!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your incredibly thoughtful review! We’re honored to hear that you felt supported and confident throughout the process. Providing clear guidance and ensuring peace of mind are top priorities for Karen and our entire team. Knowing we could make estate planning feel seamless and reassuring for you is the best reward!

reviews.text: Pettis Webber Pacific P.S has worked with many of our family members in the past, assisting them through estate planning whether for the future or due to illness.  So, when it was our turn, it was a no brainer!  Our experience was better than imagined.  We were heard, communication was clear, accessibility was great, and our documents were thorough and spot on.  I highly recommend Pettis Webber Pacific P.S!
reviews.ownerResponse: Your recommendation means a lot to us, and it’s a privilege to be a part of your family's planning journey. Thank you!

reviews.text: My husband and I came to Pettis Webber Pacific P.S for estate planning and will creation after the loss of a child.  Our attorneys took the time to know who we were, to gage what we valued in life and most importantly put or hearts and minds at ease for the care of ourselves and our children for the future.  The communication and details provided were understandable and with care.  They came to our front steps during COVID so we could sign our documents safely and securely in a comfortable setting.  We received our documents and paperwork in a timely manner and beautifully organized.   I recommend Pettis Webber Pacific P.S to all my clients, family and friends.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your heartfelt review. We are truly grateful for your trust and are honored to have been able to support you during such an important time. Providing compassionate, thorough, and accessible service is our highest priority, and it means so much to know you felt at ease throughout the process.
Thank you for taking the time to review our firm!

reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience with the firm.  From the very start, the team was  professional, knowledgeable, and compassionate. They took the time to explain every step of the process and tailored it to fit my needs and concerns. I especially appreciated how thorough Karen and Beckie were in addressing my questions, ensuring I fully understood my options.  Highly recommend to anyone looking for dedicated, trustworthy guidance in estate planning!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience! We’re so happy to hear that you felt supported throughout the process. Thank you again for your kind words!

reviews.text: Administrative assistant that answered the phone is Condescending and rude. Needs a bit of an attitude adjustment.

Although a tedious process a Trust agreement was completed
In due course.

Cannot express enough how happy we were working with Pettit Webber Pacific P.S. updating our will. They are extremely professional, knowledgeable and wonderful to work with. We HIGHLY recommend them!!!

We are so appreciative for Pettis Webber Pacific and how quickly they stepped in to update our estate plan when my husband fell critically ill and his future was very uncertain.  To ensure our plan was in place prior to an urgent procedure where the outcome was about 50/50 that my husband would survive, the firm prioritized our case and even sent paralegals to our house to conduct our estate plan signing so that all documents would be in place should something happen during his procedure.  The peace of mind this gave us and our adult children was immeasurable.  To know that we had everything in place should the unthinkable happen meant everything to us!
I am fortunate to know a few things about estate planning and what it takes to put a competent and thorough plan in place to ensure nothing will thwart our wishes for our loved ones once we pass.  Karen and Becky (the partners) are the most caring, honest, trustworthy, professional, knowledgeable, and experienced estate planning attorneys you will find!  What a lot of people do not understand is that this firm not only creates the estate plan to meet the client's desires and goals; when they do trusts, they also do all of the funding and asset transfer work so the trust is funded correctly and beneficiaries are all correctly updated to match the trust.  What other firm does that??  Most firms do cookie-cutter, one-size-fits-all trusts at a fraction of the cost and don't take critical concerns into consideration (like what happens if you DON'T die but need constant care) and don't include any funding or asset transfer work, leaving clients to do all of this on their own -- which most people probably don't ever end up doing, making their trust essentially worthless.  It's a lot of work to transfer assets into a trust, and PWP does this every single day to ensure that once an estate plan is in place, everything will flow exactly as it should and there will be no hassles or issues for the family to settle the estate once someone passes away.
Our estate plan is a tremendous gift we are giving to our kids and grandkids; you can't put a price on that kind of peace of mind!  They have already thanked us for making our estate settlement simple for them.
Thank you, Karen and Beckie!
Very disorganized. Couldn’t return requests in a timely fashion. My father’s estate was settled in 2019 after his passing, I’m now receiving a bill in 2023.

I fired them for incompetence and failure to return calls in a timely manner. They had to transfer my power of attorney because I fired them. They billed me for that 14 months later. More incompetence.
Serious people with a heart for service
Very professional
Never got a call back

I had a terrible experience with this firm.  I have a very simple estate and Pettis Webber  wanted over $12,000 to set up a living will, last final will, power of attorney and medical directive.  I got estimates from 3 other local estate attorneys and they stated they would charge anywhere from $700 to $1200 to provide these same documents.  Also, be very carefully about going to the first initial “fact finding” interview.  The Pettis partner charged me $800 for a 2 hour interview and she spent 80% of the time talking about herself, politics, etc.  She was very condescending and argumentative.  I had a hard time trying to squeeze in a question and when I did she would get this pained, sarcastic look on her face, like what a dumb question I asked and she would just brush off my concerns/questions.  Also, do not bother filling out the 10 page packet that they will be send to you prior to the intial interview meeting.  No one at the firm bothered looking at it including the partner that interviewd me.  I thought we would be going over the packet during the interview but no one(including the partner) even bothered looking at it.  For $800 I got nothing but a bill stating “2 hour meeting $800”.  No meeting summary, no plan forward, nothing.  Also, the partner mentioned that if I agreed to their $12,000 fee, that there would also be a $6,000 annual “subscription” fee charged to keep my plan up to date.  She also mentioned that they may outsource my case to another firm and I must agree to that.  My take on that is that she would get another firm to take over my case for a much cheaper price and she would pocket the difference.  The only good thing I can say about this firm is they will serve you great cup of Starbucks coffee in there very opulent, fancy legal conference room.  Even my 1 star rating is too generous.  Look at the yelp reviews for this firm...barely above a one star. Very unprofessional, money grabbing firm in my opinion.
Can you please stop sending mailers out once a week for pointless seminars? We don’t want them. So annoying.

We were able to take our time to learn  from Pettis Webber Pacific and then have them prepare our Will for us and for our loved ones. We know we can count on them for questions that come up on occasion.

I have valued this law firm for years. They managed my late Mother’s legal matters superbly and since about 2007 they have handled 3 differed sets of legal documents for me. I appreciate their friendly, competent help.
Milton Jones
very helpful & explained things so I could understand
We contacted this law firm to do our estate planning, everything went pretty smooth and easy so we’re satisfied with the outcome. 100% recommended!
Pettit Webber did an excellent job of setting up our trust. It gives us great peace of mind to know that our estate is well taken care of and will be easy to administer for our children.
You did a great job on our trust. Thanks.
I get what I need there.

Entire Team was excellent in completing draft trust, will, home protector trust, and advanced directive and signing of documents in just under 3 weeks prior to planned heart surgery.  I didn't expect this be the case knowing this is typically a multi-month process depending on the complexity of the trust and depth of assests involved  They insisted on completing prior to surgery date, and they were able to make it happen.  Would recommend to anyone looking to setup a trust and protect assests to help to take care of aging parents and disabled siblings.
Excellent service. Karen made it easy to understand a pretty complicated business. I’m pleased that if anything happens to me Pettis has my back! Thanks again!
Worth every penny, I feel well taken care of.

We worked with Karen Webber -- Karen walked us thru the set up of our revocable living trust.  She was clear in explaining the need to specific aspects of setting up the trust.  The process was smooth and the a paperwork was created and distributed in a timely manner.  We would definitely recommend Karen to anyone who is looking to set up a trust.
Very professional and helpful!! If they don't know an answer to a question I have they find someone that will!! All around the best!!

Feedback -Our experience with PETTIS-WEBER, was smooth and reassuring. All questions we had were always answered in detail and understandable. Definitely feel thankful that we had them handle our will and living trust. Very professional.
The legal work was excellent but receipt of our completed Trust and copies required multiple calls over 3 months to finally recieve them.

Three years ago we were referred to Pettis Webber for our Trust questions. Beckie explained the process clearly and thoroughly and within a few short weeks, we had our Trust Documents in hand. Documents included :	 Certificate of Trust 	: Trust Will and Testament 	: Durable Power of Attorney 	: Health Care Directive 	  Trust Assets 	: Non-trust Assets  It was such a relief to now have docs and a process in place to save time and worry for our family in the future. Our grateful thanks to Beckie and Karen for their professionalism, courtesy, and knowledge in preparing our Estate Planning Docs.
They are caring and knowledgeable.  We found them easy to work with and we really appreciated their help & guidance.

Pettis Webber was great to work with and very professional.  Their expertise is what made me commit to getting our trusts and wills done.  There were substantial changes over the last two years, both in terms of the pandemic and internal restructuring at Pettis Webber, and they managed all of the details of our somewhat complex estate with great accuracy and attention to detail. Be sure to attend one of their free workshops to get a glimpse into the complex world of trusts and estate planning.

We redid our estate planning documents completely.  PWP did a thorough job and had good recommendations for how to accomplish our goals.  We appreciate that they followed through to get changes made on all of the accounts affected, so they are not finished when the documents are signed.  The reason for 4 stars instead of 5 is the length of time it took for them to get documents to us.

TOP NOTCH FIRM.

They handled my workman's comp case with personalism, precision, and professionalism of the utmost.
Mr. Schoenfeld showed a unique charisma that exuded an admirable confidence, accompanied by appropriate and sincere eye contact, not only with me, but with everyone I saw him engage with, and it gave me the great sense that he was passionate in fighting for justice and was a man of the people.

Every smile, genuine.
Level of interest in my situation, high & complete.
Knowledge of the law with experience, exceptional.

He explained things to me with a straight forwardness, never candy coating anything and exemplified an absolute "no-nonsense" flair.
Even with his firm growing and becoming very busy, he and his team (which BTW, his team were efficient, kind, knowledgeable, and very well spoken.), never had led me to feel as if I was one of many, and it wasn't hard to develop a sense of trust right away.

From beginning to end, the Schoenfeld team took good care of me and handled every detail with an extraordinary competence and performed in the EXACT way any litigant could ever hope for, which, in any case, I did end up winning....and with the best possible deal and outcome.
therefore,
I, more than highly, recommend Schoenfeld & Schoenfeld.

Thank you for reading and good luck to you regardless of who represents you.
Have had nothing but amazing, helpful, friendly, experiences!

I'm very impressed with the communication and service I received for my settlement. Schoenfeld and Schoenfeld presented my case and I received a full payout. I hope I don't have to do this again, however I feel confident that I will be represented well. I have already referred them to a colleague of mine and fully trust they will take great care of them.

Hello, I am very grateful for the work and help you provided, attorney Steve Schoenfeld.
The attorney is always firm, I recommend him 100%. He is a very good attorney, very responsible with his team, especially Ana Cervantes. She is very responsible with her work and she always helped me. I don't speak English, she always cleared my doubts. I would give her 10,000 or more stars.
Thank you for winning my case. I had already given up on my work accident, and thanks to Steve Schoenfeld, we won. Thank you so much for everything.

Hello, I had a wonderful experience meeting attorney Schoenfeld. During the most difficult time of my life, going through a workplace accident, everything was incredibly challenging. Through someone close to the attorney, I was able to contact him, and he and his team helped me with workers' compensation. Throughout my recovery, they were always attentive and kept me informed of every step. With their help, I was able to recover and ultimately receive compensation. Thank you to the attorney and his team; they were a tremendous help. May God always bless them for helping people like me when we need it most. Thank you to the attorney and his team; they truly change lives.
They were so helpful and patient 🙏
Amazing lawyer. I had a very positive experience

I had a great experience with the Schoenfeld team for my auto accident. They had great communication with me throughout the process and got me to a settlement in a timely manner. I will be recommending them to any friend or family member who experiences and MVA in the future!

When I was very down at the worst point in my life, after suffering a major injury at work. The future was not looking good for myself and my family. Steve Schoenfeld stood up for me when quite frankly, no one else would. He is very professional and knows everything about workers comp law. He helped us every step of the way. He did a great job. Ana and Nellie were always there to answer questions and help, and they were fantastic as well.

I contacted Schoenfeld about my case and they responded quickly. They were very professional and kept me informed of every step. They were concerned about the details and made sure that it was settled at my best interest.

I would recommend this law firm to anyone who is struggling to get the care they need from any insurance company..

Schoenfeld & Schoenfeld were so thoughtful in everything they helped my husband with on his Workman's Comp claim. We had no idea of our rights and they helped empower us so we could get what we were entitled. We would have been lost without them and their knowledge. Thank you.

I had the pleasure of working with Schoenfeld and Schoenfeld for my workers' compensation claim, and I can't recommend them enough. From start to finish, the team at Schoenfeld and Schoenfeld was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly supportive. They guided me through every step of the process, ensuring that I understood what was happening and what my options were.

Not only did Schoenfeld and Schoenfeld secure a fair settlement for me, but they also treated me with compassion and empathy throughout the entire ordeal. It was clear that they genuinely cared about my well-being and were determined to help me get the compensation I deserved.

If you're looking for a law firm that will fight for you and treat you like a person, not just another case, I highly recommend Schoenfeld and Schoenfeld. Thank you for everything!
I have had Mr. Schoenfeld and his staff represent me for 2 years. They fought hard to get me everything I needed. I wouid not hesitate to use him again

I can not thank these lawyers enough for the exceptional work they did for me. I never imagined being hurt at work let alone have to deal with Worker’s Compensation. The stress was taken off my shoulders as soon as I signed with them. They were kind, efficient, and in the end got me a settlement larger than I thought possibly. Thank you so much.

I was quite pleased with the legal representation I received from Spencer Aldrich and his paralegal Christopher when I hired them to help me when facing two motor vehicle accident claims at once. They were always accessible and provided me extensive explanation in a language I could interpret when I needed help understanding, as this was all new to me.
Good. Attorney with good advice

The team worked well at getting back to me, and keeping me posted on the next step to take.  I won my case and with it being during the covid pandemic I was impressed with how simple it was. I recommend calling them.

Hiring Spencer Aldrich was the best decision I made regarding my workers comp. claim. Spencer is such a genuinely nice person. He cares about what the client wants and will fight for his clients. As a bonus, he was always easy to contact and quick to respond to any questions I had. I would recommend Spencer Aldrich to anyone having issues with their workers comp. claim.

Steve and staff were top-notch! High recommend.

My comp case was complex and had several moving parts including balancing a third party civil suit. Steve was on top of all aspects and willing to answer my questions in great detail.

Steve is a go-getter. His aggressive and professional style was a great match for what my case needed.

You can't go wrong with Schoenfeld & Schoenfeld!

Spencer Aldrich is a tenacious and thoughtful attorney.
The Workmans Compensation process is arduous. There were many moments i remained calmer than i normally would, with his calm and knowledgeable approach to the process.
If you choose the WC journey, chooseing  Spencer to partner with  is an excellent choice.

SIDE NOTE: Esmerelda, the firms Executive Secretary is a BONUS.

Marleen

Great experience with K. Schoenfeld during an auto accident injury.  They took care of all the overwhelming paperwork and the pushy insurance companies.  They made my life easier, at a time I needed it the most.
A+ highly recommended
This law firm solves problems seamlessly and works diligently and patiently as an advocate for injured workers.  I am astounded with their knowledge and persistence and I highly recommend this firm.
I received a fair settlement after almost 2 years. Steve and team fought for me, protected my rights and saw that I got the health care I needed for my brain injury. I would recommend them to anyone.

Karen and Christopher were wonderful!  They let me know all I needed to know about PIP and every other benefit I could receive through my insurance policy.  I received a fair settlement in a little over a year.  All medical bills were paid in full. I would recommend this firm to anyone who needed PI representation.  Thanks to you both!

After my auto accident, I was getting nowhere on my own dealing with the insurance companies. They had cut off my care and offered me next to nothing for my pain and suffering. I was overwhelmed with things I didn’t understand and had all but given up. Karen Schoenfeld turned that around on day one! They were always available for questions. They obviously knew what they were doing. They took care of all the confusion AND got me a whole lot of money in the end!!! I would absolutely recommend Schoenfeld & Schoenfeld to anyone who has been hurt at the hands of others.
Esmeralda the lady I talk to on the phone was so informational and so helpful definitely would do business with them again

A good lawyer and a good person.  I used him for my workers comp claim and found him and his assistant to be approachable,  responsive and helpful. His many years of experience is very obvious.  Doctors and staff who I encountered during the process made a point to tell me how highly they regarded him.   I feel lucky that my friend referred him as my lawyer...happy to pass on my referral here!

I had a wonderful experience with the offices of Schoenfeld and Schoenfeld.  Steve took the time to explain the process to me.  My questions were always answered within a timely manner, whether by Steve or his coworkers.  I was represented amazingly, and have been recommending this office to friends and family that may be in need of the help.
I also found myself in need of Karen’s representation after a motor vehicle accident.  I revived the best representation there as well.  I recommend this office for any of your Worker’s Comp or Motor Vehicle accident where you need good representation that fits under this Law Offices expertise.  Everyone is very professional, but they care about you and your situation and you can feel it.

—————-

I came to Schoenfeld and Schoenfeld in 2017 after a pretty bad accident.  It was a lot to deal with on top of all the physical distress I was put through.  Spencer and Sal were there for me every step of the way and walked me through every step of the way.  If I had a simple or complex question,  they'll answered me promptly and were very descriptive and informative.  Had an example if I still didn't get it. They really fought for my rights. Especially my rights for the future,  being that I have permanent damage.  They were in it for the long haul and I truly am grateful and very appreciative for the help and trust I received.

Hire them! They WILL help you! You can trust them!
Spencer and his team are truly amazing.
I was struggling through the workers’ compensation process and failing miserably. My claim was denied after a year of waiting. Out of work, with minimal medical treatment, I was still badly hurt- basically stuck in a chair- horribly depressed and completely overwhelmed. I couldn’t believe this could happen to me. I was a strong, active, workaholic before I hurt my back. But at that point, I was a shell. It was one of the lowest points of my life.
I was reluctant to seek legal help because I was broke, exhausted, and at my wits end. I just wanted to give up. I didn’t know who to trust.
Calling Schoenfeld & Schoenfeld was the best decision I could have made! I was so relieved after just my first meeting with Spencer. He stuck to his word and took care of everything for me. He is one of the kindest people I’ve ever encountered. I am so grateful for all the help and support he and his office have given me. They really care!!!
It’s finally over and they were able to win a settlement amount far greater than anything I could have even let myself hope for.
These wonderful people got me my life back. Honestly, I’m not exaggerating. I can’t recommend them highly enough. Please let them help you. You don’t have to go through it alone!

I met with Spencer to discuss my situation. We chatted for a while then he gave me an overview of how things can work out and possibly options for my situation. He kept me updated about my case and was able to make things work out for me much better than I expected. I’m very happy with how he handled my case and it relieved a lot of stress. I didn’t have to do much on my end. When everything was said and done, I was in a much better place than I could’ve imagined. Before I had met with Spensor I was stressed out about my situation and had know idea how things would work out or if they would work out. I would highly recommend Spencer or someone from this company to handle your case.

Karen represented both my mother and I on a car accident claim. She has a habit of forcing her clients to take low settle amounts as long as she gets her cut. When we told her that we wanted to go to court, she said that we would have to pay her $8,000, this was not stated in he fee agreement. She is not a very honest or ethical person. She said that she couldn't fight to get us more money, but once we no longer had her as an attorney, we were offered nearly $1000 more from the insurance adjuster. And we also got in contact with one of her previous clients. Looks like she also has a habit of exploiting  non-English speakers. This client in question calculated her percentage and realized that she had charged him a lot more than she was suppose to. When he brought it to her attention, of course she denied it. And when he threatened to report her to the Oregon State board. She folded. And gave him an additional $3,000. She's not a good person. And should definitely not be practicing with unethical practices such as these.

Ms. Schoenfeld and Christopher Gorton advocated on my behalf after a car accident. Most of my communication was with Mr. Gorton and he responded to my calls and emails quickly and professionally. Ms. Schoenfeld negotiated my settlement and was able to get significantly more than expected. I highly recommend the team at Schoenfeld and Schoenfeld.

I've loved working with this firm. They are professional and knowledgeable with my case. I appreciate how patient  they've been with my questions about the process dealing with my case. I will be continuing to refer others to this firm. I highly recommend them!!

They helped me after an injury at work, it was great to have someone take over and handle things for me and help me through it, they were very informative, kept me up to date, and were able to answer all my questions thoroughly and quickly. I really appreciate Steve and his team and am very thankful for their help! Definitely would recommend this law firm, and definitely would recommend Steve and Sal!
I had an easy and fast turn around with Steve and this firm.
reviews.authorName: Laurie Lankins Farley The Pure Intuitive

reviews.text: If I could give more stars I would. The Schoenfeld's are extremely good at what they do. I'm so grateful that I had them to fight for me when things seemed a little hopeless. They are extraordinarily kind and helpful. I strongly recommend them.
Worst attorneys ever. Sat down and explained everything only to have them drop the case 3 months later. Only go here if u like wasting your time.

My case appeared to be a slam dunk but as became more complex and seemed tirelessly like it would never come to a conclusion. Christopher,  Karen's assistant from the start was supportive and was a liason between all parties involved with the case. I feel with my heart this firm never gave up on me. I feel  Christopher and Karen always listened to me even on my most difficult days. We not only had to fight one insurance company but my medical insurance company too. I received more than I thought I would receive
For my settlement. I would recommend this law firm, knowing they would give 150% to advocate and fight for you as their client.
I had a great experience with Steve as my WC attorney. Efficient and fast resolution.
The most comprehensive legal assistance I have ever had!  I would use no one else.  Steve is kind, effective and capable.  Simply the best!

When we were rear ended and our car was totaled my wife and I each suffered whiplash and she a concussion. Taking our case to Schoenfeld & Schoenfeld was the best thing we could have done. Working with Karen and the excellent staff there made the chaos of our trauma livable. They were always prompt, professional, and exceedingly accommodating. We received communications from them on a regular basis with various updates. At the end we were rewarded with the maximum possible insurance payout, and they initiated further legal actions on our behalf. Schoenfeld & Schoenfeld not only helped make us whole, they made us happy

I've read through the other reviews and a few of them stretch credulity.

I am working with Steve and all I can say is that he is an ace Lawyer. He is always prepared to give advice when necessary, proposing possible solutions with potential outcomes mapped out in advance. He went to bat for me against an insurance company and came out the victor, with what felt like relative ease.

The support staff are excellent as well and I couldn't be more happy.

Thanks.

I called for advice on a work accident a short while ago and talked to a really nice woman who was very helpful and knew what she was talking about and was very kind to me, even though there wasn't anything to do on my work accident claim then.  I called back again a week ago and learned she is gone and some guy was there.  He was not kind, was impatient and not professional.  I know time is money, but so are clients and this one will now go somewhere else.

A Defender of Constitutional Rights Against Unfair Odds

While it can feel at times, and at times rightly so, that innocence has been made irrelevant in the age of plea offers, Angus is a man, an attorney, a father and a friend,

one who  stares down the beast of our conviction industry, otherwise known as a "Justice system,"  with the upmost resolve.

​I cannot recommend Angus Lee and his firm highly enough: particularly for anyone facing deeply challenging and institutionally unfair legal battles; words cannot satsify what this man did for me, but I'll try, anyway:
​My case presented fundamentally unfair odds, involving a prosecutorial approach where the pursuit of conviction was coursed to eclipse the essential search for truth and justice. The system I faced demonstrated a concerning disregard for key evidence, driven instead by ideology and entrenched biases. It was in this incredibly difficult environment that Angus Lee fought, not just for my freedom, but for the very integrity of my constitutional rights.
​Mr. Lee fought untiringly. He was relentlessly prepared and strategically brilliant, pushing back against the prosecution's institutional power like an army of one. His tenacity was so effective that he was even regarded by the opposing prosecutor as the most aggressive defense attorney she had ever encountered. This exhaustive effort led to the prosecution being compelled to offer five plea deals, two of which were offered discreetly and under the table. This level of resilience and expertise provided unwavering support during what was the most taxing period of my life. Witnessing his work was a masterclass in how to defend constitutional rights against an institutional apparatus seemingly hard at work to deteriorate them.
​Angus Lee is more than just a lawyer; he is a dedicated, principled, and formidable bulwark for justice. If you need representation that is prepared to take on the most difficult and biased circumstances with skill, dedication, and integrity, look no further.

He eventually managed to pummel an impossibly skewed case down enough that the plea agreed upon between my accuser and I outweighed the risk of a trial.

I have many regrets in life, selecting Angus to defend me will never be one of them.

From the bottom of my heart, on behalf of my fiance, my brother, my mother, my friends and loved ones, thank you for what you did, and how far you were willing to take my fight. May God bless and keep you and yours Mr. Angus Lee.

Last thing: Angus was completely ready and prepared to take my case to trial, and a big part of him wanted to. Accepting a plea offer was a somber moment shared between us... but that is the exact attitude that you need in an attorney who is fighting for your freedom. Angus is a warrior first, and a defender second; amid a trial, it is my perception, you will find no substitute for Angus Lee.

reviews.ownerResponse:
We appreciate all feedback — even the mysterious one-star kind. It’s not uncommon for people who have been on the losing end of a case, or who simply don’t like that we fight hard for our clients, to leave a drive-by review without explanation.

For the record, this reviewer was never a client of our firm. We’ll take this lone one-star review as a badge of honor — proof that we’re doing our job well and delivering results that make an impression.

To our actual clients: thank you for trusting us to fight for you. We’ll keep working relentlessly for justice, one case (and apparently one disgruntled stranger) at a time.

My case was exceptionally difficult, with potential for very bad social, business, and legal consequences. Finally, under heavy questioning by Angus in a video deposition, the alleged victim conceded many facts for the record, some of which he admitted were obscured or false in earlier statements, including some given to the police. As a result, my actions finally became clear as legal self defense. After complete dismissal of the criminal prosecution, Angus secured dismissal of a civil lawsuit the alleged victim had filed seeking monetary damages. Included in the court record with the civil case dismissal was a signed and notarized apology letter from the alleged victim stating, in part, "Please accept this letter as a formal apology for my actions and for the trouble they have caused. I hope that we can move forward from this incident and that I can demonstrate through my future actions that I have learned from this experience." Apology accepted.

Thank you Angus Lee for saving my freedom, my family business, and my reputation. Thank you for reminding us we are all human, and we all make mistakes. reviews.text: On a lazy Sunday morning after a late night BBQing with friends, I found my home being surrounded by SWAT and being called out at gun point by a bullhorn and then arrested. I have never been in trouble with the law and all of sudden my quiet suburban home was being targeted. The next day, in jail, I was charged with an additional class A felony and then several protection orders from my mentally ill, drugged out, ex-girlfriend of 3 years. I spent the next couple weeks getting referrals and vetting attorneys to find the best representation I could find, that was Angus Lee. Over the course of the following year, he was able to expertly expose that my accuser had a daily secret cocaine habit, had not been taking her meds for months, was suicidal, mentally unstable, and had a repeated pattern of abusing the legal system, against men, to avoid having to work. The end result was that all the charges were dropped, all protection orders were withdrawn, and my family now has a protection order against the "alleged victim". After going through this horrible process, I can say that if you are a male in WA you already have a target on your back, and if you somehow find yourself in the crosshairs of the legal machine, get the best representation you can, it can save your life. For me, the best, was Angus Lee.

Angus Lee has restored my hope in the judicial system. My brother was falsely charged with 4 counts of vehicular homicide by the state of Washington in 2019. Despite there being essentially no evidence linking my brother to the scene of the accident that left 2 people deceased, the state continued to pursue the charges.

I’m so thankful my brother choose Angus because he was the only lawyer that predicted the narrative behind the state’s accusations, and with confidence, provided great insight of the state’s motive in the matter. Every other lawyer he interviewed said that the state didn’t have a case and that this would be an easy win. Well, 4 1/2 years later of a long battle that was settled in trial, my brother was exonerated of all charges thanks to a jury that unanimously voted NOT GUILTY. Due to the severity of the charges and the prosecutor’s adamant accusations, I’m convinced that this verdict never would have resulted without Mr. Lee’s knowledge, precision, and unwavering dedication.

If you are in a legal predicament and needing an intelligent discerning lawyer who has the endurance to defend, protect, and uphold truth, then you found the right man. Angus is a man of integrity, and conducts himself in a professional manner. In addition, he is a down to earth individual who is relatable and connects with his clients, fighting relentlessly on their behalf.

Watching an innocent family member fight for their freedom was a heart wrenching experience. You feel powerless and all you can do is just pray that the truth will one day prevail. Through great detail, wisdom, and authority, Angus brought that truth to light and disassembled a false narrative saving years of my brother’s life. I am eternally grateful to Angus and would highly recommend his counsel and guidance to anyone being falsely charged of a crime.
reviews.ownerResponse: It was my pleasure to fight this case and to get to know all of you in the process.

reviews.text: Four and a half years ago, the state of Washington attempted to charge my little brother with four counts of vehicular homicide, two of which were for driving under the influence and two for reckless driving. Upon arriving to the collision scene which involved my brothers roommate at the time, and a woman in a BMW, the Vancouver PD made false accusations that my brother and his roommate were racing on their motorcycles, which inevitably took his roommates life, as well as the women in the BMW. After my brother informed me he had a good feeling about Mr. Lee, he hired him and Angus promptly started a thorough investigation to free my brother on all four charges. The state offered my brother a plea bail where they would drop two of the charges, still serving him 8 years in prison. My brother turned down the plea bail, which meant he would be going to trial. The trial got pushed off for years due to “finding more evidence” on behalf of the state and Covid. After gathering substantial evidence, including police reports where one officer wrote a false statement saying my brother struck both vehicles, and later amended his claim, gathering professional witnesses to measure his speed with accuracy etc, amongst multiple other pieces of vital evidence, Mr. Lee was able to drop two of the charges by the judge.  Finally, the jury was convinced that my brother was in fact, not guilty on ALL counts of vehicular homicide. There couldn’t have been a better way to end this year. No amount of money could repay Mr. Lee for the peace he gave not only my brother, but also, our family. We gained a lifelong friend from this and true justice for my brother, so he can finally live his life as a free man.

I wish I could give Angus 100 stars. I was being wrongfully accused of felony crimes that were outrageous and untrue. When I initially met with Angus he was the only lawyer who really took my case seriously. All the other lawyers I presented it to just shrugged it off and thought it would be an easy win, and would probably never even make it to a trial. But Angus knew what the state is capable of, and where their motives lie.

Angus navigated my highly complicated case with extreme precision. His background as a prosecutor really helps guide his decisions and gives excellent insight as to what these prosecutors might do. My case was one of pure injustice and Angus really took it to heart and I believed it really fueled his fire. My case took four years to make it to trial, and during that time Angus counseled me every step of the way. His efforts pre-trial secured that we would have a fair trial. His attention to detail is unmatched. He secured an abundance of motions that really forced the state into a corner they couldn't get out of. The amount of work he puts in just goes to show how much he cares about his clients and their liberties as a citizen. During the trial he really commanded a presence that everyone could feel. His clarity and sound arguments won the show.

I don't think any other lawyer would have successfully navigated my case, because of the foundation of lies the state was using against me. I sincerely believe I would be in prison right now if it weren't for him. I am eternally grateful for this man. He is a true American and a voice for the people against tyranny. Beyond just his credentials and expertise, which are impeccable, he really cares about his clients. He's fun and personable, but knows when to be serious and counsel with excellent discernment.

If you want the best outcome for yourself and are in a battle for your life and liberty as I was, choose this man. He will conquer and prevail.

reviews.text: I was being investigated for very serious felonies (ultimately charged with four felony crimes) and my employer of 16 years had just placed me on leave.  I was panicked and didn't know what to do.  I called a local attorney in Longview that I knew and he recommended Angus Lee as he thought he would be better able to represent my interests.  High praise from one lawyer to another.  My first interaction with Angus set the tone.  He was confident, compassionate, and had a very solid game-plan.  He believed in me.  After he took my case, he gave me advice that I will never forget.  He told me that “these cases go on for a long time and will literally break some people.  Go get close to God, go out and live your life and know that I literally have your back, Chad trust me-I got this”.  It was as if God himself reached down from the heavens and took the load off me right then and there, which he did.  His compassion and understanding cemented my confidence in him as a person and I learned to absolutely trust in his abilities as a lawyer.  My case was a bit unique, but he had the polygrapher lined up (which affirmed the fact I didn’t do anything wrong), investigators, and expert-witnesses.  He pulled all the right levers and pushed all the right buttons at the right times.  When I was stuck in the moment, he was 10 steps ahead of me and about 11 ahead of the prosecutor.  He always reminded, me “I got you”.  After 8 months of methodically and passionately, destroying all the State’s "so-called" evidence, the State moved to dismiss all charges against me.  In the end, what was uncovered was what I had been saying all along, I had done nothing wrong.  At my age, a conviction on any of the charges would have been the equivalent to a life sentence.  God sent me Angus and I can’t say enough about his integrity, work-ethic, skill, and compassion.  He cared for me and hurt when I hurt but he always stayed focused with the end in mind.  If ever you find yourself in the proverbial “fox-hole” of the criminal justice system, fighting for your life and you need a skilled warrior in the “fox-hole” next to you, get D. Angus Lee.  I thank God for him daily.     Chad Connors

Title: “Law Dawg beat three felonies and set me free”

I hired David “Law Dawg” Wallace after I was hit with three over‑the‑top felony charges driven by some very angry cops and a district attorney who absolutely would not let go.  From day one David was fair, compassionate, totally transparent about the strategy, and in constant communication through nearly a year of court dates.  He charged me a single flat fee and told me a good lawyer should already know what a proper defense will cost, so I never had to worry about surprise billable hours or being nickel‑and‑dimed if I wanted better representation .
David showed up prepared to every hearing, calmly walked me through each step, and never once made me feel like just another case file.  Then one afternoon he called and opened with, “Good afternoon, buddy. We win—case dismissed, all charges dropped.”  Hearing those words from your lawyer is something you never forget. If you’ve never had an attorney call to tell you your nightmare is over, you owe it to yourself to give David Wallace a chance to fight for you the way he fought for me!!! 🤙🤔
Signed,
Kevin G.

Sadly, I had the opposite experience of ShadowJester November 2025 review.

Wallace was attentive up to my hearing, but then he remained silent during my hearing, no objection, no witness preparation, no concern to listen to my story and how the case escalated to a hearing in judicial system.

Was not attentive, appeared hungover.  And then advised me to perform an illegal action that would have put me in jail.

Oh yes, he was paid.

Put trust and hope in his words, all for basically a no-show to my hearing.

Strongly encourage anyone reading to keep looking for an attorney that can walk the talk. No reason to disappoint yourself.

You are pathetic, this is a review not slander.  You look so silly acting out over an honest review.  Putting your unprofessional behavior on full display.

My review is not a ridiculous lie.

Your defending statements are so not factual.  Clearly out of anger.

I own my behavior, can you own yours. Without deflecting.

Take your own advice and take a very hard look in the mirror regarding your behavior as an under-performing, over-optimistic, unprepared attorney.  You failed big time by not being prepared or preparing your witnesses.

These reviews are provided by experiences offered by businesses and their performance of such business.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Oh Heather, let's be VERY real about your situation. You contacted me after your neighbor obtained a stalking order against you THAT YOU THEN PROCEEDED TO VIOLATE TWICE THE SAME DAY. The police had to arrest you. You got TWO contempt of court charges against you before our contested hearing date. You would later plead guilty to BOTH of those counts. (BTW this was the work of your super smart lawyer that said the Order you got was illegal)

We met multiple times, not only in person at the courthouse to prepare you as a witness, but also over Zoom and/or the phone to prepare you to testify. And when we got to court, do you know what the Judge said? YOU, Heather, YOU LACK CREDIBILITY. He didn't believe YOU. He saw the photographs of you stalking your neighbor and did not believe YOUR story.

Your neighbor came and testified to his experience, and another neighbor in the neighborhood testified that she had to move away from the neighborhood because of you. The Petitioner also alleged you tried to run him over with your car. Again, the Judge believed HIM and not YOU.

So before you go around blaming other people for not rescuing you from your own behavior and circumstances you may want to take a long gander in the mirror before you slander an attorney. The next ridiculous lie that you try to post on either this site or another one will be met with legal action.
