He’s been extremely helpful every step of the way, and even went above and beyond by not charging me for a dispute I had something I truly appreciate.

David is professional, sincere, and truly gets things done. He is the kind of attorney who cares about his clients, not just their cases. I highly recommend him to anyone in need of a trustworthy and compassionate lawyer who will stand by you and handle your case with both skill and heart.

Working with David Wallace has been an outstanding experience from start to finish. His flexibility and commitment to his clients truly set him apart—he consistently makes himself available, adapting to changing circumstances and complex case developments with professionalism and ease.

David’s technical proficiency is remarkable. He demonstrates a deep understanding of intricate legal frameworks and uses that expertise to craft strategic, well-reasoned approaches that inspire confidence. Even in the most complex and high-stakes cases, he provides clear guidance, breaking down challenging legal concepts into practical, understandable terms.

What impressed me most was his dedication and calm under pressure. No matter how complicated the situation became, David navigated every twist with precision and empathy, ensuring I always felt supported and informed.

If you’re seeking a lawyer who combines exceptional skill, flexibility, and genuine care for his clients, I wholeheartedly recommend David Wallace. He’s not just a legal expert—he’s a true advocate who goes above and beyond to achieve the best possible outcome.

I had a very negative experience with attorney David Wallace. He was referred to me through the Modest Means program but immediately attempted to charge a minimum of $4,500 just to handle a restraining order — an amount far outside the purpose and intent of that program. Multiple attorneys have since confirmed that his pricing was highly inflated compared to industry standards. Based on this, I chose not to retain his services.

Shortly after, Mr. Wallace appeared to represent the opposing party in the same matter — a serious breach of confidentiality and professional ethics. He claimed this was “reasonable” and even denied in court that he charges clients, demonstrating a willingness to make false statements before a judge. As a result, he was ultimately forced to recuse himself from the case.

During our phone consultation, Mr. Wallace was not trauma-informed and made dismissive, inappropriate remarks, including stating how much he “loves restraining orders.” This comment was deeply unprofessional and insensitive given the seriousness of my situation.

He later appeared in court twice on the related matter, both times arriving unprepared and behaving unprofessionally. He attempted to deny an obvious conflict of interest until I presented proof in front of the judge. Additionally, his firm’s website is nonfunctional, which further reflects a lack of professionalism and attention to detail.

Based on my experience, I cannot recommend Mr. Wallace’s services, particularly for anyone seeking a supportive, competent, and ethical attorney. Clients deserve legal representation that is professional, prepared, and trustworthy — qualities Mr. Wallace unfortunately did not fell far short of literally and figuratively.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Several statements in this review are false. I am not a Modest Means attorney and never have been. I’m listed only with the OSB Lawyer Referral Service. You were not my client: no fee was paid, and no engagement agreement was signed. I explained my standard flat fee pricing of $3,000 to $4,500 based on the complexity of the case; no one was ‘charged.’ If you don’t like my pricing, you’re free to hire another attorney.

Regarding court, I was on time and prepared. I won’t discuss confidential specifics here. Comments about attire are irrelevant.

Please correct or remove the false statements.

reviews.text: I’ve worked with David Wallace multiple times in court, and every time his knowledge, experience, and professionalism have led to the best possible results. I highly recommend him — he’s truly one of the best attorneys around. I wouldn’t go anywhere else.
This is the second time I have used the Wallace Law firm. Was an absolute professional in the court room and out. Highly recommended!

I was rear ended in an accident that almost totaled my car and left me with lingering injuries. I have no idea what I'm supposed to in these situations so a friend referred me to David. David essentially took the reins and his attention to detail saved me from being taken advantage of by low balling insurance companies who were racing to get me to waive my abilities to be made fully whole again. Without his involvement I probably would have listened to the insurance companies and would never have gotten the actual care and compensation I need. If you want someone who takes the case personally and walks you through every single part of the process then David's your guy.
Very easy to work with and very knowledgeable, you can put your confidence in Mr. Wallace

David is an excellent lawyer and I highly recommend him to others. He quickly helped us with our court case and he thoroughly prepared our daughter for the very stressful experience. He explained the information and the details to us that we needed to be prepared. Of course he won our case and his expertise made the other lawyer look extremely unprofessional. He continues to answer our questions and guide us through this process. We are very thankful for him.
David was very knowledgeable and was able to help me navigate my case successfully. I would definitely recommend him and use him for other legal matters.

Mr. Wallace restored my gun rights and after the Oregon state police decided to refuse to comply with the order he took them to court. We’re now going to the Supreme Court after we won in the lower court and it looks like we’re continuing to win in the court of appeals. I would 10/10 recommend.

Was able to get some good evidence Wallace law firm
Vary helpful and kind person

My 17-year-old daughter found herself in a difficult situation and needed urgent legal help. We were referred to Mr. Wallace through the Oregon State Bar—an experience that was challenging on its own. After reaching out to several attorneys with little to no response, Mr. Wallace stood out right away by getting back to us promptly and showing a genuine willingness to help.

From our first interaction, he was professional, compassionate, and incredibly thorough. He carefully explained every possible outcome and scenario, which was especially helpful since we had never been through a legal situation before. What really made a difference was his ability to speak professionally while still connecting with my daughter on a personal level. He didn’t talk down to her or treat her like “just a teenager”—instead, he made her feel comfortable and heard, like she was talking to someone she could trust. That approach made an incredibly stressful time feel more manageable.

What truly set Mr. Wallace apart from the rest was his flat-rate fee structure. While most attorneys charge by the hour, his upfront and transparent pricing gave us peace of mind. We never felt like we were being taken advantage of, and his honesty and integrity were clear from the start.

Though the case ended up taking much longer than expected—including having to refile everything at one point—Mr. Wallace stayed committed throughout. He was consistently prepared for every court appearance, maintained clear communication, and was always easy to reach when we had questions or concerns. He responded to all parties promptly and handled everything with professionalism and care. His deep knowledge of the law was apparent every step of the way.

Without a doubt, Mr. Wallace is the best attorney. We’re beyond grateful for his dedication, support, and the peace of mind he provided during such a challenging time. I will definitely be referring him to all my friends and family. Thank you Mr Wallace.

“Better call Saul” more like better call David Wallace. I was involved in a MVA. My son and I both walked away with injuries from the accident. Lucky for me I had a family member refer me to David Wallace. I had bad anxiety during the whole ordeal. I didn’t know if I was going to walk away with debt or if my back was ever going to get better or if and when I was going to be able to get back work. David walked me through the process every step of the way. He was always there to answer my text, call, email. He knew what I was going through and probably reassured me everything was going to be ok more times then he should have, but he was always there. My battle lasted about 7 months and I ended up walking away with the max pay out. He even fought and negotiated my medical bills after everything what set and done which is not something all the layers do. I really felt he genuinely cared for me and my son. I would highly recommend him. I didn’t just walk away with a bunch of money, I walked away with a friend I can count on for legal council. Thank you David!

Recently I found myself in need of a lawyer. Through the Oregon State Bar, I was referred to David Wallace. He called me and we discussed my situation. Having never needing a lawyer, or been in this type of spot, I certainly had some anxiety and concerns. But David eased my fears, communicated with me every step of the way, and came up with a solution I had not thought possible. I felt fortunate to have David in my corner. And I would not hesitate to hire him again or recommend him to anyone in need of legal help. Thank you David.

David provided invaluable assistance in navigating the complexities of the court system. His expertise and guidance significantly eased my anxiety. He is knowledgeable, personable, and prompt, and clearly shows a genuine concern for his clients' well-being. I cannot overstate the importance of his presence and support throughout my legal process.
Dave is an amazing lawyer he made my experience easy. Highly recommended he knows what he’s doing.

The lawyer David  Wallace He amazing lawyer he is dedicated to he is work.he always made sure to answer my questions and he would explain to me to make sure I understand and that was really helpful.He always would keep me informed.I was very satisfied with the outcome of my case. I highly recommend him.

I was involved in a MVA and Mr Wallace handled my case with the utmost care. He made sure I was fairly compensated and in a timely manner. David was professional in every sense of the word; prompt, courteous, clear communication, and fought hard for my case. I would highly recommend his services for any of your legal needs!

David gave me a lot of helpful information and was very knowledgeable about my situation even though it's not his normal area of law. I had been trying to get legal advice and help for about a month for my case and every other avenue was a dead end but he gave me some places to start that I had no idea were potentially available to me. Thank you David!

Very happy that I hired David. He helped calm my nerves as it was the first time I’ve ever been on the stand in a court room. He made the legal process make sense. Truly, if I didn’t have David I don’t think I would have gotten the outcome I wanted.
Great lawyer. He helped me with a car accident. Always maintains communication and got the best return for me. Recommend!

I had the distinct pleasure of working with David Wallace, and I can confidently say that he is an exceptional lawyer who goes above and beyond for his clients. His extensive knowledge of legal frameworks, combined with a strategic and practical approach, made navigating complex legal matters incredibly manageable.

David was always thorough and diligent in his work, providing clear explanations of the legal processes while ensuring that I remained informed at every step. His attention to detail, coupled with his excellent communication skills, provided a sense of trust and confidence in the legal decisions that needed to be made.

What stood out the most was his ability to anticipate potential issues and proactively address them, ensuring the best possible outcome for my business and personal legal needs. His professionalism, dedication, and unwavering commitment to his clients' success make him a standout in his field.

I highly recommend David Wallace for anyone seeking legal counsel that is both expert and personable.

- Dr. Jacqueline Hudson Parsons

I recently had the pleasure of working with Mr. Wallace after a car crash, and I couldn't be more grateful for his exceptional service. From the moment I reached out, Mr. Wallace was incredibly supportive and guided me through every step of the legal process. He was always available to answer my questions, provide clear explanations, and ensure I understood all my options. His expertise and dedication made a challenging situation much more manageable. I highly recommend Mr. Wallace for anyone in need of a skilled and compassionate attorney.

i was happy with how david handled my custody and parenting time case. I got everything i wanted that was within reason. He is also very knowledgeable and explained a lot that i didn’t understand and made the experience go smoother

David Wallace is definitely someone you want working on your case! (and most importantly in trial) He helped me get a restraining order on my abusive ex and has been in court with me for my child custody case. I really appreciate how upfront he was and explained to me all possible outcomes in my situation. I also loved how I was able to speak to him about my case and didn’t have to pay unlike other attorneys where you have to set up a consultation and pay a fee for them to hear you out. He’s made my terrible experience (many trials & lots of headaches) go more smoothly!

David gave me great advice, even though I didn't end up needing to hire him. His explanations were straightforward and thorough, and he suggested things my other attorney didn't seem to know about. He was kind and empathetic, which is a big plus in a personal injury attorney. If I have another issue I need help with, I will definitely call David first.

Wow!  David did the impossible and we are grateful for having met him.  We were told upfront by David, as well as others, that being granted a Stalking Protection Order against an adjoining neighbor is very rare. Yet David made it happen.  David's knowledge of the law, court process and valuable evidence were key. We did a lot of the 'footwork' and provided David with as much information as we could.  Our history, experiences, pictures, documents, reports and videos.  David has a mastery for weeding out the evidence that is irrelevant and focuses on the key evidence that wins cases. David was genuinely interested in our case and asked lots of questions to fully understand our past experiences and importance of our petition. David is easy to talk to and work with.  We would highly recommend David to anyone and would retain him again if ever needed.

I am writing this review in hopes of anyone looking for an excellent and experienced lawyer see it. I met David several months ago and explained my legal issues. He listened, listed options and gave me a time frame to expect. He not only delivered, but resolved my matter in a professional and quick manner. What sold me on David was his confidence and knowledge and now I understand where it comes from. Thank you David Wallace!

I hired David to defend a contested restraining order that I had petitioned on an abusive person in my life, successfully. I had spoken with several offices prior to our initial phone call. Some wanted me to put down a substantial retainer before I even got to speak with one of their lawyers, some seemed eager to have me pay a relatively inexpensive rate for a quick sale on a newer/inexperienced attorney, and some needed to charge me a few hundred for the initial consultation. A couple of others gave me a free consultation but it didnt seem that they had a niche in the particular type of restraining order I had petitioned. While I respect that there are myriad business models out there, David's appealed to me because his initial consultation was free to hear me out (before I knew that I wanted to hire him), he immediately spoke with competence and wisdom regarding the particulars of my case, and his "flat fee" model was unique and attractive. His price seemed fair in the end (I could have spent less, I could have spent more) but was well justified by his experience. The fact that this case may have been dragged out into additional hours was eased by me knowing that I would never be charged for anything extra regardless of how long it took. It is my understanding that many attorneys will nickel and dime you to hire them for additional "surprise" hours and may even lie/pressure you about the false need for it, but David (who is aware of the ill-perception of attorney practices) found a creative flat-fee solution to control for this. The flat-fee structure means that he sees the job through to the end regardless of how long it takes. You know that one honest mechanic that you recommend to all of your peers because it seems that every other one out there has a history of trying to sell you extra services that you didnt need but were naive about? Well David can well be compared to that honest mechanic but for the world of lawyers. He seemed to have had an "indie" vibe to him as opposed to the mainstream giant law office lawyers I had interviewed prior to. Regardless, he was able to be confrontational to my opponent as I needed him to be and very knowledgeable. Its clear that even though I strongly considered being self-represented (which David even suggested that I reasonably could and didnt *need* to hire anyone), my case was stronger because I had him fighting it for me. The numerous amounts of evidence I had were more organized and presented to a stronger effect much to the chagrin of my opponent.  I'll say it again: his price structure and business model give him more integrity than other lawyers since it removes the incentive for billing for additional "surprise" hours. There isnt any real way for him to take advantage of his clients this way and I think that that's worth its weight on its own.

Dave is the best, he has been my go to for 5+ years now & I cannot recommend him enough!
I trust Dave to help guide me in the right direction & although these situations can be stressful, knowing I had him on the job definitely put my mind at ease. He will make sure you’re taken care of above anything else!

One of the best attorneys in the business! Sharp, witty, a quick thinker. All good qualities for when it’s time to show teeth and get the job down. I will return to Wallace Law Firm should I ever need him again. Many thanks for a successful case!

Dave is such a breath of fresh air! He really leads his communication from a heart centered space and is unafraid to throw in a tasteful dash of sarcasm and realism every so often. His way of being helps to tactfully ease the tense nature of his work in law, and is just a rockstar in de-escalation and clear reasoning. One of my absolute favorite people of all time! He's definitely made it on my "Best Man" roster if I do ever get married! If you don't love him, you're the problem.

Mr. Wallace was a pleasure to work with from the very first call. If you’re looking for an attorney that has the drive, honesty and experience in your corner, Mr. Wallace is the right one for you.

When I was searching for experienced attorneys, Mr. Wallace stood out a shoulder above the rest. He was naturally informative and in addition to citing case law he had a host of prior similar cases to mine he had already litigated with success. He quickly turned the arduous circumstances of my case into a generous settlement.

Going forward, I consider myself a long term client and friend of Mr. Wallace and will recommending others to do the same!

If you are looking for an attorney who is patient in giving you the time you need to understand legal intricacies, understanding, knowledgeable, and compassionate about justice, look no further! Mr. Wallace has been an amazing attorney and a great human being who is accessible, affordable, and effective.

Mr Wallace and his team helped me and a colleague through the most stressful three years of my life. I never thought going through the court system would be so difficult to understand, but David and his team explained everything to me, even after I was reluctant to proceed. David was not intimidated by a much larger law firm, he did great for me. Would definitely recommend Wallace Law Firm.

I am so impressed with David Wallace. You can tell he knows what he is talking about and he loves his job.  He took my call listened to my legal issues and had straight forward answers and actually pointed me to some very valuable resources on OSB website to try and get my situations resolved on my own if possible. David Wallace is a rare find I felt listened to and respected and he even doubled checked to ensure I had jotted down some very important legal information and filing dates to be mindful of to avoid missing the statutes of limitations. You can tell he really cares about helping people I will absolutely hire him.

David is a friendly attorney and he is very knowledgeable. You want him by your side when you go to trials.  He is very experienced with strategic thinking. I will not hesitate to use his service again.

David Wallace was the absolute best attorney I’ve ever had the pleasure of working with. I’ll be honest I thought my case was dicey at best. He turned it in to a slam dunk. He did so well I actually never even had to testify, it got tossed before we got to that point. If I ever need an attorney again, first place I’m going is the Wallace Law firm.

Mr. Wallace is a fine attorney. He is extremely conscientious and attentive to his client's needs, and makes suggestions to aid in your legal decisions. He is an excellent listener and addresses all of your questions with the complete and thorough explanations.

I initially had a consultation with Attorney White and he did respond to a couple of follow up emails shortly afterward. However, despite repeated attempts to reach him later with a time sensitive follow up question still within the stated consultation period, I received no response by email or phone. Ultimately, the lack of follow up and communication led me to seek counsel elsewhere
Tanya was my attorney and she’s excellent ❤️❤️❤️her.

I worked with Mr. Daniel White, on my H1b processing and continued immigration status for about 2 years in a row. This firm is one of the very best in PNW! They reply to all your queries within 24 hours. Very efficient in paperwork and timely submission. As an immigrant they helped explain all the process patiently in layman's terms and where point-on for all the application process. Highly recommended attorney services!
Tanya Shepherd helped me immensely, as did their whole office (thanks June!). Very professional, efficient, and great pricing for their services. Highly recommended.

I highly recommend Tanya Shepherd as an immigrant lawyer. We have been struggling with immigration with the previous lawyer for more than 10 years and our case did not go anywhere. After we switched to Tanya, she is so wonderful and explained things clearly and thoroughly. All the paper work that was needed to be done, she did it right. We are glad and thankful that we found her. After 4 years with Tanya helped me, things were on the right track and we finally achieved our goal. From now on, I will send anyone who needs immigration consultation to her.

My wife and I researched many law firms to represent us in a serious and complicated car accident in which were not at fault. Keith Shepherd was our choice and what a great choice that turned out to be! His expertise, experience, and wisdom guided us to a great outcome for a case lasting three years. Keith is not only a great attorney but also a kind, honest, and caring human being. Know with confidence that Keith Sheperd is a winner!!

I worked with Keith Shepherd as my attorney for about 3 years after a car accident in 2016 that left me with long term injuries. He was helpful, kind, and knowledgeable. I appreciated his prompt communication, and everyone in the office that I have interacted with was professional and kind. I spoke with his paralegal on several occasions, and appreciated their communication as a staff. I could really tell everyone was on the same page and it made it easier when I had a question because Alma was already familiar enough with my case to be able to answer most questions I had without waiting for a call back from Keith if he wasn’t available. The receptionist is friendly and genuinely kind and thoughtful, I recall her jumping up to open the door for me and bringing me tissues once when I was speaking tearfully.

In 2018 I was rear-ended while sitting in my parked vehicle. The other insurance company was denying liability. I contacted White & Shepard to inquire about my rights. Keith was extremely helpful and knowledgeable;  he gave me guidance  and  answered my concerns I wasn't even a client. A few weeks later I hired him. Throughout my case,  Keith and his staff kept me informed and were always professional and responded quickly to my concerns. Last year I contacted Keith again; I was the victim in a road rage accident where the driver shot out my back window. Keith  was not accepting new clients at that time, but helped me through this anyway. I cannot refer or recommend White & Shepard's lawfirm enough! Excellent firm, well educated attorneys on the laws  and a superb staff. If you need help navigating through a car accident, please reach out to this firm, you will be in good hands.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much for the kind words!  It is much appreciated.  We will always be here for you if you ever need us.

reviews.text: Tanya and her team been working with me for almost 5 years and they are great helpful and work professional I love this place so much. No need to worry just let them work on your case no matter how situations look like they always make it perfect for you!

I contacted Keith Sheppard. He responded quickly. He knew exactly what I was asking whenever I asked a question. In short, he was efficient and educated in his area of law expertise. I highly recommend him. He is a quick and competent problem solver.

Keith represented my wife and I after a pretty severe car accident. He was thoughtful, professional and easy to work with. His staff was wonderful as well. The entire process was top notch. A 10 out of 10, we would absolutely recommend him.
Keith and his staff made this whole process smooth and easy. He explained each step and took all the stress away....Thank you!!

Mr. Shepherd is an excellent attorney - very knowledgeable and detailed.  My wife and I were involved in a long-standing land zoning dispute with our local municipality.  Keith offered us excellent advice on how to deal with the matter.  After eight months of frustration, and following Keith's advice,  the situation was resolved in our favor this past July.  I definitely recommend Mr. Shepherd's services.  He is very professional, ethical and detail-oriented. Steve T.
Awesome attorney. I would highly recommend them for your personal injury case.

A year ago I was rear-ended on I-5 by a distracted driver, which totaled my two year old Volvo and caused minor painful injuries.  A few weeks after the accident, the other driver’s insurance company contacted and gave me an insanely low figure for the value of my car.  When I protested they said,  “Listen, we do this for a living so you’re not going to get a dollar more.”  It was then when I felt outnumbered and overwhelmed and I knew I needed a lawyer who would fight for me.  Mr. Keith Shepherd was that lawyer.  He and his staff negotiated a settlement for the car that was thousands higher than the initial offer and got me a generous settlement for my pain and suffering.  I highly recommend Keith Shepherd of White and Shepherd located in Beaverton, for his integrity and tenacity.

After being injured from another party rear ending and totaling my car, the other party's insurance company (Farmers) balked at taking responsibility for their insured, I consulted several attorneys. Most who I spoke with were more the ambulance chasing stereotypes that we all have heard about and mistrust, that is with the exception of Keith Shepherd.

Keith was forthcoming about why Farmers was dragging their feet and gave me clear information on how to proceed either on my own or with his services. His explanation of the process was clear and complete as well as in terms that I could easily understand. I did end up using his services and am extremely pleased with how he handled my case. He is an honest, fair and reputable attorney just as his reviews reflect.

If you find yourself in need of legal assistance, I highly recommend Keith Shepherd.

Keith is the most compassionate, knowledgeable and trustworthy attorney I’ve ever worked with. My husband was injured in a car accident and we felt very desperate while dealing with insurance companies who were clearly not interested in his well-being. Keith not only helped us navigate the injury side of our claim, but also helped with the property side of things—which was HUGE for us. If we hadn’t called Keith, I honestly think we would have been paid next to nothing for a totaled car and would be paying out of pocket for my husband’s medical bills.

I talked with several lawyers about a conflict I've been dealing with. Mr. White was the first genuine person I felt I could have a normal conversation with. I really appreciated his honesty and his ability to clearly convey his perspective to me. He game me some practical and helpful tips I could try on my own before hiring him. Should things not work out, I will be returning. Thanks!

I am so happy with my experience with this firm. All of the people here are amazing. One of the most important things to me was the fact that I got personal service. I never got the feeling that I was unimportant. My case was small but they acted like it was huge.
This firm was recommended to me by my chiropractor Dr. Kimberly DeAlto and she was correct, great people. Mr. Sheppard helped me deal with the insurance company and he went above and beyond. One could say he did it for the money, but he DIDN'T.  Mr. Sheppard did what was right and never asked for
more money when he could have. This firm is very ethical and family friendly. I recommend this firm to everyone and anyone I encounter. Thank you Mr. Sheppard you are an angel and I am grateful to you.

Gamboa Law Firm was recommended to me after my first car accident, wherein I had been rear-ended by a driver with insufficient insurance. I met with more than one attorney's office, but it was Adam Gamboa who sat down with me personally and mapped out the procedures and my options with clarity and honesty. I have since had the misfortune to need his representation again, and Adam and his expert team have guided me through the complexities smoothly, ensuring I was able to receive necessary medical care throughout the process. I cannot say enough about the integrity and thoroughness of the support I have received. I recommend Gamboa Law Firm to everyone and anyone in need of representation when navigating personal injury.

I was given Adam's name after a really awful car crash, and having never been in the situation wasn't really sure what to do. Adam was patient in explaining each step of the process, consulting me to make sure I was comfortable with each decision and backing me up when the insurance company was being elusive (shocker). I really appreciated his help navigating a scary time and taking some of the pressure off of figuring out what I needed to do so I could focus on healing. Would definitely recommend Adam!

I found Adam Gamboa based on a recommendation of a friend.  He did not disappoint.  He ran me through what his professional recommendation was, his fee, and how the general flow of my case could go.  He was honest and accurate on every aspect we discussed.  I would not hesitate to use him again or recommend him to family or friends.

Adam Gamboa is an excellent attorney. My case was complicated and a mess.  I had gone through two other lawyers who were unable to assist me before landing with him. Adam took it on, simplified it and brought my matter to a resolution far better than I had thought possible. His past experience, efficient work ethic & personable demeanor really made the experience exeptional. I would recomend him and will use him in the future if nessasry.

Adam is extremely knowledgeable and takes the time no matter how big or small the case is to weigh all possible outcomes and how these might affect the client.  I work in the legal field and can say that I wholeheartedly recommend Adam.  He has a calm demeanor and is always available to answer any questions you may have, which some attorneys simply do not do.   I am extremely grateful to Adam for his assistance and will use him again should the need arise.
I found Adam Gamboa to be congenial, competent and willing to go the extra mile to help me. He provided more support than I expected to get.

I am incredibly grateful for Rhett Fraser and everyone at The Fraser Law Firm. Beyond their legal expertise, they showed real care and empathy during a very difficult period in my life. Their guidance made a challenging process feel more manageable and even healing. I’m thankful they took my case and worked so hard to achieve a positive result.

I had an amazing experience with Fraser Law Firm. Kaya was incredibly patient, kind, and truly took the time to listen to my story. She was not only knowledgeable but also genuinely sympathetic to my diagnosis, which made all the difference. It was refreshing to speak with someone who actually cared, unlike other firms I contacted that barely gave me the time of day. If you’re looking for a law firm that treats you like a person, not just a case number, I highly recommend Fraser!
Professional, patient and kind when I called about my parents today. The matter wasn’t a match but saving their info for later. Good firm/staff!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words and for contacting this office. We wish your family the best.

reviews.text: If your looking to lose a legal team as a  vonerable single family, after over 2 years. 2 months right before trial, this is just the firm to "TRUST". disappointed/ devastated.
Rhett is a skilled and tenacious lawyer. He is also a kind and compassionate human being. His clients are lucky to have him on their side.
Nice staff

I worked with Rhett Fraser, (The Fraser Law Firm), for almost two years as he handled my medical negligence case. He is one of the most profound and talented individuals I have met in my life, and he was kind and professional in giving me the attention and care my case deserved. He was able to bring my case to resolution, and I am able to turn a page in my life because of his hard work and dedication to me and his craft. Highly recommended.

Rhett Fraser is a top notch attorney.  I am so grateful that he accepted my case.  He is brilliant, truly.  He and his team, including Jen and Kaia, are thorough, trustworthy, communicative, timely, and supportive.  I could not have asked for a better outcome.  THANK YOU, Huegli Fraser law!!!  If you have a personal injury case, call this office.
Extremely friendly staff. Kind, compassionate, made me feel heard.
They wait 2 weeks after intake to tell you they are not taking your case and waist valuable time when I could have been calling other attorneys.
Wouldn't bother to take my case even with tons of evidence that I'd have won!
He discriminated against me

Huegli Fraser Law represented our family in a Malpractice Lawsuit. Over the years they have become like our family.  Their dedication and hard work on our case was like none other and we are glad we chose them to represent us.  They not only worked endlessly on our case but they took the time to get to know us as a family.  Jim, Rhett, Lisa and the rest of the team are all wonderful people and I highly recommend them!

Rhett Fraser and the entire team at Huegli Fraser went above and beyond in representing my wife in her motor vehicle accident case.  Rhett is very personable, kept us informed of all of the legal wranglings (there were quite a few) and even met with us at our house on several occasions. I can't imagine working with a better group of people.

I was referred to this office about my medical malpractice case. I called on
a Friday two weeks ago and spoke with a paralegal about having my case reviewed. I was told that she would speak with an attorney and give me a call back the following week. Never received a call back. I called again last Friday to follow up and was told by another employee that the person that did my intake was already gone for the day. When we were given the devastating news that my husband had terminal peritoneal mesothelioma cancer, with 6 to 9 months to live, our world collapsed!  With 45 years of marriage behind us, no years of togetherness in our future, my husband wanted to make certain I would be safe and financially secure and could help his grandchildren go to college or buy a first home. He made the decision to reach out to BOUL PLLC to retain representation to fight for financial restitution for his “death by asbestos” reality.

Matt Bergman and Ruby Aliment were our attorneys to represent and defend my husband’s lawful  right to financial compensation from companies in the asbestos industry.

Matt and Ruby provided dedicated, thoughtful, committed service to us, as well as others affected by mesothelioma. Their exceptional dedicated professionalism resulted in successful claims for restitution, which has made a huge difference in the quality of my life. Even though my husband left this world far too young,  because of BOUL’s wonderful representation, I am financially secure and able to remain in our dream home…. EXACTLY what my husbnd wanted!

Big kudos to this company and their hardworking caring devoted staff! I would highly recommend this firm!

The video on the Kafoury website showing Jason Kafoury give a personal tribute to his dad at an event gave me some insight into Jason’s character. And, I wasn’t wrong. He and his staff (in particular, paralegal Natalie) have been great to work with. Very responsive, very transparent. Jason even stayed in contact during his vacation (not that I expected that). In the end, the settlement I received was great, and appropriate. I would highly recommend Jason and his firm to anyone in need of this type of legal service.

Anyway, The "interaction" was interesting and I at least got a decent denial letter but... when a lawyer says "nahhh BUT GET A LAWYER ASAP" is weird yes, what do you think I am trying to do here? As I would have liked to work with him, in the Brief interactions I picked up on an extremely cocky demeanor. This showed through the email  and I wonder to this day if they all laughed at my case in the background. He probably would have taken the case If I was called a racist slur or beaten by a cop. But no, it was just apartment negligence with injury. That is what I have to say about my brief interaction, don't recommend, lost something in his heart along the way of being a lawyer.

reviews.text: He charge to much I think  he got more money for his then me and I the one I. Pain for the rest off my life

I was represented by attorney Will Merkel for my personal injury case. I settled my
personal injury case for $12,000.00. I was supposed to receive $8,000.00 after attorney’s fees were paid.
I agreed to the settlement my case only if I was to receive $8,0000 in my pocket. I received a release
from Mr. Merkel and signed and sent it back. I then received a distribution schedule
for my settlement funds. I refused to sign a distribution schedule because remittance amount that I
received did not correspond to the amount that we discussed with Will Merkel. Specifically, the
distribution statement indicated that I was going to receive $6,071.28. I e-mailed Mr. Merkel on March
24, 2020 and complained that I was not agreeable to pay pacific chiropractic CLINIC in the amount of $1,801.72.I sent an email to Mr. Merkel again stating that I did not agree to pay to Pacific
chiropractic. He replied on the next day telling that the chiropractic clinic has a lien to be paid. I replied asking why he was now stating that it is unreasonable not to pay to Pacific chiropractic.he offered to call to Pacific Chiropractic clinic and bargain with them to lower the
balance. Mr. Merkel told me he would do it. He then replied to me stating that that no-fault
PIP insurance carrier paid Pacific Chiropractic’s bill and he asked me to sign a new distribution schedule
where I would receive proceeds of $7,873.00. I signed this distribution statement and sent it back to him. I received an email from Mr. Merkel stating that the chiropractic bill was already paid
directly from settlement funds to satisfy their lien and that he is unable to change it. He then again sent
me distribution statement for $6,071.28, an amount I never agreed to. Mr. Merkel’s conduct is unethical
in a number of ways. He misrepresented to me the net amount I was going to receive. Apparently he
never verified doctor’s balances with my medical providers. I would not have settled my case for the
$12,000.00 amount. Mr. Merkel then disbursed monies to Pacific Chiropractic without my authorization
and without even attempting to negotiate balances or giving me the opportunity to negotiate them myself.
Mr. Merkel disbursed monied without having a signed closing statement or even my approval to make
such a disbursement. Even after the unauthorized disbursements, Mr. Merkel has kept my monies which
he at the very least should have disbursed to me. Mr. Merkel can’t claim that he had authority to withhold
my monies because of not having a disbursement statement as he had no problem paying Pacific
Chiropractic not having a signed disbursement statement. This is unfair an unethical as Mr. Merkel
clearly took his attorney’s fees, paid the doctor and kept my money
Great representation
Very good service

reviews.text: A law office with a personal touch with the upmost consideration for their clients."attention to detail" should be their slogan and 'treating clients like family' is an understatement.Ros law fought hard to win a 200k settlement for me without breaking a sweat!they will forever be my go-to for any legal advice.i highly recommend them.

I had the privilege of working with Jeremiah Ross for a personal injury suit, and I couldn’t be more pleased with the experience. From the very first consultation, Jeremiah demonstrated not only deep expertise but also a genuine commitment to understanding my situation. Throughout the entire process, he was highly responsive, always available to answer my questions and address my concerns. His paralegal, Phoebe was also extremely efficient and easy to speak to!
What impressed me the most was Jeremiah’s ability to explain what my legal process would look like and all of my options in a way that was clear and understandable, helping me feel confident in every decision I made. He was incredibly thorough, ensuring that every detail of my case was addressed and no stone was left unturned.
Thanks to Jeremiah Ross’s expertise and dedication, I achieved a favorable outcome that exceeded my expectations. I highly recommend Jeremiah to anyone seeking professional, compassionate, and effective legal counsel. He truly goes above and beyond for his clients.

Just wanted to say that Jeremiah and his whole team are amazing! They were there for me in my greatest hour of need and helped me through every single step of navigating a difficult situation. I tell everyone I know about the work they did for me. If anyone even thinks they MIGHT need a lawyer, reach out and see what they can do for you. Thanks again to the whole team from the bottom of my heart.

I truly felt like family working with Jeremiah and Pheoebe. They both delt with me in my ups and downs in a stressful time on a professional level. They took care of everything so I could continue life and move forward. I can't thank them enough. I highly recommend them.

Jeremiah and paralegal Phoebe made the process of handling my injury case seamless and stress-free. Jeremiah answered all my questions, provided realistic timelines, and worked tirelessly to secure a favorable outcome and settlement. Both he and Phoebe treated me with patience and compassion throughout the entire process. Whenever I called, I always received clear and helpful answers.

Dealing with insurance on your own can be overwhelming, which is why having professionals like Jeremiah and Phoebe is invaluable. They are truly a dream team, and I highly recommend the Ross Law team.

It was a challenging time in our lives when we realized that we would need an attorney to guide, manage and resolve our injury claim. Fortunately we learned of and contacted the Ross Law Firm.
Mr. Jeremiah Ross quickly assessed the validity of our claim and proceeded to organize, manage and resolve our case. It was complicated due to multiple parties being involved. Clearly, we could not have handled this challenge by ourselves.
Throughout the process, Ms. Phoebe Thornock communicated regularly with us and along with Mr. Ross - provided progress updates.
While they did the work, we got on with our lives and thanks to the Ross Law Firm, a fair resolution was reached.
We feel Mr. Ross and Ms. Thornock brought out the best in the individuals and organizations involved. Their talent and good work allowed us to resolve and move on from what was a complicated and difficult situation for everyone involved.
The Ross Law Team was very responsive, proactive and professional.  I would highly recommend them to anyone.  They were great to work with and resolved my personal injury case.

I recently worked with attorney Jeremiah and his paralegal Phoebe for a motor vehicle accident case, and I couldn't be happier with the service I received. From the very beginning, they were professional, responsive, and genuinely concerned about my well-being. They explained every step of the process clearly and kept me informed throughout the case.

Their expertise and dedication led to a successful outcome, and I truly felt supported every step of the way. I highly recommend Ross Law PDX to anyone in need of legal assistance. Thank you for your excellent service!
Jeremiah and Phoebe were so easy to work with.  They took the time to really break everything down and made it very easy to understand my case.

Mr. Ross is an impressive attorney and his paralegal Phoebe is just as amazing.  He helped me through a very difficult case with a good result.  He was on top of the case and good at keeping me in the loop even though I didn't always know it, he was working behind the scenes for me.  I can't recommend Ross Law enough.

I can't recommend Ross Law highly enough. Navigating the complexities of countless insurance calls and medical visits was extremely overwhelming, especially while dealing with constant debilitating pain. Jeremiah and Phoebe took all of the stress and frustration out of this process and helped all involved parties achieve a positive and amicable solution. Thank you!

In February, early March 2020, I was referred to Jeremiah by another attorney who dealt with bigger life/death MVA cases than my minor personal injury MVA.  I wasn't sure if it was worth anyone's time with the case.  My interesting case involved an uninsured international driver, uninsured rental vehicle, vehicle registered in different state, weird and untraceable answers pretty much.  My insurance company wasn't doing much investigation themselves.  Jeremiah took on my case.  Bless him and his assistant's heart, working through COVID.  It was difficult to get into the doctors, specialists for services.  My insurance company tried to settled a couple of times but we declined.  For the 2 year period, Jeremiah's patience, knowledge/expertise, recommendations, and suggestions kept me grounded through the long awaited process.  After many western and eastern medicine sessions, I ended up having a shoulder surgery from the MVA in December 2022, missing quite a bit of time from work with recovery.  In August 2023, almost 2.5 years after my accident, we finally settled with a judge in mediation.

All I can say is that besides working with my divorce mediation attorney, Jeremiah was beyond patient, professional, and sincere.  One of the best human beings I ever came across, especially during a rather difficult time of my life being a single mom of 2.  What I learned from this experience is that not all attorneys are out to get your money.

My apology for taking so long to write this review.

Thank you Jeremiah & Pheobe!   I honest don't know how to thank you enough 💕🙏

Anyone else would be more than happy with their services too!

Ross Law assisted me with a Lemon Law claim against Fiat Chrysler America.  They we're responsive and transparent with every step of the process, right up to the point that FCA settled with me.  I would recommend Jeremiah and Phoebe to assist anyone that needs help with their lemon law claim.
Attorney Jeremiah Ross was very professional.  Him and his team handled my claim in a timely manner.  Was very responsive and most importantly he got the job done!
Jeremiah and his staff provided quality service for my settlement case. Friendly and personable.  I enjoyed working with them!

Jeremiah was amazing, helping me with every part of my case. From the moment I signed on he took care of everything. Working with him and Phoebe was great, and they answered any question I had and took care of the difficult communications so I didn't have to. I would definitely look to Ross Law if I need representation in the future!

Jeremiah and Phoebe worked with me with a particularly drawn out (because of COVID and a slow to respond defendant) civil case.  They were wonderful to work with, responsive, communicative, determined and dedicated to getting me a positive outcome, which they did.    Very happy with the outcome and the process, and would definitely work with them again anytime!

Look no further for a personal injury attorney in Portland, Oregon. Jeremiah Ross and paralegal Phoebe Thornock are intelligent, knowledgeable, responsive, and fair minded. They are professional, humane, and not without a sense of humor (as others have noted). Knowing they represented my interests alleviated so much stress and anxiety at what was, frankly, one of the worst times in my life. I am very satisfied with their service and can't recommend them highly enough. Outstanding.

I contacted Ross Law for help with a consumer fraud case unfortunately they couldn't take my case because it was out of state. They were very responsive and helpful on finding someone who could help me.

Excellent communication and outstanding knowledge! Jeremiah and his paralegal Phoebe were able to help me with everything I needed to get a resolution in a consumer fraud situation in a timely manner. Highly recommended to anyone who is in need of legal service in his areas of practice.
I really appreciate  Ross law. They do an excellent job. I highly recommend them. They will work hard for you. They are great people!
Mr. Ross consulted with me and was extremely knowledgeable. He had good advice, took the time to listen to my case and was very respectful. I’d highly recommend his service and representation.

Last year I found myself in need of a personal injury lawyer.  Jeremiah Ross had come highly recommended and I wasn't wrong in the choice I made.  Mr. Ross was very professional and knowledgeable and made sure that I understood the process at every step of the way.  He was always available for phone calls and timely for meetings.  During legal proceedings he had a polite rapport with other lawyers and treated witnesses with respect.  My case was settled and I was very happy with the results.  Mr. Ross' integrity, sense of humor, great paralegal and his ability to put the client's interest first are what make him an outstanding lawyer.

Timely communication and knowledgeable attorney; attorney described in detail the nuances of the case I was pursuing and the cost analysis related to risk and reward. Product liability case was the issue In focus. This law firm is genuinely concerned with ensuring best practices are implemented. Para-legal was attentive, receptive and the attorney was conscientious of the hardship I experienced. Recommend this team and would do business with in the future. Thank you again.

Mr. Ross and his team are efficient and professional every step of the way! I felt that they did an exceptional job representing me in my injury claim. Additionally, I really enjoyed working with them throughout the difficult process because they made it less difficult for me with their expertise and kindness. I’d had a badly broken nose from a car accident and it was nearly a 2 year process, but the most pleasant part was working with Mr. Ross and Phoebe.  I would hire them again if needed (but hope I don’t have to be injured to do so!) I highly recommend this firm.
Exceptional service with highly experienced attorneys.

DISABLED PEOPLE OF OREGON
V
MILLER & WAGNER LLP, et al.
Defendants

CLAIMS FOR RELIEF
COUNT I: CIVIL RIGHTS VIOLATIONS - 42 U.S.C. § 1983

Law firm acting under color of state law (court-appointed cases, public referrals)

Systematic denial of access to legal counsel based on discriminatory criteria

Violation of due process and equal protection rights

COUNT II: CONSPIRACY TO DENY CIVIL RIGHTS - 42 U.S.C. § 1985

Coordinated policy to screen out certain categories of clients

Systematic discrimination affecting class of potential clients

Denial of equal access to legal services

COUNT III: PROFESSIONAL MALPRACTICE & NEGLIGENCE

Failure to provide competent legal intake services

Unauthorized practice of law by support staff

Breach of professional duty to potential clients

COUNT IV: CONSUMER FRAUD & DECEPTIVE PRACTICES

False advertising about availability of legal consultation

Deceptive intake practices that mislead potential clients

Violation of consumer protection laws

SPECIFIC ALLEGATIONS AGAINST MILLER & WAGNER
Systematic Client Discrimination: Receptionist maintains "lists" of acceptable vs. unacceptable clients

Denial of Attorney Access: Preventing legitimate potential clients from speaking with licensed attorneys

Unauthorized Legal Practice: Support staff making legal decisions beyond their competency

Professional Conduct Violations: Violation of Oregon Rules of Professional Conduct

Institutional Discrimination: Pattern of excluding clients based on case type or client characteristics

I was compromised by an unfortunate surgical outcome, but stayed torn about filing suit, until it became clear that I had no other option due to mounting medical expenses.

Miller and Wagner represented me close to flawlessly.

Should you need a team of exceptional attorneys and staff, you can do no better.

Worst attorney I’ve ever seen. No reply to emails, no acknowledgment of information sent, couldn’t even get the right information despite having sent numerous emails. Ran the clock out and left me hanging. Run from these    people.

Treated the case like they just wanted to get it over with. Took 7 months to get back to us, no calls, no meetings, just declined the case on very weak evidence because they’re too broke and lazy to put in work. If you really want to fight for you’re case find a better place. Seriously.

As an employee whose legally protected rights were violated, HKM was the advocate I needed in my corner. From start to finish, their dedication to justice was evident in everything they did. This team didn’t just take my case they prevailed.

They understand how to build compelling arguments grounded in law and backed by evidence, and they are relentless in pursuing the best possible outcome. They deliver results that truly matter for their clients.

Communication here isn’t an afterthought, it’s a priority. From the very first consultation, they took the time to explain my rights, possible strategies, and realistic timelines. Throughout the process, they kept me informed, promptly responding to questions and ensuring I was never left in the dark about the status of my case.

This firm treated me with genuine respect and empathy. They listened deeply, never rushed me, and made me feel valued, not just another case file. Their kindness created a sense of trust that made even the most stressful moments feel manageable.

Attention to detail is one of their greatest strengths. Every document was meticulously prepared, and every legal argument backed by solid research. This thoroughness gave me confidence that nothing was being overlooked.

Employment law cases can be long and emotionally taxing. What sets HKM apart is their patience, they walk you through every step, answering even the most basic questions with respect and clarity. They never make you feel rushed or uninformed, no matter how many times you need an explanation.

This isn’t a place where only junior associates see their clients. From partners to support staff, the entire firm engages with your case. You feel that you are getting the collective strength of their full legal team, everyone is aligned, responsive, and committed to your success.

Above all, their command of employment law is exceptional. They effortlessly navigate statutes, case law, and procedural complexities. Whether the issue is discrimination, retaliation, wage violations, harassment, or wrongful termination, they know the terrain and how to achieve justice for their clients.

If you need a law firm that truly fights for employees, this team exemplifies what advocacy should look like. They are effective, communicative, kind, thorough, patient, fully involved as a team, and exceptionally knowledgeable. I recommend them without reservation to anyone whose workplace rights have been compromised.

reviews.text: After a distressing situation with a former employer, I contacted HKM Employment Attorneys. From the initial intake of my case, everyone I encountered was very professional and helpful. After the review and speaking with Carla on the phone, her team retained me as a client. Carla is an excellent attorney, a great negotiator, and she is very timely with her responses. While the event was one I never hope to repeat in my life, I feel Carla took my case seriously and she helped me to better navigate my rights. Not to mention, she took a large worry off my plate so I could focus on healing and moving into the next stage of my life. Even during the points where I felt very down or didn’t quite understand the “legalese,” she made everything more accessible. I also legitimately feel like this firm as a whole is very discerning and they are open/honest about expectations. Carla never overpromised or made claims she couldn’t keep. I felt like before we worked together, I was well informed and when we worked together, she often checked in or answered questions. I also appreciate that she was level-headed and focused on facts, especially during a situation that was highly painful. All my documentation was reviewed carefully, and her team explained exactly what they needed from me. While I am hardly the type who wanted to involve the law, I believe with the help of Carla and her team that I was able to find a positive resolution. I highly recommend this law firm, even if you only need legal advice about potential legal challenges at a current or former workplace. It’s well worth the inquiry.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience with us, Devon! We're grateful for your kind words about Carla and our team. It’s always our goal to provide clear communication, guidance, and to approach every case with care and integrity. Thank you for your trust in us and for recommending our firm. We wish you all the best as you move forward!

reviews.text: I told them I had 7 days to review my severance document and was told it would be three days to hear a response. It took them 8. Completely missed the point of me contacting them.
reviews.ownerResponse: We’re sorry to hear about your experience, Maddy. Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. I’d appreciate the opportunity to resolve this issue for you. Please feel free to contact me at dkalish@hkm.com.

reviews.text: Jennifer was helpful to me to understand legal documents
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the awesome review, Don. We appreciate hearing from you!

reviews.text: I contacted HKM with an issue over a non-compete with my current employer. Jennifer contacted me exactly when the appointment was arranged. She was extremely professional, personable, and understanding of my situation. She went through my agreement with me and explained how the terms of my agreement aligned with Oregon law. The entire time we were speaking she never attempted to talk over my head, she spoke with me as a neighbor or a friend would speak with me. She made sure that I understood everything as she had explained it. I was very impressed with the entire experience. The thing that impressed me most was in our closing comments she stated to me that she hoped I never had to call her again, and I could tell from her tone and our interaction that she truly meant it. It was truly her hope that everything worked out in my favor with no need for legal representation. That truly spoke volumes of her character. I would gladly recommend the services of HKM to anyone I knew.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the amazing review, Stacy! We're so happy to hear that you had such a great experience with us and that Jennifer was able to help you through the process. Thank you for your trust and confidence in us.

reviews.text:
My experience with the employment law firm HKM and lawyer Hugh Barber was highly disappointing. I would strongly advise others to avoid them and seek better alternatives. My initial lawyer referred me to HKM because of withdrawing from mycase abruptly, due to new type of legal work. Leaving me in a difficult situation.

She had already done over 90% of the work.

When I approached HKM and had a consultation with Mr. Barber, I believed he would be a competent attorney based on his profile and previous experience. However, several red flags emerged during our interactions. Mr. Barber did not prioritize important steps like discovery and failed to communicate effectively throughout the process. He also agreed to a settlement amount without consulting me, which differed significantly from what I had discussed with my previous lawyer.

During the mediation, Mr. Barber seemed more interested in persuading me to accept low settlement offers rather than advocating for my best interests. I felt unsupported and alone, as he sided with the mediator and opposing counsel without providing adequate explanations or guidance. It became clear that Mr. Barber was not truly representing me and was more interested in a quick resolution to the case. For a quick payout. Which would result in his favor of $35,000 dollars.

After the unsuccessful mediation, I decided to proceed to trial and informed Mr. Barber of my decision. He then officially withdrew from the case. Like he stated he would previously from the beginning of our relationship. However, he continued to reach out to me, after withdrawing,and his colleague sent a threatening email when they learned I was considering new counsel. And that there was a significant higher offer from opposing counsel. It was evident that their priorities were focused on financial gain rather than ensuring my rights were protected. Or the value of my case.

Despite no longer representing me, HKM insisted on staying involved and threatened to place a lien on my case for attorney fees and costs. Their behavior was unprofessional and unethical. I confronted Mr. Barber about his failure to file the necessary withdrawal papers, and his response was dismissive and unsatisfactory.

Feeling pressured, I ultimately accepted a settlement offer with HKM's involvement, but their work was subpar and unworthy of the substantial portion they received from my winnings. I never received an itemized bill for their services, further illustrating their lack of transparency and professionalism.

I am now seeking legal recourse against Mr. Barber and HKM for legal malpractice. I urge others to steer clear of this firm. With hindsight and discussions with other legal professionals, I have realized that there were better options available to handle my case, and I deeply regret choosing Hugh Barber and HKM.
reviews.ownerResponse: We’re sorry to hear about your experience. Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. I’d appreciate the opportunity to resolve this issue for you. Please feel free to contact me at dkalish@hkm.com.
